name: The Westbourne Hyde Park
description: Located opposite Hyde Park, The Westbourne Hyde Park Hotel is housed in a beautifully restored 19th-century Victorian property, a 3-minute walk from Lancaster Gate Tube Station and a 6-minute walk from Paddington Tube Station. The hotel offers studios and one-bedroom suites that feature Hypnos beds, Smart TV's and a working area with a desk. All one-bedroom suites also offer a lounge area. The Westbourne Hyde Park has a W Bar & Lounge as well as a 24-hour reception team along with a daily maid service. The hotel is located a 1-minute walk to Hyde Park and it is an 18-minute walk from Oxford Street and Marble Arch Tube Station. Just across the Hyde Park are Kensington, Knightsbridge, Buckingham Palace and the Royal Albert Hall. There is easy access to Heathrow Airport, with an express service from Paddington Train Station, just a 5-minute walk away.

name: The Tower Hotel, by Thistle
neighborhood: The City - Tower Bridge - St. Pauls Cathedral
description: Nestled between the River Thames and St Katherine’s Dock, and next to Tower Bridge, The Tower Hotel, by Thistle offers ideal location, a restaurant, a bar and a fitness center. Free Wi-Fi is available throughout. Each room at The Tower has a flat-screen TV with Freeview channels and a desk. The on-site restaurant offers freshly prepared modern fusion cuisine. The bar features an extensive drinks menu, and features stunning views of the famous Tower Bridge and the Shard skyscraper. This 4-stars hotel is just 8 minutes’ stroll away from Tower Hill Tube Station, and offers easy access to central London and the West End in just a 20-minute journey. London City Airport is only 30 minutes away by DLR. Thames Clippers service St Katherine’s Pier is a mere 2 minutes’ walk away, connecting the area with the city via the River Thames.

name: Copthorne Tara Hotel London Kensington
description: Copthorne Tara Hotel London Kensington is located within a 3-minute walk from Kensington High Street and within easy reach from the shops and restaurants of Knightsbridge and Notting Hill. Rooms here feature Hypnos beds, flat-screen TVs and in-room safes. All are en-suite and feature coffee and tea making facilities. Free WiFi is available in all areas. Guests can dine on site in the Artist Corner, offering modern British and European cuisine. The property also features a brasserie with Asian-style dishes and the Cafexpress cafe. Further facilities at Copthorne Tara Hotel London Kensington include a conference center and a fitness room. Olympia exhibition center is within walking distance and so are Hyde Park, the Royal Albert Hall and the world-famous museums on Cromwell Road.

name: Zedwell Piccadilly Circus
description: The Zedwell Piccadilly Hotel is a great choice for those looking to stay near Piccadilly Circus. The hotel is located in the heart of London’s West End and is within walking distance of some of the city’s most popular attractions, including Soho, Buckingham Palace, Trafalgar Square, and Leicester Square. Whether you are in London for theater or night life, Zedwell Piccadilly Hotel is the perfect place to stay. The hotel offers a variety of amenities and services to make your stay as comfortable and enjoyable as possible, including a 24-hour front desk, gym access, and high speed free WI-Fi throughout the property. It is perfect for couples, solo adventurers, business travelers, and families (with kids). Book your stay at Zedwell Piccadilly Hotel today and experience all that London has to offer! Zedwell Hotel Piccadilly Circus offers complimentary access to Beauty & Ironing Rooms. The rooms are: Ironing Room: 11.215, 5203 Beauty Room: 7103, 3131 Alternatively, guests can request an iron or hairdryer to be delivered to their room for a £10 fee. Guests can either: Use the Beauty & Ironing Room for free. Request an iron/hairdryer to their room for £10

name: Mowbray Court Hotel
description: Mowbray Court Hotel is a listed Victorian building in Earl's Court, this hotel is a 3-minute walk from the Earl's Court Underground Station. The Mowbray Court Hotel features air-conditioned rooms with free WiFi. The hotel offers a continental buffet breakfast. Refurbished in 2016, the rooms include a flat-screen TV. You will find a kettle in the room. Each room has a private bathroom with a shower, with free toiletries provided. You will find a 24-hour front desk at the property. A variety of restaurants, bars and cafés are within 5 minutes’ walk from the hotel. Mowbray Court Hotel is near to Knightsbridge and a short walk to Kensington Palace, The Royal Albert Hall and Museums of South Kensington. Olympia London exhibition center is only 15-minute walk away. There is a direct tube to Heathrow Airport from Earl's Court Underground Station.

name: STG Hotel Oxford Street - formerly St Giles London Hotel
neighborhood: Bloomsbury - Marble Arch - Kings Cross Station & British Museum
description: Located in London’s West End, less than 5 minutes’ walk from Tottenham Court Underground Station and Oxford Street shops is the STG Hotel Oxford Street. The Dominion Theater is just a 3-minute walk away. The hotel offers 2 restaurant choices: Hudson’s House Restaurant & Lounge Bar and VQ - a vibrant café & diner Covent Garden and the British Museum are within a 10-minute walk of the STG Hotel Oxford Street. The National Gallery is less than 15 minutes’ walk away. The bar is usually open until late, every night. WiFi access for social media and browsing is available free of charge A private shower room and a TV are provided in each bright room. With classic decor, all rooms at the STG Hotel Oxford Street feature a safe and a hairdryer. Same day luggage storage is available for £10 per item.

name: Tower Suites by Blue Orchid
neighborhood: The City - Tower Bridge - St. Pauls Cathedral
description: Located in London and with Tower of London reachable within a 11-minute walk, Tower Suites by Blue Orchid has concierge services, non-smoking rooms, a restaurant, free WiFi and a bar. This 5-star hotel offers room service and a tour desk. The property is a 9-minute walk from Sky Garden, and within 2.6 miles of the city center. The hotel will provide guests with air-conditioned rooms offering a desk, a coffee machine, a fridge, a safety deposit box, a flat-screen TV and a private bathroom with a shower. Rooms come with an electric tea pot, while some rooms include a kitchen with a dishwasher, a microwave and a stovetop. The rooms have a closet. Guests at Tower Suites by Blue Orchid can enjoy a buffet or a Full English/Irish breakfast. Speaking Bulgarian, German, English and Spanish, staff will be happy to provide guests with practical advice on the area at the 24-hour front desk. Popular points of interest near the accommodation include Liverpool Street Tube Station, Tower Bridge and Brick Lane. London City Airport is 6.2 miles from the property.

name: W London
description: In London’s vibrant West End, W London – Leicester Square offers luxury bedrooms and a stylish cocktail bar. The hotel features a sumptuous spa and beauty center. Featuring floor-to-ceiling windows, the 5-star rooms at W London have iPod docks, 37-inch flat-screen TVs, and an impressive media library. All have bathrobes and luxury linens, and some have views over Leicester Square. Away Spa at W London Leicester Square features a sauna and steam room. There is also a beauty boutique and 4 elegant treatment rooms. The Perception Bar serves cocktails, dining experiences and music/events while overlooking the streets of Soho below. In the heart of Theatreland, W London Hotel is just yards from lively Chinatown and Soho. Leicester Square Underground Station is 984 feet away and Piccadilly Circus is a 2-minute walk.

name: Park Plaza London Riverbank
description: Located on the south side of the River Thames, 2133 feet from the London Underground, Park Plaza London Riverbank has free WiFi and air-conditioned rooms with flat-screen TVs. The hotel is set across the river from the Tate Britain gallery, close to Westminster. The London Eye, Houses of Parliament and Big Ben are all within reach. Waterloo Station is a mile away, giving great access to the rest of the city and south of England. A fitness center which features free weights, a pre-and post-workout stretching area and a range of TechnoGym weight resistance and cardiovascular machines is available at the property. Guests can also enjoy the indoor pool, sauna and steam room facilities. Every room has a EU/US power sockets, a large work desk, laptop safe, and a mini-bar. Some rooms have views of the River Thames and the London skyline. 24-hour room service is also available. Park Plaza London Riverbank houses the award winning Chino Latino that serves exotic Pan-Asian dishes featuring stunning views of the River Thames.

name: Holiday Inn London - Kensington By IHG
description: Just 2 minutes’ walk from Kensington High Street, the Holiday Inn London Kensington High St. offers air-conditioned rooms with private bathrooms and free access to the gym. It has Spa center and a 24-hour front desk. Hyde Park is a 10-minute walk away. The spacious rooms at Holiday Inn London Kensington High St. come with a satellite TV, and each is fitted with carpeted floors and wooden furniture. All include a personal safe and a tea/coffee maker. High Street Kensington Underground Station is 492 feet away, and links to Wimbledon and Hammersmith. The famous Museum Mile and Earl’s Court are within a 15-minute walk of Holiday Inn London Kensington High St. The Boulevard Restaurant serves hot buffet breakfast every day, and guests can enjoy contemporary European dishes for dinner. The Lounge Bar serves drinks, light lunches and afternoon teas in a relaxed atmosphere. Access to the swimming pool and modern spa facilities is available at a surcharge.

name: Leonardo Royal London City - Tower Hill
neighborhood: The City - Tower Bridge - St. Pauls Cathedral
description: Overlooking the historic Tower of London, the luxury 4-star Leonardo Royal Hotel London City - Tower of London features a spa with a 25-yard swimming pool and a large gym. Featuring a brasserie and a cocktail lounge, the hotel is just 2 minutes' walk from Tower Hill Tube Station and offers free WiFi. Each elegant air-conditioned room includes a flat-screen TV, a trouser press, and tea and coffee making facilities. The private bathrooms have complimentary toiletries and a hairdryer. Leonardo Royal Hotel London City - Tower of London offers range of onsite bars and restaurants. Leo's Bar and Restaurant provides a traditional menu with modern decor. A wide variety of drinks and snacks can also be enjoyed in Corvo Bar and Cafe. A full buffet breakfast is now offered. Some rooms receive a 10% discount on spa treatments during their stay. Leisure facilities at the Leonardo Royal Hotel London City - Tower of London include a steam room and a sauna for guests to enjoy. Located in the city of London, the hotel is just 20 minutes’ walk from St Paul’s Cathedral.

name: St Mark's - Merit Hotels
description: Located within a 2-minute walk of Earl’s Court Tube Station, in the Royal Borough of Kensington and Chelsea, home to Kensington Palace and the Royal Albert Hall, St Mark's Merit Hotels offers free WiFi access. Rooms at this newly refurbished hotel are individually designed and feature a TV, mini bar, coffee and tea hospitality tray and a safe. Located within walking distance to an array of restaurants and famous shops, such as Harrods, the Hotel is a few minutes’ walk from various museums, including the Natural History and Victoria and Albert. Heathrow Airport can be reached in 20 minutes without any changes via the Piccadilly Line. St. Mark Hotel is a 5-minute walk from Earl's Court Tube Station. Each room has a fridge. The comfortable rooms have private bathrooms, tea/coffee and a TV. Wi-Fi internet access is available throughout the building with a 24-hour front desk. The hotel is located in Earl's Court, close to many restaurants and shops. The Olympia Exhibition Center is within walking distance of the hotel. The hotel has a elevator and the hotel does not serve any breakfast.

name: Heeton Concept Hotel - Luma Hammersmith
description: Heeton concept hotel- Luma Hammersmith is an urban boutique hotel perched in the heart of West London’s thriving Hammersmith neighborhood. It is a 2 minute walk from Hammersmith tube station and 1 minute walk to the lyric theater. The chic, contemporary rooms all come with air-conditioning, a flat screen tv, tea and coffee facilities and free toiletries. Additional facilities include a 24-hour desk, free Wi-Fi and washing machine. The hotel's Grab & Go breakfast includes fruit juices, croissants, a breakfast bar, yogurts, hot drinks, offering a quick and tasty start to your day. The popular deluxe rooms come equipped with a working desk, mini fridge and sofa. The hotel also has an inviting front garden. Located conveniently to get you to the famous London museums or Hyde park within a 20 minute tube ride. 15 minutes to green park station to visit Buckingham palace. Explore locally, with the Eventim Apollo being only 550 yards away and the Thames riverside 750 yards away. Perfectly located between the Hammersmith King Street shopping district and Westfield shopping center. For those attending events at the Olympia exhibition center, it’s a 20-minute walk away. If you're flying in, Heathrow Airport is just a 30-minute ride on the Piccadilly line.

name: Spark by Hilton London Romford
description: Located in Romford and within 4 miles of Upminster Tube Station, Spark by Hilton London Romford has a bar, non-smoking rooms, and free WiFi. This 3-star hotel offers a 24-hour front desk and luggage storage space. Guests can have a drink at the snack bar. Complete with a private bathroom equipped with a shower and free toiletries, the rooms at the hotel have a flat-screen TV and air conditioning, and some rooms include a balcony. Guest rooms have a safety deposit box. Guests at Spark by Hilton London Romford can enjoy a buffet or a Full English/Irish breakfast. At the accommodation you'll find a restaurant serving American, British and Pizza cuisine. Vegetarian and vegan options can also be requested. Gants Hill Tube Station is 5.8 miles from Spark by Hilton London Romford, while Barking Tube Station is 6.1 miles from the property. London City Airport is 8.7 miles away.

name: Strand Palace Hotel
description: Welcoming guests since 1909, the Strand Palace is located in London’s West End within just 2297 feet of the Adelphi and the Vaudeville theaters. The hotel is home to 2 on-site bars offering cocktails and afternoon tea, and a restaurant serving British cuisine. A flat-screen satellite TV is provided in each room. Guests also have use of an on-site gym and room service is available between 1200 and 2300H. The rooms are equipped with state-of-the-art air conditioners. Deluxe and superior guestrooms have air-conditioning fitted as standard. The hotel has 788 bedrooms and has a guest services team. Covent Garden’s shops and the Royal Opera House are a 5-minute walk away, while Trafalgar Square is an 8-minute walk away. The Strand Lyceum Theater and the Novello Theater are 2297 feet from the Strand Palace. Charing Cross Rail and Underground Station is a 4 minute walk from the hotel, while Waterloo Station can reached in 15-minutes' walk.

name: Holiday Inn Express London-Hammersmith By IHG
description: This modern hotel in West London is conveniently located and gives great access to Central London attractions such as The London Eye, Buckingham Palace and the Natural History Museum. Hammersmith Tube Station gives access to central London and Heathrow Airport. Guests are a five-minute walk from shops and the Hammersmith Apollo concert venue. This Holiday Inn Express is just a few hundred yards from the A4, linking to the M4 motorway in a five-minute drive. It’s within 2 miles of the Westfield Shopping Center and the Earl's Court and Olympia exhibition centers. Each room features wall-mounted TVs, USB ports next to the bed, tea/coffee-making facilities, ironing facilities, a work desk, comfortable beds and air conditioning. Also, the rooms have an private bathroom with a hairdryer, power shower and free toiletries. Free Wi-Fi is available throughout the property. Breakfast is free for every guest and includes cooked options or a selection of cereals, pastries, fruit and drinks. In the evening, enjoy an evening meal and choose from pizzas, burgers or nibbles. Grab a drink from the bar and choose from a craft beer, premium spirit or soft drink to enjoy in the lounge.

name: Wellington Hotel by Blue Orchid
description: Located in Vincent Square, Wellington Hotel by Blue Orchid offers tranquil accommodations in the heart of Central London. The property is only 10 minutes' walk from Victoria Station, offering excellent transport links to Gatwick Airport and all areas in London. Boasting 160 rooms across different categories, the Wellington Hotel by Blue Orchid feature private bathrooms, flatscreen TVs and WiFi. Guests can enjoy their meals in the on-site restaurant or relax in the lounge. There is also a gym and 24-hours reception, security, porter and room service. Popular local attractions include the Houses of Parliament, Westminster Abbey and London Eye, all within 15 minutes' walk.

name: Riu Plaza London The Westminster
description: Ideally set in London, Riu Plaza London The Westminster has air-conditioned rooms, a fitness center, free WiFi and a bar. This 4-star hotel offers a concierge service and luggage storage space. Private parking is available on site. The rooms at the hotel come with a flat-screen TV with satellite channels and a safety deposit box. Riu Plaza London The Westminster provides some accommodations with river views, and rooms have an electric tea pot. At the accommodation, the rooms include a private bathroom with free toiletries and a hairdryer. Breakfast is available, and includes buffet, continental and Full English/Irish options. Speaking German, English, Spanish and French, staff are always on hand to help at the reception. Popular points of interest near Riu Plaza London The Westminster include Westminster Abbey, Big Ben and Houses of Parliament. London City Airport is 9.3 miles from the property.

name: ibis budget London Barking
description: Located less than a mile from Barking underground station, ibis budget London Barking offers on-site outdoor parking at an additional fee and a 24-hour front desk. Westfield Stratford City shopping center is a 20-minute drive from the hotel and features a 17-screen cinema, bowling alley and a wide selection of designer shops. London City Airport can be reached in 12 minutes by car. An en suite shower is provided in each room at ibis budget London Barking, as well as a flat-screen TV. Hairdryers are available on request. A continental buffet breakfast is on offer each morning including cold cuts, cheese, yogurt, pastries, toast, jam and butter. A selection of hot drinks, fruits and juice is also available

name: Novotel London Canary Wharf
description: Featuring a roof terrace with 360 views across the London skyline, Novotel London Canary Wharf also benefits from an on-site gym, pool and contemporary restaurant and bar. Free WiFi is available throughout the hotel. Each air conditioned guest room features a flat-screen TV, private bathrooms and a work desk. There is a 24-hour front desk at the property, as well as room service which offers a variety of hot dishes and cold snacks. The Bōkan Restaurant, Bar and Roof Terrace serves artisanal food and drink made using a mixture of local, ancient and adopted British ingredients. The menu is inspired by European cultural cuisines. There are panoramic views of London and the Thames, high-speed WiFi and triple-story rooftop dining. Greenwich Park is 2.1 mi from Novotel London Canary Wharf, while Tower Bridge is 2.2 mi away. The nearest airport is London City Airport, 3.1 mi from Novotel London Canary Wharf.

name: Hilton London Paddington
description: Connected by footbridge to Paddington Station, this 4-star Hilton has Art Deco-style rooms and a gym. Hyde Park and Kensington Palace are within 10 minutes’ walking distance. Guests at the Hilton London Paddington are only 15 minutes journey from Heathrow Airport, via the Heathrow Express train service at Paddington. The stylish rooms each feature a modern flat-screen TV, a seating area and mini-bar. There are also luxurious bathrooms, and large windows letting in plenty of natural light. At the Paddington Hilton there is a stylish brasserie restaurant, the 146 Paddington bar and 24-hour room service. The Executive Lounge provides a quiet space for guests to unwind or work.

name: Trebovir Hotel London
description: Just 492 feet from Earls Court Underground Station,Trebovir Hotel offers air-conditioned rooms with a flat-screen TV. Earls Court Exhibition Center is a 3-minute walk away and free WiFi is available throughout the building. The shops and boutiques of South Kensington and Chelsea can be reached after 20 minutes’ walk. Stamford Bridge, home of Chelsea Football Club, is just over a mile away, and Heathrow Airport is a 30-minute journey by car. An LCD flat-screen TV and a private bathroom with a selection of toiletries are included in each compact room.

name: Holiday Inn London Camden Lock By IHG
neighborhood: Regents Park - Baker Street - Camden Market
description: Holiday Inn London Camden Lock is nestled in the heart of Camden offers scenic views of the waterfront. Just a 4-minute walk from Camden Town Underground Station, this contemporary hotel is designed for comfort and style, featuring rooms equipped with power showers. From Camden Town Station, it's just a quick 5-minute tube ride to King’s Cross St Pancras. Explore Camden Town's vibrant bars, restaurants, markets, and music venues like the Jazz Cafe and Roundhouse Theater, all within walking distance. Regent’s Park and London Zoo are also just a leisurely 15-minute stroll away. Indulge in seasonal menus crafted from fresh ingredients and light snacks at our Lobby Bar, which also serves Starbucks coffee. Guests can stay active with our mini-gym facilities. Each bright room comes equipped with a satellite TV and hairdryer, and every private bathroom includes bathroom amenities and a refreshing power shower. Enjoy the convenience of 24-hour room service during your stay

name: Best Western Buckingham Palace Road
description: Located within 5 minutes’ walk of London Victoria Rail and Underground Station, the Best Western Buckingham Palace Rd is just a 15-minute walk from Buckingham Palace and its gardens. Less than 1-mile from the Houses of Parliament and Westminster Abbey, this hotel offers free Wi-Fi and a 24-hour front desk. Oxford Street’s shops are just a 2-minute tube journey from Victoria Underground. Hyde Park is just over 1-mile from the hotel. The Gatwick Express train service runs regularly from Victoria Railway Station to London Gatwick Airport. A satellite TV, a hairdryer and tea and coffee making facilities are provided in each room, which also has a private bathroom with a power shower. Takeaway continental breakfast is available daily in the comfort of your room at an additional cost. When booking 4 rooms or more, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

name: Kimpton Fitzroy London By IHG
neighborhood: Bloomsbury - Marble Arch - Kings Cross Station & British Museum
description: Kimpton Fitzroy London by IHG features free bikes, fitness center, a restaurant and bar in London. Featuring room service, this property also provides guests with a sun terrace. The property is 1.1 miles from the city center and a 7-minute walk from British Museum. The hotel offers a buffet or Full English/Irish breakfast. Speaking Mandarin, English, Spanish and French, staff are always on hand to help at the reception. Popular points of interest near Kimpton Fitzroy London by IHG include Euston Train Station, Royal Opera House and Dominion Theatre. London City Airport is 8.7 miles away.

name: The July - London Victoria
description: Featuring a fitness center, a restaurant as well as a bar, The July - London Victoria is located in the center of London, a 5-minute walk from Victoria Train Station. This 4-star hotel has a spa experience, with its sauna and spa center. The property provides a concierge service, and luggage storage for guests. The rooms at the hotel come with a flat-screen TV and a kitchen. With a private bathroom equipped with a shower and free toiletries, rooms at The July - London Victoria also have free WiFi, while some rooms also offer a city view. All rooms will provide guests with a closet and a coffee machine. A buffet breakfast is available at the accommodation. Speaking Greek, English, Spanish and Italian at the 24-hour front desk, staff are always at hand to help. Popular points of interest near The July - London Victoria include Victoria Tube Station, Buckingham Palace and Westminster Abbey. London City Airport is 11 miles from the property.

name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London - Hyde Park
description: Overlooking Kensington Gardens and Hyde Park, the 4-star DoubleTree by Hilton London - Hyde Park offers an elegant brasserie and modern air-conditioned rooms, a 3-minute walk from Bayswater and Queensway Tube Stations. The bright rooms at DoubleTree by Hilton London - Hyde Park are decorated with modern art, and have Hypnos beds covered with Egyptian cotton sheets and thick duvets. All rooms include a work desk, mini fridge and ironing facilities. With wall-to-ceiling windows, Urban Meadow offers stylish restaurant fare with a laid back rustic edge, with focus on grab and go items, sharing platters, and smaller grazing dishes that can be enjoyed as a light bite or tapas-style. An all day dining destination, it serves up contemporary wholesome food, carefully sourced from local producers. Guests can also dine al fresco on the spacious patio which provides a sheltered and relaxing haven with comfortable cushioned seating. Nearby Paddington Train Station offers excellent access to Heathrow Airport via the Heathrow Express 15-minute service. Oxford Street and West End theaters are a 10-minute Tube ride away.

name: The Royal Horseguards Hotel, London
description: Between the River Thames and Trafalgar Square, this 4-star hotel has a mix of history and modern style. It has a restaurant, the gym is open and river views. It is a Grade I listed building that overlooks the London Eye, just a short walk from the National Gallery. It also edges onto Covent Garden and Theatreland. Bedrooms offer Victorian elegance and modern features, including free Wi-Fi, Elemis toiletries, a 49-inch LCD TV, and free mineral water. The peaceful One Twenty One Two Restaurant at Royal Horseguards Hotel features fine food and wine. There is also an outdoor terrace for al fresco dining

name: Reem Hotel
description: The Reem Hotel is 3-star hotel located 10 min walk from greenery of Hyde Park and 6 min walk from Bayswater Underground Station (Queensway Underground Station is also 9 min walk from this hotel). It has undergone a complete renovation in 2024. Within walking distance of peaceful Kensington Gardens, trendy Westbourne Grove and rather cool Portobello Road Market/Notting Hill, The Reem Hotel has a perfect location for all your travels. It offers modern and cozy rooms with private bathrooms (fluffy towels and luxurious toiletries), Air conditioning, mini fridge, safe and smart flat screen TV. The cozy rooms at The Reem each have tea/coffee facilities, work space and comfy beds. Ironing facilities (available on request at the reception) and free Wi-Fi access are also available. Continental Buffet Breakfast are served each morning in the bright and airy dining room with small outdoor terrace. Reception is open 24 hours and can help arrange theater tickets, sightseeing tours and book a taxi. Book your room now and stay in the heart of Bayswater with us!

name: Holiday Inn Express Southwark By IHG
neighborhood: The City - Tower Bridge - St. Pauls Cathedral
description: In the vibrant South Bank district, Holiday Inn Express Southwark is within 0.5 miles of 2 Tube (subway) Stations. Modern air-conditioned rooms each have a flat-screen TV and private bathroom. All of the bright rooms have a radio, tea and coffee-making facilities and a work area. The contemporary bathroom facilities have a shower and hairdryer. The spacious Great Room serves extensive continental and cooked breakfast options, and the Lobby bar has a wide-screen TV for sports. Guests at the Holiday Inn Express Southwark are a 1-mile walk along the Thames from London Eye and Tower Bridge. The Tate Modern is less than a 10-minute walk away, and a short walk over the futuristic Millennium Bridge will take you to St Paul's Cathedral.

name: The Clermont London, Charing Cross
description: Just steps from Trafalgar Square and Covent Garden, The Clermont London, Charing Cross is housed in a beautiful, Grade II-listed building next to Charing Cross train station. This 4-star hotel features a restaurant and stylish rooms. Smart, spacious rooms have unlimited free WiFi, free mini-bars and Nespresso coffee makers. The Clermont Restaurant and Bar offers an all-day dining venue and bar, where you can enjoy a classic afternoon tea, or a cocktail prepared by the in-house mixologist. The Clermont Restaurant and Bar offers views of the famous Strand below. You can reach sights including The Mall, The National Gallery and the banks of the River Thames within a short walk. Theatreland is within a 5-minute walk of the hotel.

name: Leonardo Royal London St Paul's
neighborhood: The City - Tower Bridge - St. Pauls Cathedral
description: Located beside St Paul’s Cathedral in London’s business district, this 4-star hotel features a fantastic pool and luxurious rooms. Each elegant room at the Leonardo Royal Hotel London St Paul’s features a luxury bathroom with power shower, designer toiletries, and power hairdryers. Rooms offer a flat-screen TV with satellite channels, bathrobes and slippers, and free WiFi. A full buffet breakfast is offered, and the bar and restaurant are fully open. Rena health and fitness club features a fully equipped gym with TVs, personal trainers, and fitness classes. Rena spa offers a number of luxurious treatments, while guests can relax in the hot tub and sauna. The hotel also has 2 floors of meeting and events space. St Paul’s Underground Station and the London Stock Exchange are both a 5-minute walk away. One New Change shopping center is a 4-minute walk away and Shakespeares Globe is an 11-minute walk away.

name: Alhambra Hotel
neighborhood: Bloomsbury - Marble Arch - Kings Cross Station & British Museum
description: Alhambra Hotel is located in central London, right next to King’s Cross St Pancras station. It offers affordable accommodations 5 minutes’ walk from the Eurostar at St Pancras International. Free Wi-Fi is available throughout the building, and there is a 24-hour reception desk. Rooms at Alhambra are clean and warm, with central heating, carpeted floors, flat-screen TVs and hairdryer. Most rooms benefit from a compact private bathroom. Alhambra Hotel has several annex buildings across the road. 24-hours front desk is available at the main building. The hotel is 1.5 miles from Regent’s Park. London Zoo is a 10-minute drive from the building, and the British Museum can be reached in 20 minutes’ walk. There is easy access to Covent Garden via the London Underground, and Heathrow Airport can be reached on the Piccadilly Line.

name: ME London by Melia
description: Set on the Strand, ME by Meliá London - Covent Garden by Melia - Covent Garden overlooks the impressive Somerset House. With international fine dining, this elegant hotel offers the STK London and the Italian oriented restaurant Luciano by Gino D´Acampo . It is just 2 minutes’ walk from the River Thames, Covent Garden, Somerset House and Soho. Its Radio Rooftop Bar features panoramic views of London. With interiors designed by Foster and Partners, this innovative hotel has a cosmopolitan atmosphere and contemporary music. The rooms boast floor-to-ceiling windows with impressive views, an integrated media hub, and an LCD TV. The private bathrooms include a Bali shower. The rooms also boast free WiFi, 24-hour gym access and 24-hour room service. Enjoy Radio Rooftop with views over London for an unmissable experience, cocktail in hand. Guests can also relax in the ultra-modern Marconi Lounge Bar which offers smoothies, pastries and coffees. ME by Meliá London - Covent Garden by Melia - Covent Garden offers a personalized service to guests and can offer tailored tourist information and reserve tickets for events and attractions. The hotel is 5 minutes’ walk from the bright lights of the West End. Trafalgar Square is 10 minutes’ walk away and Temple Tube Station is 5 minutes away by foot. Enjoy Radio Rooftop with views over London for an unmissable experience, cocktail in hand.

name: Mercure London Earls Court
description: Located 1.1 miles from Olympia Exhibition Centre, Mercure London Earls Court offers 4-star accommodations in London and has a shared lounge, a restaurant and a bar. Among the facilities at this property are room service and a 24-hour front desk, along with free WiFi throughout the property. Guests can have a drink at the snack bar. The rooms at the hotel come with a seating area, a flat-screen TV with satellite channels, a safety deposit box and a private bathroom with a shower, free toiletries and a hairdryer. Mercure London Earls Court has some accommodations with city views, and rooms are equipped with a coffee machine. All guest rooms have a desk. Breakfast is available, and includes buffet, continental and Full English/Irish options. Stamford Bridge Stadium is one mile from the accommodation, while South Kensington Tube Station is 1.3 miles from the property. London Heathrow Airport is 11 miles away.

name: Leonardo Royal London Tower Bridge
neighborhood: The City - Tower Bridge - St. Pauls Cathedral
description: Boasting spacious rooms with LED TVs, cozy bathrobes and free Wi-Fi, this hotel is located in central London, 15 minutes’ walk from the Tower of London. Tower Hill Underground Station is just a 5-minute walk away. Each luxurious room at Leonardo Royal London Tower Bridge offers modern amenities including free WiFi, satellite channels and private bathroom with luxury toiletries. Leo's Restaurant and Bar serves a range of grill and à la carte. A range of cocktails and wines is offered in the sophisticated lounge bar. A Breakfast Buffet is served daily in the restaurant. Fenchurch Street Station is less than 10 minutes away on foot, and Tower Bridge is a 10-minute walk. London Bridge can be reached in 10 minutes on foot. A 25-yard swimming pool and a gym feature in the hotel's Rena Health and Leisure. There is a business center on site, and there are well-equipped event suites for guests to use. Some rooms offer a 10% discount on spa treatments. The pool is busier than usual on weekends and Bank holidays.

name: Point A Hotel London Kings Cross - St. Pancras
neighborhood: Bloomsbury - Marble Arch - Kings Cross Station & British Museum
description: Point A Hotel London Kings Cross – St Pancras is located a 5-minute walk from King’s Cross train station, 1.2 miles from British Museum and 1.3 miles from Dominion Theater. The hotel offers free WiFi throughout the property. Every room is compact and well designed, featuring a comfortable bed, private bathrooms with a power shower, free high-speed WiFi, USB charging point, air-conditioning, flat-screen TV and a safe. Blackout curtains are also featured to ensure you have a good night's sleep. Point A Hotel London Kings Cross offers a 24-hour reception and contemporary lobby area where guests can continue to make use of the the high-speed WiFi, enjoy the continental breakfast served each morning and coffee and snacks provided throughout the day. The property has great transport links, being just 2297 ft from Kings Cross St Pancras Underground Station, Kings Cross National Rail and St Pancras International Station. Heathrow Airport can be reached within one hour via Paddington train station.

name: Holiday Inn London - Regents Park By IHG
neighborhood: Bloomsbury - Marble Arch - Kings Cross Station & British Museum
description: In the heart of London, this modern 4-star hotel is just a 5-minute walk from Regent’s Park and 2 Tube Stations. It has a bar, a restaurant and 24-hour reception and room service. Free WiFi is available. The bedrooms have modern décor and all have a bathroom with a bath, a shower and a hairdryer. Other facilities include tea and coffee, satellite TV and air conditioning. The Junction Restaurant at the Holiday Inn London - Regent's Park serves a menu of classic British food, where under-12s eat for free. The Junction Bar and Lounge stocks a range of international beers, wines and cocktails. Start the morning with a buffet breakfast including a selection of continental and cooked items. Conveniently located in London’s West End, this Holiday Inn is just 0.5 miles from Oxford Street’s shops, various theaters and Madame Tussauds. It is also 1.3 miles away from London Zoo.

name: Royal National Hotel
neighborhood: Bloomsbury - Marble Arch - Kings Cross Station & British Museum
description: Ideally located in the center of London, Royal National Hotel has free WiFi throughout the property and a bar. This 3-star hotel offers luggage storage space. Guests can have a drink at the snack bar. All rooms in the hotel are equipped with an electric tea pot. At Royal National Hotel the rooms have a closet, a flat-screen TV and a private bathroom. The breakfast offers buffet, Full English/Irish or vegetarian options. At the accommodation you'll find a restaurant serving British and Italian cuisine. Vegetarian, vegan and gluten-free options can also be requested. Speaking Arabic, English, Spanish and Hindi, staff are always on hand to help at the reception. Popular points of interest near Royal National Hotel include British Museum, Euston Train Station and Dominion Theatre. London City Airport is 8.7 miles from the property.

name: Hilton London Syon Park
description: Hilton London Syon Park has a fitness center, garden, a terrace and restaurant in Brentford. With free WiFi, this 4-star hotel offers room service and a 24-hour front desk. The property has an ATM, a concierge service and currency exchange for guests. A buffet, continental or Full English/Irish breakfast is served at the property. Boston Manor Tube Station is 1.2 miles from the hotel, while Twickenham Stadium is 2.5 miles from the property. London Heathrow Airport is 6.2 miles away.

name: Holiday Inn London - Whitechapel By IHG
description: Located in East London. This Holiday Inn hotel is only a 5-minute walk from both Whitechapel and Shadwell Underground Stations. It has a restaurant, a lounge bar and a fitness center with mini gym. All rooms include free Wi-Fi, air-conditioned and come equipped with a flat-screen TV. London’s financial district, central London and London Heathrow Airport can also be reached within 10 minutes using the multiple transport options including the Elizabeth line, Tube, Overground and DLR tube lines. For shopping and leisure, guests can visit the West End and the new Westfield Stratford, both only 10 minutes away. London City Airport is 5 miles away.

name: Hilton London Kensington
description: Located in the Royal Borough of Kensington and Chelsea; the Holland Park district and just 5 minutes' walk from the Westfield London Shopping Center; Hilton London Kensington offers the perfect base. Each of the spacious rooms at the Hilton London Kensington Hotel is light and modern, with free toiletries, tea and coffee making facilities, flat-screen TVs. Decorated with modern art, the WestEleven Restaurant serves a breakfast buffet every morning. The stylish Avenue Bar & Lounge is set within the lobby and offers an á la carte menu, a wide selection of drinks, and computer terminals with internet access. Shepherd’s Bush Rail and Underground Station and the lovely Holland Park are just a 5-minute walk from the hotel. Hyde Park is either a 25-minute walk or a short underground ride away.

name: The Dilly
description: The rooms of The Dilly feature private bathrooms with bathrobes and cozy slippers. Guests can enjoy free newspapers, a refrigerator, and 24-hour room service. The Dilly is just 10 minutes walk from the shops of Oxford Street and Bond Street, while Piccadilly Circus is less than a 5-minute walk. Leicester Square and Covent Garden are both within 10 minutes on foot. The Health Club at The Dilly has a steam room, and guests can exercise in the gym and on the squash courts. The Dilly also features a dance studio available for private hire or dance lessons. Tea is also served with child-friendly menus for the whole family to enjoy.

name: Norfolk Towers Paddington
description: Norfolk Towers Hotel is a 2-minute walk from Paddington Train Station, with access to the Heathrow Express 15-minute service and links to the main landmarks of the city. The air-conditioned, comfortably furnished rooms have private bathrooms, a flat-screen cable TV and soundproofing. Free WiFi is available throughout the building. Norfolk Towers Hotel has comfortable lounges, which overlook a communal garden .

name: nhow London
description: nhow London has a restaurant, a fitness center and bar in London. Among the facilities at this property are a 24-hour front desk and room service, along with bike rental and free WiFi throughout the property. Private parking can be arranged at an extra charge. All rooms are fitted with air conditioning, a flat-screen TV with satellite channels, a kettle, a shower, a hairdryer and a desk. At the hotel rooms are equipped with a wardrobe and a private bathroom. Continental breakfast options are available each morning at nhow London. The accommodations offers a terrace. St Paul's Cathedral is 1.4 mi from nhow London, while Brick Lane is 1.6 mi from the property. The nearest airport is London City Airport, 7.5 mi from the hotel.

name: Hilton London Metropole
description: Hilton London Metropole has an executive lounge. The hotel is a 15-minute walk from Oxford Street, and just 1969 feet from Paddington Station. The rooms at Hilton London Metropole have LCD TVs with wireless internet access. All rooms feature a private bathroom with toiletries, tea/coffee making facilities and air conditioning. Hilton London Metropole is a 2-minute walk from Edgware Road Underground Station. Madame Tussauds is a 15-minute stroll away, and leafy Hyde Park is just half a mile away.

name: Novotel London Greenwich
description: Neighboring Greenwich Train/DLR Station, the 4-star Novotel London Greenwich is just 10 minutes' drive from the O2 Arena. This modern hotel offers private onsite parking and features a fitness center, a stylish restaurant, and spacious bedrooms. The bright bedrooms have air cooling systems, a flat-screen TV with movies, a work desk, and tea and coffee making facilities. All rooms have a private bathroom with complimentary toiletries and a hairdryer. Free WiFi is accessible throughout. Featuring colorful artwork, Gourmet Bar at Novotel Greenwich serves an international menu. Room service is available from 07:00 to 21:30. The vibrant Gourmet Bar offers beverages and light snacks. The modern leisure complex at the Novotel London Greenwich features a fully equipped fitness center, a steam room, and a relaxation area. The hotel is a 10-minute walk from Greenwich Park and the Royal Observatory. Canary Wharf is a 15-minute drive away and Greenwich Pier can be reached after a 5-minute walk.

name: The Baileys Hotel London
description: The Bailey’s Hotel London Kensington is an elegant 19th-century Grade II listed building centrally located in heart of Kensington with in a 10-minute walk to Hyde Park, Royal Albert Hall and iconic London museums including the Natural History Museum, the Science Museum and the Victoria and Albert Museum. London Heathrow Airport is only 45 minutes directly connected via the London Underground Gloucester Road Tube Station which is two minutes walking distance. The Bailey’s Hotel London retains many of its original Victorian features, from the magnificent grand staircase to the stained-glass windows. Spacious and welcoming, the rooms offer flat-screen TVs and an individual private bathroom with free toiletries and slippers. Complimentary bottled water, coffee, tea and biscuits are provided in the rooms and replenished daily. After a busy day, unwind in the fitness room, or in Delicious and authentic Asian cuisine at Bugis Singapore Restaurant. The restaurant serves a taste of Singaporean, Chinese and Malaysian Cuisines. The property is conveniently located between the Kensington High Street, Knightsbridge and South Kensington shopping areas. The famous Harrods Department Store can be reached in a 15-minute walk or directly by tube and the London Eye.

name: The Corner London City
description: The Corner London City is located in the City of London within 5 minutes’ walk of Aldgate East and Aldgate Tube stations with connections to the Circle, District, Hammersmith & City, and Metropolitan lines. Free high-speed WiFi is available throughout the hotel. Based around the Cubi all-in-one ‘Qbi’ pod concept, each room has a comfortable bed with a hand-made hypoallergenic NaturalMat mattress, a 32-inch flat-screen TV, UK/ EU and USB sockets and an integrated private bathroom featuring a powerful rain shower with water-saving technology, a steam-free mirror and complimentary organic toiletries. Complimentary tea and coffee is offered on floors 1 to 4. The Corner London City restaurant offers various breakfast options, an all-day menu, and a selection of tea/coffee, wine, beers, spirits and cocktails throughout the day. Meeting spaces are available on request. Shoreditch and Tower Hill can be reached in 10 minutes by foot.
