description: Mitsui Garden Hotel Gotanda / Tokyo offers top-notch services and amenities, ensuring guests experience utmost comfort.Share your photos and respond to emails at your convenience, thanks to the free Wi-Fi internet access offered by hotel.Reception services such as luggage storage and safety deposit boxes are available to accommodate your requirements. Relax and feel the warmth in the hotel's inviting lobby, featuring an enchanting on-site fireplace.Traveling with minimal baggage is achievable at Mitsui Garden Hotel Gotanda / Tokyo, as the hotel's laundromat, dry cleaning service and laundry service ensures your garments stay fresh. Room amenities feature daily housekeeping, allowing you to unwind and make the most of your visit. Minor items you neglected to bring won't cause major issues! Simply visit convenience stores to acquire what's necessary. The hotel maintains a completely smoke-free zone, providing a breathable atmosphere.Smoking is limited to specified smoking zones. Each accommodation at Mitsui Garden Hotel Gotanda / Tokyo is thoughtfully created and adorned to provide visitors with a comfortable, home-like atmosphere.In certain rooms, the hotel offers linen service, blackout curtains and air conditioning for guest convenience and satisfaction. In select rooms, guests at the hotel can enjoy top-notch in-room entertainment with television and cable TV available for their convenience.Rest assured, in a few chosen rooms, you will find the convenience of a refrigerator, bottled water, instant coffee and instant tea at your disposal.Mitsui Garden Hotel Gotanda / Tokyo offers a hair dryer and toiletries in the restrooms of specific accommodations. Embark on your holiday experience in the most ideal manner. Commence each morning of your visit with an on-site breakfast. Should you prefer not to venture out for a meal, the enticing culinary choices at hotel are always available for your satisfaction. Throughout the day and evening, grab a bite to eat from hotel's self-service vending machines whenever you please. Mitsui Garden Hotel Gotanda / Tokyo provides a superb assortment of leisure amenities for guests to enjoy. Unwind after your day by exploring the massage and find warmth and relaxation.

name: Holiday Inn Express Sant Cugat By IHG
description: Set outside the A7 Business Park and a 30-minute train journey from Barcelona, the Holiday Inn Express Sant Cugat offers free parking. This stylish hotel has rooms with flat-screen TVs. The Holiday Inn’s air-conditioned rooms are comfortable and brightly decorated. Each has tea and coffee making facilities and satellite TV channels. Free WiFi is available. A buffet breakfast is served daily and there is also a snack bar on site. The center of Sant Cugat is 0.6 mi away and has a small selection of restaurants. There is also currency exchange and luggage storage available at the 24-hour reception. Sant Joan Railway Station is just 656 feet from the Sant Cugat and the AP 7 Motorway is a 5-minute drive away.

name: Hotel Gotico
description: Hotel Gótico is 165 ft from Barcelona’s Jaume I Metro Station and a 2-minute walk from Barcelona Cathedral. It features a rooftop terrace, and stylish, air-conditioned rooms with satellite TV. Soundproof rooms are heated and feature beautiful tile floors. They have a safe and work desk, and the private bathroom comes with a hairdryer and amenities. Guests can enjoy a breakfast buffet in the Gótico hotel café-bar, which features impressive stone arches. Packed lunches can be requested and there are vending machines for drinks and snacks. There's a 24-hour front desk, and you can rent a car from the tour desk. Parking is available nearby for an extra charge. The hotel is just a 5-minute walk from La Rambla.

name: Barcelona Hotel Colonial
description: This elegant hotel is set in Barcelona’s Gothic Quarter, in an impressive, colonial, stone building with a clock tower. It is a 10-minute walk from Barcelona Cathedral and Barceloneta Beach. Hotel Colonial’s bright, air-conditioned rooms feature wooden floors. They are soundproofed and have a flat-screen TV and mini-bar. You can hire the safe, and the private bathroom comes with a hairdryer and amenities. A buffet breakfast is served in the Colonial Hotel café. Guests can relax with a free newspaper in the stylish lounge, with its white leather sofas, where Wi-Fi is free of charge. Barcelona Hotel Colonial has a tour desk. Barcelona Marina and the boutiques of the trendy Born district are 5 minutes’ walk away. Parking is also available within a 5-minute walk of the property.

name: InterContinental Barcelona By IHG
neighborhood: Placa d'Espanya - Magic Fountain - Fira de Barcelona
description: Located 656 feet from Barcelona’s Magic Fountain, the elegant InterContinental Barcelona, an IHG Hotel offers spacious rooms with a flat-screen TV and hydromassage shower. Offering fantastic views over Barcelona, the hotel’s 173 Rooftop Terrace features an outdoor pool, sun loungers, and a dining area where guests can enjoy Mediterranean cuisine and a selection of drinks and cocktails. Arrel Restaurant pays homage to the land and the produce it provides throughout all seasons of the year. The restaurant features an open kitchen serving small portions to share, buffet breakfasts and lunch and dinner service. Quirat Restaurant is an exclusive space that will offer an interpretation of the land and its products through a menu of dishes that responds to the different seasons, designed exclusively for the restaurant by a Chef with 1 Michelin Star. Enjoy an unforgettable dinner in the most exclusive of our restaurants. Gebre Cocktails and More and, in addition to the cocktail classics, it will offer a menu of artisan signature cocktails that will try to convey a very specific sensory experience connected to the world of the land that surrounds us. There is free WiFi available in public areas and in rooms and the lobby area at InterContinental Barcelona, an IHG Hotel features a free internet point. The spa has a water circuit, a dry sauna, a hammam, hot tub, gym, and 6 treatment cabins. From the hotel, Barcelona’s historic center can be easily reached by bus or metro. Poble Sec and Espanya Metro Stations are both 1640 feet away. Poble Espanyol and the Joan Miró Foundation are 656 feet away.

name: Best Western Plus Hotel Alfa Aeropuerto
description: The hotel offers 2 spacious suites, 44 comfortable double rooms, 12 triple rooms, 34 quadruple rooms ideal for families, and 8 cozy single rooms. All rooms feature air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and modern amenities. Guests enjoy free WiFi, flat-screen TVs, and soundproofing for a relaxing stay. It features an indoor swimming pool, fully equipped fitness center, à la carte restaurant, and lounge bar with a terrace overlooking the garden. Additional services include a 24-hour front desk and secure on-site parking available for guests. The modern restaurant serves traditional Catalan, Mediterranean, and American dishes. Breakfast options include continental, buffet, gluten-free choices, and an early bird express breakfast. Located 2.9 mi from Barcelona El Prat Airport, the hotel offers a complimentary shuttle service running between both airport terminals and the hotel from 5:00 a.m. to 10:30 a.m. and from 6:15 p.m. to 12:30 a.m. The Cruise Pier at Portnou terminal is 3.4 mi away, and the city center is 5.6 mi from the hotel. Easily accessible by metro, with the nearest station just 2133 feet away, or by bus from the station directly in front of the hotel.

name: ibis Styles Barcelona SJ Despi
description: ibis Styles Barcelona Sant Joan Despi is located by the AP-2 Motorway, with easy access to Avinguda Diagonal and the C-32 Ring Road. It features a seasonal outdoor pool, and free WiFi in the entire hotel. Facilities at the ibis Styles Barcelona Sant Joan Despi include private parking. As well as a bar and restaurant, there is a large terrace and garden. Rooms all include air conditioning, satellite TV and a work desk. The Camp Nou Football Stadium is a direct tram journey from the hotel. ibis Styles Barcelona Sant Joan Despi is also well located for the Congress Center and the Porta Diagonal Business Center. A direct bus leads to El Prat Airport.

name: Hotel Del Mar
description: Hotel del Mar is set in a listed building just 2625 feet from the seafront and Barceloneta Metro Station. It is a 5-minute walk from the trendy Born neighborhood and Ciutadella Park. The air-conditioned rooms at Hotel del Mar have flat-screen satellite TV. There is a private bathroom with a hairdryer and amenities, and some rooms have a private balcony. A safe is also available with a surcharge. Hotel del Mar has a 24-hour front desk. Barcelona’s França Train Station is a 5-minute walk away, and you can walk to Barcelona Cathedral and Maremagnum Shopping Center in 10 minutes. Parking is available 5 minutes' walk from the property.

name: Sercotel Hotel Rosellon
description: Located 984 feet from Sagrada Familia, Sercotel Hotel Rosellon offers 4-star accommodations in Barcelona and features a bar. With a terrace, the 4-star hotel has air-conditioned rooms (calefaction works in winter and the cold air conditioner in summer) with free WiFi, each with a private bathroom. The accommodations provides room service, a concierge service and organizing tours for guests. Guest rooms at the hotel are equipped with a flat-screen TV with satellite channels and a safety deposit box. At Sercotel Hotel Rosellon each room comes with bed linen and towels. Guests at the accommodations can enjoy a buffet breakfast. Speaking Catalan, German, English and Spanish at the 24-hour front desk, staff are always on hand to help. La Pedrera is 1 mi from Sercotel Hotel Rosellon, while Casa Batllo is 1.2 mi away. The nearest airport is Barcelona El Prat Airport, 9.3 mi from the hotel.

name: Hotel Rialto
description: Located just off famous La Rambla Boulevard in central Barcelona, Hotel Rialto occupies a historic building where the artist Joan Miró was born. It offers air-conditioned rooms with flat-screen TV. Each room at the Rialto Hotel Barcelona has wooden floors and a simple, functional design. The modern bathrooms include basic toiletries. Safes are available to rent. Guests can enjoy a varied buffet breakfast and delicious Mediterranean meals at the Rialto’s Miró restaurant. There are also many restaurants and lively bars in the surrounding streets. Hotel Rialto’s 24-hour reception offers information about the city. The Boquería Market and Barcelona Cathedral are both within 1312 feet. Liceu Metro Station is only 984 feet away, and Plaza Catalunya is a 10-minute walk from the hotel.

name: Barcelo Sants
neighborhood: FC Barcelona Stadium - Les Corts - Sants Train Station
description: Located above Barcelona Sants Train Station, Barceló Sants offers a subtle outer space theme throughout. Minimalist rooms feature free Wi-Fi, rain showers, and large windows with city views. Air-conditioned rooms feature modern décor and designer furniture. Each has an iPod dock, flat-screen TV, and tea and coffee making facilities. The bathroom comes with a hairdryer. This design hotel includes a fitness center. The hotel has the Oxygen restaurant, where you can enjoy a delicious, complete and healthy breakfast buffet. It also has the Orbital Bar, the ideal space to disconnect from daily life; a fun and perfect place to have a delicious cocktail with your partner or to hang out and have a drink with colleagues after a long working day. Sants Train and Metro Station offers direct access to Barcelona Airport, and the historic city center, 2.2 mi away. There are also high-speed AVE services to Madrid and international trains. There is a 24-hour front desk, and you can hire a car from the tour desk. On-site parking is available for an extra charge and the hotel has a Wi-Fi zone.

name: H10 Metropolitan
description: Featuring a rooftop terrace with a bar and chill-out pool, H10 Metropolitan is in Barcelona, 295 ft from Plaça Catalunya. It showcases a tapas restaurant and free Wi-Fi. Each room has a flat-screen satellite TV, air conditioning, coffee machine and a minibar. The private bathroom comes with a hairdryer and bathrobes. The H10 Metropolitan is just a 2-minute walk from Paseo de Gracia Avenue, with its boutique and designer fashion stores. The hotel is just under half a mile from Gaudi's La Pedrera, and you can walk to Las Ramblas in 3 minutes. You can reach La Sagrada Familia in about 10 minutes by metro.

name: Hotel SB Diagonal Zero 4 Sup
neighborhood: Vila Olimpica - San Marti - Forum - Poblenou - Beach Front
description: Hotel SB Diagonal Zero Barcelona is opposite Barcelona’s International Convention Center and Barcelona's Forum Auditorium. It has a spa, a gym, a seasonal panoramic pool and a solarium on the hotel rooftop. There is free access to the hotel gym. The spa is only for guests over 14 years old, and includes a Turkish bath and Finnish sauna. Beauty and massage treatments are available at a surcharge. All air-conditioned rooms at the Hotel SB Diagonal Zero Barcelona have flat-screen satellite TV, free WiFi and a laptop safe. The soundproofed rooms have facilities to connect iPods. All rooms have ironing facilities, tea and coffee making facilities, and a kettle. There is a touch-screen control for lights and temperature. The private bathroom is equipped with a hairdryer, and bathrobes and slippers can be provided upon request. Please note that according to your reservation policies, a prepayment may apply. In that case, a link to process a secure online payment will be sent.

name: Sercotel Caspe
description: This design hotel is a 5-minute walk from Barcelona’s Arc de Triomf Metro Station and Estació del Nord Bus Station. It has a gym, and offers free Wi-Fi and free bottled water. Rooms at the Sercotel Caspe are air-conditioned and soundproofed. They feature satellite TV, a mini-bar and safe. The private bathroom comes with a hairdryer and amenities. The Sercotel Caspe has an outdoor terrace, an attractive restaurant and a café-bar. Room service is also available. The hotel is a short walk from Gaudí's buildings on Passeig de Gràcia Boulevard. Plaza Catalunya is approximately 20 minutes' walk away. There is a tour desk and 24-hour reception. Car hire is available and there is on-site parking for an extra charge.

name: H10 MADISON
description: H10 Madison 4* Sup has an outdoor swimming pool, terrace, a restaurant and bar in Barcelona. With free WiFi, this 4-star hotel offers room service and a 24-hour front desk. The property is 1.2 miles from Barceloneta Beach, and within 400 yards of the city center. The hotel will provide guests with air-conditioned rooms offering a desk, a coffee machine, a minibar, a safety deposit box, a flat-screen TV and a private bathroom with a shower. All rooms have an electric tea pot, while some rooms also offer a patio and others also have city views. All rooms feature a closet. Buffet and à la carte breakfast options are available at H10 Madison 4* Sup. There's an in-house snack bar and guests can also use the business area. Popular points of interest near the accommodation include Palau de la Musica Catalana, Barcelona Cathedral and Santa Maria del Mar. Barcelona-El Prat Airport is 8.1 miles from the property.

name: Novotel Barcelona Cornellà
description: Novotel Cornellà is located just outside central Barcelona, a 10-minute walk from RCD Espanyol's Football Stadium and 5.6 mi from El Prat Airport. It offers an outdoor pool, free Wi-Fi and private parking. The hotel has a pioneer system of mobile check-in and check-out that allows guests to check in anywhere in the hall. This Novotel’s outdoor swimming pool is set within a garden area. A towel service and bar is available by the pool in summer. The hotel's children's corner includes a playground and the access to the large terrace of the restaurant. The rooms are fully soundproofed and air conditioned. All are equipped with satellite TV and coffee and tea-making facilities. The on-site Binomio restaurant offers mediterranean and fusion cuisine with fresh products. A range of cocktails and snacks are available at the bar. The hotel is 5 minutes' walk away from Almeda de Cornellà Train Station, which takes you to Barcelona city center in 15 minutes. Cornellà Convention Center is less than 5 minutes' walk away.

name: Ronda House
neighborhood: La Rambla - El Raval - El Poblesec
description: Ronda House is set just off Ronda Sant Antoni Avenue, 10 minutes’ walk from Las Ramblas. This hotel has a restaurant and rooms with satellite TV. The Ronda features bright, simple décor. Its air-conditioned rooms have fully equipped private bathrooms. A daily buffet breakfast is served in the Ronda’s café which includes a variety of coffees and pastries. Guests can enjoy the on-site restaurant and the bar. The MACBA Art Gallery is just 5 minutes’ walk from the hotel. Sant Antoni Metro Station is 656 feet from the hotel and connects guests to sights such as Gaudí’s Sagrada Familía and Casa Batlló in less than 15 minutes.

name: Gran Hotel Barcino
description: Surrounded by the fascinating streets of the Gothic Quarter, this elegant hotel is located right at Barcelona’s historic heart – just a short walk from the cathedral and Las Ramblas. The Gran Hotel Barcino 4 Estrellas SUPERIOR is set in a street which runs off the magnificent square of Sant Jaume, home to both the Catalonian government and the city council. The narrow streets which surround the hotel are full of fashionable shops, historic sites and museums, such as the Picasso Museum. See the city’s many sights then return for a good night’s sleep in your traditional-style room. The rooms feature marble floors and air conditioning.

name: Barcelona House
description: Barcelona House Hotel is in Barcelona’s Gothic Quarter, 260 ft from the Ramblas. The hotel has modern, air-conditioned rooms with hardwood floors, free wired internet and a flat-screen TV. Barcelona Cathedral and the Boquería Market are just over a quarter mile away. The port and Maremagnum Shopping Center are a 10-minute walk from the hotel. You can walk to Barceloneta Beach in 20 minutes or take a bus. Rooms are also heated and have a safe. The private bathrooms include a hairdryer. There are many bars, restaurants and galleries near the Barcelona House. The Picasso Museum and fashionable Borne district are a 10-minute walk away. There is a 24-hour front desk and luggage storage is available.

name: Eurostars Grand Marina Hotel
description: Set within the World Trade Center building, this 5-star design hotel overlooks Barcelona’s port and is a 5-minute walk from La Rambla. It features a seasonal rooftop pool, a gym and a spacious terrace. The Eurostars Grand Marina Hotel GL offers modern rooms with wooden flooring and warm-colored fabrics. A flat-screen TV with satellite channels and a spacious work desk are featured in each room. A pillow menu is also available. The chic Grand Marina restaurant serves Mediterranean meals prepared with seasonal ingredients, while the lobby bar features exotic cocktails. In the mornings, a rich breakfast is served on the terrace, weather permitting. The Marina GL's gym offers cardiovascular equipment and free weights. Massage services are available. Drassanes Metro Station, providing links to the rest of the city, is just 1640 feet from the hotel while Barcelona Airport is 9.3 mi away.

name: Majestic Hotel & Spa Barcelona Gl
neighborhood: Las Ramblas North - Paseo de Gracia
description: Majestic Hotel & Spa Barcelona GL offers luxurious accommodations in a neoclassical building on Passeig de Gràcia. It features a spa and an outdoor unheated plunge-pool on the rooftop with amazing views of the city. The Majestic Hotel Barcelona maintains its original façade and its stylish, modern rooms feature attractive, classic décor. Each has air conditioning and a flat-screen TV. The apartments are located at an independent building next to the hotel. SOLC Restaurant, located on the first floor, is a tribute to catalan and traditional cuisine. There is also a piano bar, Bar del Majestic, with live music in the evenings. During the summer guests can enjoy Dolce Vitae Cocktail Bar, which is located by the pool and overlooks Barcelona The spa features steam baths, a sauna and offers a range of treatments. There is also a fitness center. Gaudí’s Casa Batlló is just 328 feet from Majestic Barcelona. Plaza de Catalunya and Las Ramblas are just 10 minutes’ walk away.

name: Catalonia Sagrada Familia Hotel
description: A 15-minute walk from Gaudí's Sagrada Família, Catalonia Sagrada Familia is just 984 feet from Clot Metro and Train Station. It features a restaurant, a seasonal outdoor pool and a gym. The Catalonia Sagrada Familia features traditional, bright décor and its rooms are have a desk, a mini fridge with complimentary water and a safety deposit box. Free Wi-Fi access is available. All hotel rooms have smart TVs, which are equipped with Chromecast app. The restaurant serves a range of Catalan and Mediterranean cuisine, as well as a buffet breakfast. The café-bar offers a selection of drinks and snacks throughout the day and there is also a bar. Car hire is available on site, and staff at the Catalonia Sagrada Familia’s 24-hour reception can provide information on Barcelona and its many attractions. The hotel is 656 feet from the Torre Agbar Tower. Clot Metro Station connects guests to the city center in 4 stops and the airport train also stops here.

name: Catalonia Atenas Hotel
description: Set 3 metro stops from central Barcelona, the Atenas Catalonia has a rooftop swimming pool, offering views of the nearby Torre Agbar and Sagrada Familia. It also features free WiFi, a gym and a spa with a Turkish bath. The bright rooms of Hotel Atenas Barcelona have simple décor with wooden flooring. Each has air conditioning, a mini fridge and satellite TV. The hotel's buffet breakfast features a show kitchen and its Gastrobar offers cocktails and Mediterranean dishes. You will also find a pool on the 11th floor, with spectacular views of the city. The Sagrada Familia is just over one mile from the hotel, while Glòries shopping center can be reached in 15 minutes by foot. The Catalonia Atenas has a convenient left luggage service, on-site parking, and is 2 minutes’ walk from Clot Metro Station; and 656 feet from Clot Train Station; here you can take a direct train to Barcelona Airport.

name: Hotel Ciutadella Barcelona
description: Featuring beautiful, stylish rooms Hotel Ciutadella Barcelona has an ideal central setting within 320 yards of Santa María del Mar Church, Ciutadella Park and Barceloneta Metro Station. It has easy access to the historic Born and Gothic districts. Each air-conditioned room at Hotel Ciutadella Barcelona has contemporary décor. All rooms have a TV and a private bathroom. Bars and cafés can be found along Passeig del Born, 650 ft away. There are several seafood restaurants along the seaside Passeig de Joan de Borbó, a 5-minute walk from the Hotel Ciutadella. The nearest beaches can be reached in 15 minutes by foot. Plaza de Catalunya and Las Ramblas are within 1 mile of the hotel.

name: EL AVENIDA PALACE
neighborhood: Las Ramblas North - Paseo de Gracia
description: El Avenida Palace Hotel is set on Barcelona’s Gran Via, 5 minutes’ walk from Plaza Catalunya, La Rambla and Paseo de Gracia. Its grand interior features an impressive staircase and marble columns. Many famous guests have stayed at the Hotel Avenida Palace, including the Beatles in 1965. The elegant air-conditioned rooms feature satellite TV and carpeted or parquet floors. Rooms are soundproofed and have a mini-bar, work desk and a safe. The hotel's panoramic rooftop terrace offers views over the city, a sun deck and a swimming pool. There is also a lounge bar, a 24-hour front desk and both free WiFi and room service are available.

name: NH Collection Barcelona Podium
description: NH Collection Barcelona Pódium offers stylish, modern accommodations in a quiet area of central Barcelona. It has free WiFi, a sauna, gym and roof terrace with swimming pool and city views. Bedrooms at the hotel are spacious and air conditioned. They all have a choice of pillows, a mini-bar and satellite TV. Each room comes with a Barcelona city guidebook. NH Collection Barcelona Pódium combines a 19th-Century façade with modern interior design. It is surrounded by other Modernist buildings in Barcelona’s Eixample district. The hotel is set 2625 feet from Plaça Catalunya and the Ramblas, near the city’s Gothic Quarter. Ciutadella Park and the Olympic Port are also within walking distance. The NH Collection Podium Hotel has good access to all parts of the city by public transport. Arc de Triomf Metro Station is just 656 feet from the hotel. NH Collection Barcelona Pódium's restaurant serves Mediterranean cuisine and there is also a lounge bar. A healthy breakfast is available in the mornings. The restaurant is closed during summer months.

name: Suizo Hotel
description: This hotel, located in the Gothic heart of Barcelona near the Cathedral, enjoys an ideal location for visiting the sights of this exciting city. Hotel Suizo has modern facilities and comfortable rooms with satellite TV and air conditioning. Watch the world go by from the bedroom with a balcony overlooking the streets of Barcelona’s Gothic quarter, or relax in the Suizo’s lounge. Wander in the labyrinth of narrow streets surrounding the impressive Barcelona Cathedral, just 200 yards from the hotel. A short walk takes you to the famous Ramblas, with its colorful street performers and sidewalk cafes. Walk down to the old port or the beach, or take the metro to visit other areas of the city. A metro station next to the Hotel Suizo makes getting around on public transportation easy.

name: H10 Raco Del Pi
description: Featuring 3-star accommodations, H10 Raco del Pi Boutique hotel is set in Barcelona, 1.4 mi from Sant Sebastian Beach and 1.4 mi from Somorrostro Beach. With a terrace, the 3-star hotel has air-conditioned rooms with free WiFi, each with a private bathroom. The property is 1312 feet from the city center and 1.3 mi from Sant Miquel Beach. At the hotel, all rooms come with a wardrobe and a flat-screen TV. Every room includes a safety deposit box, while certain rooms will provide you with a balcony and others also provide guests with city views. At H10 Raco del Pi Boutique hotel rooms include bed linen and towels. A continental breakfast is available every morning at the accommodations. There is an on-site snack bar and guests can also make use of the business area. Staff speak English and Spanish at the 24-hour front desk. Popular points of interest near H10 Raco del Pi Boutique hotel include Plaça Catalunya, Tivoli Theater and Passeig de Gracia. The nearest airport is Barcelona El Prat Airport, 8.1 mi from the hotel.

name: Hilton Diagonal Mar Barcelona
neighborhood: Vila Olimpica - San Marti - Forum - Poblenou - Beach Front
description: Hilton Diagonal Mar Barcelona has a seasonal outdoor swimming pool, fitness center, a terrace and restaurant in Barcelona. This 4-star hotel offers an ATM and a concierge service. The property has a 24-hour front desk, airport transportation, room service and free WiFi. Guests at the hotel can enjoy a buffet breakfast. The area is popular for cycling, and bike rental and car rental are available at Hilton Diagonal Mar Barcelona. Llevant is a 5-minute walk from the accommodation, while Port Olimpic is 2.6 miles from the property. Barcelona-El Prat Airport is 11 miles away.

name: Holiday Inn Express Barcelona City 22@ By IHG
neighborhood: Vila Olimpica - San Marti - Forum - Poblenou - Beach Front
description: Friendly Barcelona Hotel with free WiFi, free Continental Buffet Breakfast and easy access to the beach and city sights. Holiday Inn Express® Barcelona City 22@ hotel is located in the hip 22@Barcelona business zone, formerly an industrial district of Poblenou. Llacuna Metro Station is four minutes walk from the hotel. The B-10, also known as Ronda Litoral, Coastal Ring Road is minutes away by car and on-site parking is available. It’s a 25-minute drive to Barcelona El Prat Airport (BCN). Unwind on Mar Bella Beach, a short stroll from the hotel. On the nearby Rambla del Poblenou, restaurants offering catalan and international food are popular. Barcelona attractions, like Sagrada Familia and Park Guell, are within easy reach by public transportation. Westfield Glories Mall is only 10 minutes walking from our door and Diagonal Mar Mall less than 10 minutes away by taxi. Bright, colorful guest rooms offer free WiFi to keep you connected. Enjoy our family rooms with double bed and sofa bed available for a max. of 2 adults and 2 children. Get set for the day with an Express Start Breakfast buffet free to all our guests. In the evening, simply step outside the door to experience Barcelona's lively night out.

name: Hesperia Sant Just
description: Hesperia Barcelona Sant Just is located a 20-minute drive from the center of Barcelona. It features a gym, restaurant and free Wi-Fi access. The spacious rooms at the Hesperia Sant Just have king-size beds and flat-screen TV’s. All rooms offer a pillow menu. There is also on-site car rental. The hotel is a 15-minute drive from Barcelona’s El Prat Airport and offers a free service for printing boarding passes. Barcelona city center can be reached in 20 minutes, via the B-23 Motorway. People under 18 years of age can only stay if they present an authorization granted by one of their parents or legal guardians, or if they are accompanied by them

name: Moxy Barcelona
neighborhood: Placa d'Espanya - Magic Fountain - Fira de Barcelona
description: Moxy Barcelona features a seasonal outdoor swimming pool, fitness center, a terrace and bar in Barcelona. This 4-star hotel offers room service, a 24-hour front desk and free WiFi. The property provides a business center, a concierge service and currency exchange for guests. The hotel will provide guests with air-conditioned rooms with a desk, an electric tea pot, a safety deposit box, a flat-screen TV, a balcony and a private bathroom with a shower. A buffet, continental or gluten-free breakfast is available at the property. At Moxy Barcelona you'll find a restaurant serving American, Mediterranean and Local cuisine. Vegetarian, vegan and gluten-free options can also be requested. Sants Railway Station is a 6-minute walk from the accommodation, while Magic Fountain of Montjuic is 0.8 miles away. Barcelona-El Prat Airport is 6.8 miles from the property.

name: Aparthotel Mariano Cubi
description: Recently renovated. Aparthotel Mariano Cubi can be found just 200 metres from Barcelona’s Avinguda Diagonal and 15 minutes' walk from Passeig de Gracia. It offers air-conditioned rooms with free Wi-Fi and some have a kitchenette. All spacious rooms have wooden floors, satellite TV, and a desk. The Aparthotel Mariano Cubi's tour desk can help guests plan their stay in Barcelona. There is also a free business centre with internet access. The area has a wide range of shops. Fontana Metro station is about 500 metres away and Gràcia FGC Station is only 150 metres away. From there you can get to Plaça Catalunya and the Ramblas. Gaudí's La Pedrera is about 20 minutes’ walk away.y.

name: Pestana Arena Barcelona
neighborhood: Placa d'Espanya - Magic Fountain - Fira de Barcelona
description: Pestana Arena Barcelona is less than 5 minutes’ walk from Barcelona’s Plaza Espanya and Fira Exhibition Center. It offers a gym, sauna and modern, air-conditioned rooms with free wired internet access. Some rooms offers free use of the Maritimo Meeting Room, up to 12 people, for private meetings. Pestana Arena Barcelona is just 3 minutes’ walk from Las Arenas Shopping Center and you can walk to Sants Station in 8 minutes. You can get to the Rambla in 5 minutes from Plaza Espanya Metro. Rooms feature parquet floors and stylish décor. Each one has work desk, a pillow menu and an LCD TV with satellite channels. “The breakfast buffet is served next to the bar-café and offers gluten-free options. In the afternoon, our bar offers a simple and tasty menu with a variety of snacks and delicious cocktails. The area features a cozy and relaxing terrace, open all day”. The hotel offers parking (for a fee) for its guests.

name: Kimpton Vividora Hotel By IHG
description: The Kimpton Vividora Hotel, an IHG Hotel is located in the Gothic Quarter of Barcelona, ​​a short walk from the Plaça Catalunya metro station and in the Portal del Angel shopping district and 10 minutes from the Paseo de Gracia shopping area. This elegantly designed property features a Mediterranean restaurant, a cafeteria, a terrace with a bar and a rooftop pool. All rooms feature contemporary décor. All have a yoga mat, tea and coffee making facilities, smart TV, mini-bar and exclusive bathrobe.In addition, the hotel offers the Forgot it? We got it! Which makes available to its guests a whole series of amenities and accessories that will further improve their stay. The gastronomic space of the Kimpton Vividora Hotel, an IHG chain hotel, has a rooftop terrace with magnificent views of the city, pool, sun loungers, cocktails and snacks, Terraza de Vivi. The Fauna restaurant located on the first floor offers Mediterranean cuisine with Catalan roots in a room reminiscent of a characteristic Eixample apartment. Got Coffee & Cocktails overlooks the street and serves locally sourced coffee, wine and signature cocktails. This gastronomic space is a place where guests feel at home. Every day from 6pm the free Social Wine Hour is offered to all guests with an open bar of local wines. This pet-friendly hotel is close to attractions such as Barcelona Cathedral, Plaza de Catalunya and the Palau de la Música Catalana. Barcelona-El Prat Airport, located 9.3 mi away, is the closest. Our clients say that this part of Barcelona is their favorite, according to independent comments.

name: Ramblas Hotel
neighborhood: La Rambla - El Raval - El Poblesec
description: Ramblas Hotel is located on Barcelona’s famous Las Ramblas, just 1640 feet from Port Vell Harbor. It offers free Wi-Fi, a 24-hour reception and air-conditioned rooms with a balcony or terrace. Each bright room at the Hotel Ramblas includes satellite TV, a mini-bar and a safe. The private bathrooms come with a hairdryer and toiletries. Some rooms have views over the Ramblas. The Ramblas Hotel has a lobby bar and a charming café with original Modernista design and a pavement terrace. Breakfast is included in all room rates. Located at the edge of Barcelona’s Gothic Quarter, the hotel is a 10-minute walk from Barcelona Cathedral. Liceu Metro Station is just 820 feet away.

name: H10 Cubik 4* Sup
description: Featuring free WiFi throughout the property, H10 Cubik offers accommodations in Barcelona. The hotel has a seasonal outdoor pool and terrace, and guests can enjoy a drink at the bar. Rooms come with a flat-screen TV. Some units include a seating area for your convenience. Every room comes with a private bathroom. There is a 24-hour front desk at the property. Sitges is 22 mi from H10 Cubik, while Calella is 29 mi from the property. The nearest airport is El Prat Airport, 8.1 mi from the property.

name: Hotel Àmbit Barcelona
description: Located 1312 feet from Barcelona’s Plaça Catalunya, Hotel Àmbit Barcelona offers modern, air-conditioned rooms with free WiFi. Urquinaona Metro Station is a 3-minute walk away. Every room is fitted with a flat-screen TV, mini-bar and private bathroom with a hairdryer and free toiletries. Some rooms have a terrace or balcony. You will find a 24-hour front desk at the property, where staff can help with bike hire, car hire and tourist information. Free coffee is available 24 hours on the first floor. The shopping street, Portal de l'Angel, is 1640 feet from Hotel Àmbit Barcelona, while Barcelona Cathedral is 2625 feet away. There are many restaurants in the area.

name: Catalonia Avinyo
description: Located 656 feet from Las Ramblas in central Barcelona, Catalonia Avinyo features a rooftop pool and gym. It offers chic, air-conditioned rooms with satellite TV and free Wi-Fi. Rooms are decorated in a modern, minimalist style with large wall photos. They include a mini-bar, safe and telephone. All hotel rooms have smart TVs, which are equipped with Chromecast app. The modern bathrooms have a shower and a hairdryer. Barceloneta Beach is a 15-minute walk from Hotel Catalonia Avinyo. The Liceu and Jaume I Metro Stations are just 984 feet away and Barcelona Cathedral is 4 minutes' walk away. The Avinyo’s central location means there are many shops, bars and restaurants close to the hotel. Bicycle and car hire can be arranged at the tour desk.

name: Casa Lit Barcelona
neighborhood: La Rambla - El Raval - El Poblesec
description: Located 1312 feet from Las Ramblas, Casa Lit Barcelona offers a rooftop terrace with city and sea views. The rooms include free Wi-Fi and flat-screen satellite TV. The hotel has a courtyard, where you can enjoy a buffet breakfast. Each open-plan room has air conditioning. Casa Lit Barcelona have a 24-hour reception, where staff can arrange restaurant bookings, tickets for shows or guided tours of Barcelona. Free city maps are also available. The hotel is located at the bottom of the lively Raval district, just 2297 feet from Barcelona Port. Drassanes and Paral•lel Metro Stations are both within 984 feet.

name: Catalonia Born
description: Set in a 19th-century building in Barcelona’s El Born district, Catalonia Born offers a rooftop pool, an attractive central courtyard and free Wi-Fi. Arc de Triomf Metro Station is 820 feet away. The classic rooms at Catalonia Born Hotel come with an elegant marble bathroom. They also include a satellite TV and centrally controlled heating or air conditioning, depending on the season. A buffet breakfast is served, and the snack bar is open for lunch and dinner. There is also a bar in the lobby. Located minutes from França Train Station, the hotel is well-connected to the rest of the city and its surroundings. Car rental is also available from the tour desk.

name: Four Points By Sheraton Barcelona Diagonal
neighborhood: Vila Olimpica - San Marti - Forum - Poblenou - Beach Front
description: Four Points by Sheraton Barcelona Diagonal is located 1148 feet from the Glòries Shopping Center, in the modern 22@ district of Barcelona. It offers a Mediterranean restaurant and soundproofed rooms with free Wi-Fi and TV. The rooms at Four Points Barcelona Diagonal are bright and spacious, with wooden floors. Each room features an elegant bathroom equipped with a hairdryer and toiletries. Rooms on the upper floors offer excellent views, some of which include the Sagrada Familia. The restaurant, The Gastro Corner, serves traditional Spanish cuisine. A varied buffet breakfast is offered daily from 6:30 AM to 11:00 AM. Enjoy local craft beers, snacks, and the best sports screenings at the sports bar. Four Points by Sheraton Barcelona Diagonal is located 1969 feet from the colorful Torre Glòries, designed by Jean Nouvel. The nearby Rambla del Poblenou has numerous bars and restaurants, and Bogatell Beach is just a 15-minute walk away. Poblenou metro station is 1640 feet away.

name: Hotel SB Glow 4 Sup
neighborhood: Vila Olimpica - San Marti - Forum - Poblenou - Beach Front
description: Located in Barcelona, 1.3 miles from Bogatell Beach, Hotel SB Glow 4 Sup has accommodations with a fitness center, private parking, a shared lounge and a terrace. With a seasonal outdoor swimming pool, the 4-star hotel has air-conditioned rooms with free WiFi, each with a private bathroom. Guests can use the sauna and the hammam, or enjoy city views. All guest rooms at the hotel come with a flat-screen TV with satellite channels and a safety deposit box. The rooms will provide guests with a desk and a coffee machine. Guests at Hotel SB Glow 4 Sup can enjoy a buffet breakfast. At the accommodation you'll find a restaurant serving Mediterranean and Grill/Bbq cuisine. Vegetarian, dairy-free and vegan options can also be requested. The area is popular for cycling, and bike rental is available at Hotel SB Glow 4 Sup. Languages spoken at the 24-hour front desk include Catalan, English, Spanish and French. Sagrada Familia is one mile from the hotel, while Palau de la Musica Catalana is 1.8 miles from the property. Barcelona-El Prat Airport is 9.3 miles away.

name: W Hotel Barcelona
description: W Barcelona is a striking sail-like structure next to Barceloneta Beach, offering breathtaking design and fantastic views over Barcelona. It features a spa, infinity pool, rooftop bar and luxurious rooms. The W Hotel’s impressive rooms feature avant-garde design and views of the Mediterranean or the city. They all come with a chaise lounge, flat-screen TV, iPod docking station and rainfall shower. The W has a stylish gourmet restaurant, FIRE; and you can enjoy a cocktail with panoramic views over the city and sea at NOXE rooftop bar, located on the 26th floor. Cocktails are also offered in the W Lounge. The SALT Beach Club & Restaurant has a menu of innovative burgers accompanied by specially designed cocktails to live the ultimate burger by the beach experience. There are two pools, SUN Deck and WET Deck, which are surrounded by decking with loungers. The hotel also has direct beach access. Facilities at the W Spa include a hot tub, sauna and steam room, and a brand new relaxation area, GETAWAY, is available from 2018. A wide range of relaxation and beauty treatments is available. The W is 20 minutes’ walk from Barceloneta Metro Station, and buses stop outside the hotel.

name: Catalonia Barcelona Beach
neighborhood: Vila Olimpica - San Marti - Forum - Poblenou - Beach Front
description: Located on the seafront in Diagonal Mar, the Catalonia Barcelona Beach (formerly Hesperia del Mar) features stylish rooms with free WiFi and satellite TV. It is a 5-minute walk from the CCIB and Diagonal Mar Shopping Center. Air-conditioned rooms at Catalonia Barcelona Beach come with flat-screen TV, safe, and a mini-bar. The private bathroom comes with a bath, hairdryer and free toiletries. The Ramblas and Barcelona’s Gothic Quarter are only 3.1 mi from the hotel. Poble Nou Metro Station is a 10-minute walk from the hotel.

name: Hotel Sb Icaria Barcelona
neighborhood: Vila Olimpica - San Marti - Forum - Poblenou - Beach Front
description: Located 984 feet from Barcelona’s Nova Icaria Beach, Hotel SB Icaria offers a gym, sauna and outdoor pool with sun terrace and hot tub. Rooms include free Wi-Fi and flat-screen satellite TV. The Hotel SB Icaria’s stylish modern rooms feature wooden floors and adjustable lighting. Each room has a mini-bar, safe and private bathroom with a hairdryer. The hotel’s elegant restaurant serves Mediterranean market cuisine. There is also a bar and a garden terrace. Hotel SB Icaria is located in the Olympic Port area, a 10-minute walk from Ciutadella Park and Barcelona Zoo. Ciutadella Metro Station is 2625 feet away, and is just 2 stops from Barcelona Cathedral and the historic Gothic Quarter.

name: H10 Universitat
description: Just 325 ft off Barcelona’s central Plaça Catalunya and the exciting Las Ramblas, this new hotel features a 19th-century façade with 21st-century decor and facilities. The H10 Universitat is in the cultural heart of this cosmopolitan city, allowing you to easily walk to many of the city’s unique sights. It is full of stylish, contemporary design and modern art. State-of-the-art amenities include free Wi-Fi available throughout the building.

name: INNSiDE Barcelona Apolo
neighborhood: La Rambla - El Raval - El Poblesec
description: INNSiDE by Meliá Barcelona Apolo is located at the foot of Montjuïc, 7 minutes’ walk from Barcelona’s Ramblas. It offers a 24-hour reception and air-conditioned rooms with WiFi. Refurbished in 2023, the rooms at INNSiDE by Meliá Barcelona Apolo feature smart décor and wooden floors. Each one has a flat-screen TV, mini-bar, work desk and a private bathroom with a hairdryer. The hotel serves a varied buffet breakfast every morning. There is also a snack bar serving light meals in the evenings. Parallel Metro Station is next to the hotel, connecting you with the Fira Convention Center in 2 stops.

name: Eurostars Monumental
description: This design hotel offers free WiFi and is just 1312 feet from Sagrada Família Church. Decorated in elegant neutral tones, rooms include a plasma screen TV with satellite channels. Rooms at the Eurostars Monumental have wooden floors and modern lighting. Toiletries and a hairdryer are included in the stylish marble bathrooms. A breakfast buffet is served in the hotel’s restaurant. You can also find various restaurants and cafés within a 5-minute walk, in the area around the Sagrada Familia. Eurostars Monumental is 328 feet from Monumental Metro Station, which provides direct trains to Passeig de Gracia Station. Estació del Nord Bus Station is just 2789 feet away. The property offers a parking space for luggage drop off in front of the hotel.

name: Hotel Indigo Barcelona Plaza Espana By IHG
neighborhood: Placa d'Espanya - Magic Fountain - Fira de Barcelona
description: Hotel Indigo Barcelona Plaza Espana, an IHG Hotel is a modern design hotel with a bright central courtyard. It offers free Wi-Fi and a convenient location, next to Barcelona’s Plaça Espanya. The modern rooms at the Hotel Indigo Barcelona Plaza Espana, an IHG Hotel feature a private bathroom, and free mineral water for the first night. They are all soundproofed, with flat-screen TVs and air conditioning. Hotel Indigo Barcelona Plaza Espana, an IHG Hotel is set next to the Fira Exhibition Center, at the bottom of Montjuic. This hill is home to a castle, the National Art Museum and the Magic Fountain. Espanya Metro Station is 492 feet from the hotel. The historic center of Barcelona and the famous Ramblas are just a few stops away. A direct bus service to the airport stops in Plaça Espanya, near the hotel. Breakfast is available at an additional cost.

name: Ako Suites Hotel
neighborhood: Las Ramblas North - Paseo de Gracia
description: Ako Suite Hotel offers stylish and modern family suites with free Wi-Fi and fully equipped kitchenettes, ideal for families looking for centrally located accommodations in Barcelona. Located just a 10-minute walk from Plaça de Catalunya, the hotel is perfectly positioned for stays of 3 and 4 guests seeking comfort and convenience. The suites feature a sleek minimalist design with bright, contemporary décor and functional layouts created especially for families. Each air-conditioned apartment includes a flat-screen TV and a double sofa bed, providing ample space and flexibility for both 3 and 4 guests. The modern kitchenettes are equipped with a ceramic hob and microwave, allowing families to enjoy added independence during their stay. Elegant bathrooms include a bathtub or shower, along with fresh towels and complimentary amenities. The hotel is located just 984 feet from Universitat Metro Station and a 5-minute walk from the airport bus stop, reinforcing its prime central location. The 24-hour reception team is always available to provide local information and personalized assistance, ensuring a comfortable and seamless stay for families visiting Barcelona.

name: Holiday Inn Rome - Eur Parco Dei Medici By IHG
description: Located just 1640 feet from Muratella Train Station, for trains to Rome city center and Fiumicino Airport, Holiday Inn Rome is in the city's business district. It offers a swimming pool, free WiFi and a spacious private parking. All air-conditioned, rooms here feature a 32" LCD TV with satellite channels. Each one has a private bathroom with a hairdryer. Some rooms include a mini-bar and a safe. Holiday Inn Rome - Eur Parco Dei Medici serves an American buffet breakfast each morning. La Serra Restaurant offers Mediterranean and international cuisine at lunch and dinner. You can enjoy a drink at the Incontro lounge bar or poolside during summer. This 4-star hotel is 0.6 mi from Parco De Medici Golf Club and 3.7 mi from Fiera di Roma exhibition center. Nearby you will also find the Space Cinemas complex as well as restaurants and shops. Finally, you can benefit from a shuttle service from\to Fiumicino Airport and the city center (service for a fee, fixed times and upon reservation). The route from the airport to the hotel is free of charge.

name: Iq Hotel Roma
description: Free Wi-Fi and flat-screen satellite TV are standard in all iQ rooms. This modern hotel offers a free gym, sauna and rooftop terrace, a 5 minute walk from Termini Train Station. The iQ Hotel is just 1300 ft from Repubblica Metro Station, and a 15 minute walk from the Colosseum. Buses to the Vatican City stop on Via Nazionale, 1 street away. All air conditioned rooms include a mini fridge and fully equipped private bathroom. Shared laundry facilities are available for an additional charge. Breakfast is buffet style, and can be enjoyed on the roof terrace with views of the nearby Opera House. Snacks and beverages are available 24 hours a day in iQ's vending machines.

name: Relais Orso
description: Relais Orso is a design accommodations located in the heart of Rome, just 656 feet from Piazza Navona. Set in a 17th-century townhouse, its rooftop terrace offers panoramic views across the city. Designed by Italian architect Danilo Maglio, Relais Orso combines old with new. The features of the house include original floors and the 15th-century marble door. The property is just across the Tiber River from Castel Sant'Angelo. It is 1969 feet from the Pantheon and an 8-minute walk from Rome's most exclusive shopping district on Via dei Condotti. Rooms and suites feature oak floors, and exposed red-brick walls.

name: Hilton Rome Airport
description: Hilton Rome Airport has a garden, shared lounge, a restaurant and bar in Fiumicino. This 4-star hotel offers an ATM and a concierge service. The accommodations features room service, a 24-hour front desk and currency exchange for guests. The hotel will provide guests with air-conditioned rooms with a desk, a kettle, a mini-bar, a safety deposit box, a flat-screen TV and a private bathroom with a bidet. The rooms have a wardrobe. A continental, Italian or American breakfast can be enjoyed at the property. Hilton Rome Airport offers 4-star accommodations with an indoor pool and sun terrace. You will also find a children's playground and a wellness area with a sauna, steam bath and a hot tub. EUR Magliana Metro Station is 13 mi from the accommodations, while PalaLottomatica Arena is 14 mi from the property. The nearest airport is Fiumicino Airport, a few steps from Hilton Rome Airport.

name: Artemide Hotel
description: The Artemide is in a 19th-century building on the vibrant Via Nazionale. A free minibar and free Wi-Fi access are available in each of the elegant rooms. Guests can book a session in the Artemis Spa, offering a sauna, hot tub, Turkish bath and a variety of treatments. Rooms are air-conditioned and decorated in contemporary style. Guests can enjoy flat-screen satellite TV and tea/coffee-making facilities. Breakfast at Artemide consists of a large buffet, and guests can relax in the lounge bar which has leather armchairs. From the Ambrosia Rooftop Restaurant & Bar, there are panoramic views out over Rome. Hotel Artemide is just 215 yards from the Repubblica Metro Station, 2 stops from the Spanish Steps. The staff can arrange a shuttle service to/from the Fiumicino and Ciampino airports.

name: Giglio Dell'opera Hotel
description: At Giglio Dell'opera Hotel, exceptional service and top-notch amenities create a memorable experience for guests. Complimentary internet access is available in the hotel to ensure you stay connected during your visit. Arrange your trips to and from the airport using the hotel's convenient transportation services booking. Discover the wonders of Rome with ease by utilizing the services provided by taxi, car hire and shuttle. For guests with their own vehicle, parking facilities are provided.Continuously receive the support you require through front desk amenities such as concierge service, express check-in or check-out, luggage storage and safety deposit boxes. At the hotel, their ticket service and tours is also capable of assisting with booking tickets and securing reservations for entertainment and adventures.Always look your best in your preferred attire with the dry cleaning service and laundry service provided at Giglio Dell'opera Hotel. Craving relaxation? In-room amenities such as 24-hour room service, room service and daily housekeeping allow you to maximize your time spent inside the room.Due to health concerns, smoking is strictly prohibited within the entire premises of hotel. For the health and well-being of all guests and staff, smoking is restricted exclusively to assigned zones.Accommodations come equipped with all the conveniences required for a restful night's slumber. A selection of rooms at Giglio Dell'opera Hotel come furnished with air conditioning to cater to your needs and comfort.A few chosen rooms are equipped with television, in-room video streaming and cable TV to ensure guest amusement. In certain chosen rooms, mini bar is conveniently available for your use.Giglio Dell'opera Hotel offers a hair dryer, toiletries and towels in the restrooms of specific accommodations. A delightful breakfast is the perfect way to begin your day, and at Giglio Dell'opera Hotel, you can always indulge in a scrumptious meal on-site. All adore a delightful cup of coffee! An on-site coffee shop ensures you can relish a cup of authentic, freshly-brewed coffee every morning -- or whenever you desire it.Allow your journey to be free from the pangs of hunger! On-site eateries offer delicious and accessible meal choices. An evening spent at hotel's bar can offer as much enjoyment as venturing out with your fellow travelers.

name: Grand Hotel Palatino
description: Just a 5-minute walk from the Coliseum and 328 feet from Cavour Metro, FH55 Grand Hotel Palatino is in Rome's Monti District. It offers an American bar and a restaurant. WiFi is free throughout. Rooms here air conditioned and come with a mini-bar and satellite TV. Some have views of Rome’s rooftops. Le Spighe restaurant specializes in Roman dishes and classic Italian cooking. Breakfast is a generous buffet, and starts at 06:30. The Forum and the Parco di Traiano are both less than a 10-minute walk from FH55 Grand Hotel Palatino. Termini Train Station is 1 metro stop away, as is Esquilino with its markets and many ethnic restaurants. When booking 8 rooms or more, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

name: Hotel Villa San Lorenzo Maria
description: Relax on the grounds at this friendly hotel, in the popular area of San Lorenzo in the center of Rome, surrounded by typical restaurants and cafés. Rooms come with air conditioning and private bathroom. Hotel Villa San Lorenzo Maria dates back to 1910 and was once a noble residence. Now it features elegant guest rooms on 3 floors. Many rooms open out onto the garden, while others feature a small, private balcony. Start your day with a rich, buffet breakfast, which can be enjoyed on the grounds or in the breakfast room, from 7:15 am until 10:30 am. The bar is an ideal place for an aperitif after a busy day in Rome. Villa San Lorenzo Maria is well connected to Termini station and the historic center by bus. The friendly staff will be on hand to provide tourist information and recommendations for all the best local attractions.

name: Hotel Royal Court
description: Request Type : Property Description Originally built as an early 20th-century residence, the Royal Court Hotel retains its historic character through inlaid woodwork, classic furnishings, and preserved Art Nouveau details. Passed down through generations, it reflects a long-standing family tradition and a subtle equestrian influence inspired by the founder’s passion for horses. Located on a quiet street just minutes from Roma Termini, the hotel operates as a spread property, with its main building and reception at Via Marghera 51 where check-in takes place, its dependance at Via Marghera 29, and its Royal Apartment at Via Vicenza 38, all within 656 feet of reception. As a family-run property, its mission is to provide attentive, discreet service and carefully maintained spaces that ensure a comfortable and memorable stay.

name: Palladium Palace
description: At 656 feet from Termini Train and Metro Station, Palladium Palace enjoys great transport links. This hotel features a panoramic rooftop bar, free WiFi throughout and rooms with classic-style decor. Palace Palladium is 328 feet from Basilica of Santa Maria Maggiore. The Colosseum is a 15-minute walk away. Rome's Opera House is 2297 feet away. Rooms feature classic wood furniture, satellite TV and air conditioning and grès porcelain or parquet floors. The bathroom includes hairdryer and toiletries. Some rooms have frescoes from the early 1900s and a hydromassage shower or bath. A generous American buffet breakfast with pancakes and omelets is available daily. Set in a 19th-century building, the Palladium hotel features a 24-hour reception. The lobby is decorated with marble and noble wood furniture. Staff can book tours and tickets.

name: Occidental Aran Park
description: Occidental Aran Park Hotel offers spacious accommodations surrounded by gardens in Rome’s business EUR District. The hotel also features a panoramic restaurant. All rooms at the Occidental Aran Park open out on to private balconies and offer a modern lay-out. Air conditioning is standard and the TV is equipped with satellite channels. A top-floor restaurant provides panoramic views of the countryside and a selection of Italian and international specialties. During the warmer months food is served outdoor on the terrace. Laurentina Metro Station is less than 1.9 mi away with direct links to the Coliseum and Termini Station.

name: THE REPUBLIC
description: The Republic Hotel lies in the heart of Rome, only 656 feet from the impressive Baths of Diocletian and within walking distance of Via Nazionale and Termini Station (Metro line A/B). This ideal location makes it possible to explore the historical center on foot, delving into the history and splendor of the city. The modern, cozy ambiance and comfortable design create the perfect atmosphere for relaxation. With 73 rooms of different types to suit every need, the hotel is a favorite for couples, families and business travelers. Set 1312 feet from termini Station, The Republic offers a shared lounge and air-conditioned rooms. Repubblica Metro and square are 5 minutes' walk away. Rooms are all en suite. A continental breakfast buffet is available daily, from 7:00, including ham, cheese, pastries, and hot drinks. Santa Maria Maggiore Basilica can be reached on foot in 15 minutes.

name: Rome Marriott Park Hotel
description: The Rome Marriott Park Hotel offers spacious, air-conditioned rooms decorated with handcrafted furniture and a marble bathroom. It is close to Rome’s EUR district, and a 30-minute drive from central Rome and the Vatican. The Marriott Park Hotel Rome features both an indoor hot tub. There is a well-equipped fitness center and a relaxing spa where you can book massages, a steam room, and beauty treatments. Brasserie Restaurant serves international and Italian cuisine in the impressive, frescoed dining hall. The informal boat-shaped Lobby Bar serves cocktails, sweets and tasty snacks.

name: Hotel Quirinale
description: Set in a 19th-century building, the Quirinale is 20 minutes' walk from the Coliseum. This historical hotel is connected to Rome Opera House through a passageway in its leafy courtyard. Rooms come with free Wi-Fi. Hotel Quirinale's spacious rooms are uniquely decorated and feature classic furnishings and parquet floors. Each room offers a flat-screen TV with satellite and pay-per-view channels. Some rooms overlook the small garden and courtyard. Breakfast is available daily. There is also an à la carte restaurant, and the hotel's Opera Bistrot is open all afternoon for more informal meals. The Quirinale is located 492 feet from Repubblica Metro Station. The Spanish Steps and the Trevi Fountain are both within a 15-minute walk, while Vatican City can be reached by car in 10 minutes.

name: Best Western Globus Hotel
neighborhood: Rome City Center North - Villa Torionia
description: This property offers a Special Protection Program, a strict program of precise safeguards dedicated to our guests and our staff. Offering great service, free Wi-Fi and a large buffet breakfast, Hotel Globus is in Rome's La Sapienza University district, only 2 metro stops from Termini Train Station. All air-conditioned, the modern rooms here also feature a flat-screen TV with satellite channels and a private bathroom with hairdryer. Toys, DVDs and a PlayStation 2 console are available for children. Best Western Plus Hotel Globus has a buffet-style restaurant, open from Sunday until Thursday for dinner a la carte menu. A modern business center with printer is available. Staff can arrange garage parking and provide useful travel information. Guests have discounts at a local gym and beauty center. Getting around Rome is easy as you have excellent metro and bus links. The Coliseum is 4 metro stops away, while the surrounding San Lorenzo district is packed with restaurants, cafés and pubs.

name: Crowne Plaza Rome St. Peters By IHG
description: Crowne Plaza Rome - St. Peter's is on the historic Via Aurelia Antica, 3.1 mi from the Vatican and very close to the lush Villa Pamphili Park. Free WiFi is available throughout the property. This Crowne Plaza is surrounded by its private park. Massages and beauty treatments can be booked on site. The spa is free for all guests as well as the 2 tennis courts and the outdoor swimming pool, open during the summer and featuring a pool bar. There is also a free fitness center open 24 hours a day. Rooms are spacious and come with modern furnishings. The buffet breakfast is American-style. The restaurant is open all day long and serves delicious, Italian cuisine. During summer meals are served on the terrace. There is also a business center. Crowne Plaza Rome - St. Peter's offers free parking. A scheduled transfer service to/from Rome Fiumicino Airport is arranged on request, at extra costs. Buses stop outside the hotel and there is a taxi station on site. Children under 16 years old are not allowed in the spa and the indoor pool.

name: Hotel St Martin by OMNIA hotels
description: Located in Rome, 0.7 mi from Sapienza University of Rome and right opposite Castro Pretorio metro station, Hotel St Martin by OMNIA hotels offers a restaurant, a bar and modern-style rooms. Among the facilities at this property are a tour desk and free WiFi throughout. All rooms are equipped with air conditioning, satellite flat-screen TV and a kettle. The private bathroom is complete with a hairdryer. When included in your room rate, guests at Hotel St Martin by OMNIA hotels can enjoy a buffet-style continental breakfast. Santa Maria Maggiore Basilica is 0.9 mi from the hotel, while Rome's Termini Central Station is a 10-minute walk away. The nearest airport is Rome Ciampino Airport, 9.3 mi from Hotel St Martin by OMNIA hotels.

name: Leonardo Boutique Hotel Rome Termini
description: Leonardo Boutique Hotel Rome Termini is 820 feet from Roma Termini Train Station and features a covered Jacuzzi® tub, located on the rooftop and available all year. It offers free Wi-Fi throughout and modern rooms with an LCD TV. Rooms at the Leonardo Boutique Hotel Rome Termini include satellite channels, air conditioning and a mini-bar. Leonardo Boutique Hotel Rome Termini’s breakfast room overlooks the tree-lined garden. Breakfast is an extensive buffet with sweet and savory produce. Piazza Repubblica and the Opera House are a 10-minute walk from the Leonardo Boutique Hotel Rome Termini. The Coliseum is just 2 Metro stops away on the B Line. After a day’s sightseeing in Rome, guests can relax in the sauna or Turkish bath. The hotel’s gym is equipped with running, cycling and weight machines. Massages are available on request.

name: Hotel Dei Mellini
description: Featuring a panoramic rooftop terrace, Hotel dei Mellini is a 15 minute walk from Saint Peter’s Square in central Rome. Housed in a 19th-century building next to the Tiber River, it hosts a private art collection. The elegant rooms at Mellini Hotel are decorated in a modern English style. All air-conditioned, they feature an electronic safe, TV with satellite and pay-per-view channels, and a marble bathroom. A hot buffet breakfast is served each morning. In the summer, guests can enjoy an aperitif and relax on the roof garden, overlooking Rome. A gym is available for free. The Castel Sant'Angelo palace is just over a quarter mile from the hotel. Flaminio Metro Station and the shopping district along Via del Corso are a 10 minute walk away.

name: Family House Hotel
description: Located in Rome, within a 8-minute walk of Porta Maggiore and 500 yards of Vittorio Emanuele Metro Station, Hotel Family House has accommodations with a garden and a terrace, and free WiFi throughout the property. Popular points of interest nearby include Cavour Metro Station, Roma Termini and Domus Aurea. The hotel has family rooms. At the hotel, rooms come with a closet and a flat-screen TV. The private bathroom is equipped with a bidet, free toiletries and a hairdryer. The rooms at Hotel Family House have air conditioning and a desk. Popular points of interest near the accommodation include Santa Maria Maggiore, San Giovanni Metro Station and Università La Sapienza. Rome Ciampino Airport is 8.1 miles from the property.
