name: Starhotels Michelangelo Rome
description: Starhotels Michelangelo Roma is located just 1476 feet far from Saint Peter's Square, within walking distance from the Sistine Chapel and from the Vatican Museums. Walking through for 15-20 minutes, instead, it is possible to reach the picturesque neighborhood Trastevere, Castel Sant’Angelo, the Fountain of the Four Rivers in Piazza Navona, the Pantheon or Cola Di Rienzo, one of the most important Roman shopping streets. The Roma San Pietro railway station, in addition, is just 2133 feet far from the hotel. The classic and elegant rooms accommodate the guests and let them feeling in an exclusive setting: they are designed to provide guests maximum comfort and tranquility. In a delicate and relaxed atmosphere, the restaurant and the bar The Dome, they offer the possibility to taste the characteristic dishes of the local, national and international tradition but excellent cocktails. Two meeting rooms with max capacity up to 140 people are the perfect location for business meetings or exclusive events nearby the Vatican.

name: The Social Hub Rome
description: The Social Hub Rome has a seasonal outdoor swimming pool, fitness center, a garden and shared lounge in Rome. This 4-star hotel offers a shared kitchen, a 24-hour front desk and free WiFi. Guests can have a drink at the bar. The hotel will provide guests with air-conditioned rooms with a desk, a coffee machine, a minibar, a safety deposit box, a flat-screen TV and a private bathroom with a bidet. The rooms include an electric tea pot, while selected rooms also feature a kitchen with a fridge and a stovetop. All rooms have a closet. The Social Hub Rome offers a buffet or continental breakfast. At the accommodation you'll find a restaurant serving Italian cuisine. Vegetarian, dairy-free and vegan options can also be requested. The Social Hub Rome has a terrace. Guests can enjoy playing pool, or take advantage of the business center. Popular points of interest near the hotel include Porta Maggiore, San Giovanni Metro Station and Vittorio Emanuele Metro Station. Rome Ciampino Airport is 8.1 miles from the property.

name: Hotel Delle Nazioni
description: Experience the heart of Rome staying in an elegant palace, formerly the residence of a noble family. Hotel Delle Nazioni offers a luxurious approach to the Eternal City. Enjoy a superb location in the artistic, cultural and commercial center of Rome, close to the main landmarks of this magnificent city, including the beautiful Trevi Fountain. The nearby Barberini Metro Station (line A) offers quick access to a host of destinations. All rooms and suites are elegant and refined, with parquet flooring and en suite, marble bathrooms. Each comfortable, sophisticated room is well-equipped with modern comforts.

name: Hotel Nord Nuova Roma
description: Nord Nuova Roma is a classic 1930s-style hotel offering soundproofed rooms with satellite TV and free WiFi. It is a 5-minute walk from Roma Termini Train Station. Guests at Hotel Nord can have an aperitif on the hotel's spacious sun terrace with views of central Rome, which is open all summer. There is a fully equipped gym on the 6th floor, and a meeting room is also available. Rooms are air conditioned and feature a fully equipped marble bathroom with bath or shower. Breakfast can be enjoyed in the room or enjoyed in the dining room. The buffet includes eggs, cold meats, yogurt and fruit. Snacks and light meals are on offer at the bar every afternoon and evening, and dinner is available at a partner restaurant located 328 feet away. The hotel is just 656 feet from Rome's Opera House, in an area hosting numerous restaurants and bars. The Trevi Fountain and the Spanish Steps are both a 15-minute walk away.

name: Hotel 55 Fifty-Five - Maison d'Art Collection
description: Featuring a bar, Hotel 55 Fifty-Five - Maison d'Art Collection is located in the center of Rome, a 5-minute walk from Piazza di Spagna. This 4-star hotel offers a concierge service and a tour desk. The property provides a 24-hour front desk, airport transportation, room service and free WiFi throughout the property. The hotel will provide guests with air-conditioned rooms with a closet, a coffee machine, a minibar, a safety deposit box, a flat-screen TV and a private bathroom with a bidet. Each room has an electric tea pot, while selected rooms come with a kitchen with a fridge and a microwave. The breakfast offers buffet, continental or Italian options. Popular points of interest near Hotel 55 Fifty-Five - Maison d'Art Collection include Spanish Steps, Trevi Fountain and Barberini Metro Station. Rome Ciampino Airport is 9.3 miles away.

name: Hotel Nazionale
description: Set next to Italian Parliament in the famous pedestrian square of Piazza Montecitorio, Hotel Nazionale offers elegant rooms with a flat-screen TV, and free WiFi throughout. The Pantheon is 1148 feet away. All rooms here include air conditioning and a mini-bar. The private bathroom has free toiletries and a hairdryer. A sweet and savory breakfast buffet is prepared daily including cheese, cold cuts, pastries and fresh fruit. Gluten-free options are available on request. Hotel Nazionale is set in a renovated building of the 18th century, within walking distance of the Trevi Fountain and the Spanish Steps. The imposing Pantheon is just around the corner. Piazza Navona and the Trevi Fountain are both within 1640 feet of the property. The Spanish Steps are a 10-minute walk away.

name: Hotel Mozart
description: The 4-star Hotel Mozart offers elegant accommodations in Rome’s center, just around the corner from the main shopping street, Via Del Corso. It features free Wi-Fi, a restaurant, and a roof garden with views of Rome’s rooftops. Rooms combine classic-style décor and furniture with modern amenities such as an LCD TV with satellite and pay-per-view channels. Some rooms face the main street, while others overlook the internal courtyard. In the morning, a rich breakfast buffet is available. This includes traditional Italian coffee, along with fruit pies, freshly baked croissants and homemade pastries. A free internet point is available in the hotel’s lobby. Mozart Hotel is a 5-minute walk from the Spanish Steps and Spagna Metro Station. In 10 minutes on foot you can reach the Trevi Fountain.

name: Augusta Lucilla Palace
description: Augusta Lucilla Palace offers elegant and air-conditioned rooms with flat-screen satellite TVs and free WiFi throughout. It is set in central Rome, 5 minutes' walk from both Repubblica Metro Station and Termini Train Station. The rooms are en suite and come with smart beds with massaging function and both memory-foam mattresses and pillows. Some feature unique tapestries, paintings, and a sofa for 2 people. Located in an 18th-century building, the Augusta Lucilla has a rooftop terrace, 24-hour front desk and a bar. A buffet breakfast is served daily. Just a few steps from the hotel you will find Rome's Opera House. From Termini Metro Station, there are direct connections to the Spanish Steps, the Vatican and the Colosseum.

name: Je Rome Hotel
description: In a prime location in Rome, Je Rome Hotel provides air-conditioned rooms, a fitness center, free WiFi and a restaurant. This 4-star hotel offers room service and a 24-hour front desk. Guests can have a drink at the bar. At the hotel, all rooms are equipped with a desk and a flat-screen TV. The private bathroom is equipped with a bidet, free toiletries and a hairdryer. All guest rooms feature a safety deposit box. Je Rome Hotel offers a sauna. Popular points of interest near the accommodation include Piazza Venezia, Palazzo Venezia and Trevi Fountain. Rome Ciampino Airport is 10 miles away, and the property offers a paid airport shuttle service.

name: Colonna Palace
description: In a 17th-century building, this 4-star hotel is a 5 minute walk from Piazza Navona and Pantheon. It offers elegant accommodations and a roof terrace with panoramic city views. The air-conditioned rooms at the Colonna Palace Hotel are classically decorated and have soft carpet floors and hardwood furniture. They also include satellite TV and a private bathroom with toiletries. Cappuccino, fresh croissants and orange juice are included in the buffet breakfast, which is served each morning on the terrace. The snack bar specializes in international cocktails. The hotel is right in front of the Italian Parliament. The staff is available 24 hours a day at the front desk.

name: Hilton Garden Inn Rome Colosseum
description: This property offers a Special Protection Program, a strict program of precise safeguards dedicated to our guests and our staff. Just a 13-minute walk from the Colisseum, Hilton Garden Inn Rome Colosseum is in central Rome. The property is located directly in front of Manzoni Metro Station. This hotel offers free WiFi throughout. Spacious and air-conditioned, all rooms feature a 40” LCD TV. They are decorated with warm colors and light-wood furniture. The Hilton Garden Inn Rome Colosseum’s daily breakfast is an extensive American buffet. The restaurant and bar serves classic Italian cuisine and Roman specialties, while vegetarian and gluten-free options are also available. The Shop, a 24-hour mini-market in the hotel lobby, offers a variety of products for guests’ convenience Guests enjoy free use of the on-site shared fitness center. Rome Termini Station can be reached on foot in 10 minutes. St John’s Basilica is just 1640 feet away.

name: Hotel Trevi
description: Just 164 feet from Rome’s most famous fountain, Hotel Trevi is composed of several buildings and offers air-conditioned rooms with satellite TV and a mini-bar. Breakfast is served buffet style on the hotel's rooftop terrace. Rooms have a modern design, and some include wood-beamed ceilings and views of nearby rooftops. Some rooms are located in separate buildings 50 to 328 feet away. The extensive buffet breakfast includes cold cuts, cheese, salads, eggs and fresh fruit. This hotel is in the heart of Rome's historical center, a few steps from the Trevi Fountain. It is surrounded by ice cream parlors, restaurants and shops, and is only 5 minutes' walk from the Spanish Steps. Staff can help with tourist information and organizing sightseeing tours. Barberini Metro Station is 5 minutes walk away.

name: Best Western Hotel I Triangoli
description: This property offers a Special Protection Program, a strict program of precise safeguards dedicated to our guests and our staff. Best Western I Triangoli is set along Via Colombo, between Rome city center and the sea in Ostia. The hotel offers indoor and outdoor parking, and free Wi-Fi. Each featuring a tea/coffee maker and a balcony, all rooms offer free internet connection. Most rooms overlook the garden surrounding the hotel. Rome Fiumicino Airport is 11 mi away. Bus number 065 stops near I Triangoli and connects you to Acilia Station on the Roma - Ostia train line.

name: Quality Hotel Nova Domus
description: Nova Domus Hotel offers a sun terrace and is just a 5-minute walk from the Vatican. All rooms at Hotel Nova Domus come with carpet floor, individually controlled air conditioning, and satellite TV. Some rooms have a private balcony with views of Rome's Prati district. The area is famous for its many shops and boutiques. Cipro - Musei Vaticani Metro station is 1476 feet away, and provides direct connection with Roma Termini. Breakfast includes sweet and savory food. From spring to autumn all meals are served on the rooftop terrace of Quality Hotel Nova Domus.

name: Hotel Montecarlo
description: Hotel Montecarlo is located 5 minutes' walk from Rome Termini Train Station, and features a bar and classic-style accommodations with air conditioning. Free WiFi is available throughout. Rooms at the Montecarlo all come with a satellite TV and private bathroom. They overlook the courtyard or street, and all rooms feature an LCD TV with pay-per-view channels. Montecarlo's staff are available 24 hours a day and can recommend the best restaurants and places to visit in Rome's historic center. They can also book tickets on sightseeing tours. A buffet breakfast that consists of scrambled eggs, bacon, cold meats, homemade cakes, croissants, yogurt, and fruit is available daily at the bar located on the rooftop terrace, which is open all year round. The Montecarlo Hotel is located 1312 feet from Castro Pretorio Metro Stop which has a direct link to the Coliseum. From Termini Metro Station you can reach the Spanish Steps and the Vatican City in just a few minutes.

name: Hotel Canada, BW Premier Collection
description: This property offers a Special Protection Program, a strict program of precise safeguards dedicated to our guests and our staff. Set just 492 feet from Rome’s Castro Pretorio Metro Stop, Hotel Canada BW Premier Collection offers a bar, free WiFi throughout and air-conditioned rooms. Termini Train Station is a 10-minute walk away. Rooms at the Hotel Canada BW Premier Collection all come equipped with a flat-screen TV with satellite channels, a CD player and safe. The private bathroom includes a hairdryer and free toiletries. The property features a 24-hour front desk, an elegant shared lounge area and luggage storage facilities. A continental buffet breakfast is available daily, while the on-site bar provides snacks throughout the day. The hotel is 2297 feet from the Sapienza University. The Colosseum can be reached in 3 metro stops.

name: Precise House Mantegna Roma
description: Precise House Mantegna Roma is a large design hotel offering a tranquil location in the Tor Marancia district. The property offers free WiFi throughout, as well as a large business center. The Precise House Mantegna Roma is 1969 feet from Via Cristoforo Colombo. Basilica San Paolo Metro Station is a 20-minute walk away. Rooms are all air conditioned and feature a satellite flat-screen TV and a private bathroom with a hairdryer. The hotel includes private parking, a 24-hour front desk and 2 on-site restaurants serving characteristic local cuisine and Mediterranean cuisine. The breakfast is buffet style.

name: The Hive Hotel
description: Featuring a shared rooftop terrace, The Hive Hotel is 984 feet from Santa Maria Maggiore Basilica. The hotel provides free WiFi throughout and air-conditioned rooms. All rooms at this property have a modern-style décor, and come with a flat-screen TV. Each room has a private bathroom with slippers, toiletries and a hairdryer, while some also include a seating area. An extensive sweet and savory breakfast buffet is available daily. Guests can also find a bar and a restaurant serving Italian and Chinese cuisine. Domus Aurea is 0.6 mi from the hotel, while Quirinale is a 20-minute walk away. Fiumicino International Airport is 19 mi from The Hive.

name: Hotel Napoleon
description: Hotel Napoleon is set in a 19th-century building directly in front of Vittorio Emanuele Metro, and 1969 feet from Termini Station. High-speed WiFi is free throughout. All air conditioned, rooms here come with a flat-screen satellite TV and a mini-bar. The private bathroom has free toiletries and a hairdryer. Some rooms have a balcony. Enjoy a light lunch at the hotel bar or return to the Napoleon’s restaurant for dinner, where you can taste Italian specialties teamed with fine wines. At breakfast an extensive sweet and savory buffet is provided, accompanied by Italian coffee. Santa Maria Maggiore Basilica is 1804 feet from the hotel, while the Coliseum is a 15-minute walk away.

name: River Palace Hotel
description: Located just a few steps from Villa Borghese Park, River Palace Hotel offers elegant interiors and antique furnishings. Internet is free and rooms are equipped with air conditioning and satellite TV. The large buffet breakfast is served daily and includes homemade cake and pastries, fresh fruit, meats and cheeses. The lounge bar serves cocktails and 22 different types of whiskey. The River Palace is just a 5 minute walk from the famous Piazza del Popolo, and from Flaminio Metro Station. From here, there is direct access to the Spanish Steps and Vatican City.

name: Escape Luxury Suite - CA Domus Collection
description: Located in the heart of Rome, a 3-minute walk from Piazza Barberini, Escape Luxury Suite - CA Domus Collection provides luxuriously furnished rooms with air conditioning. This boutique accommodations offers free WiFi throughout, a shared lounge and free luggage storage. At this boutique accommodations, each room comes with parquet floors and a private bathroom with marble floors, toiletries and a shower with water jets. Some rooms have views of Palazzo Barberini's garden. An à la carte sweet and savory breakfast can be enjoyed in the comfort of your room. Escape Luxury Suite - CA Domus Collection is a 10-minute walk from Piazza di Spagna. Fiumicino International Airport and Rome Ciampino Airport are respectively 30 and is 9.3 mi from the property. The reception is available from 8:00 AM until 21:00. After 21:00 in the evening, the guests can reach us via telephone. The reception opens at 9am and closes at 6pm.

name: LH Hotel Andreotti
description: Set a 5-minute walk from Termini Station, LH Hotel Andreotti offers elegant air-conditioned rooms, free WiFi, and an extensive breakfast buffet. Castro Pretorio Metro is 1312 feet away. All individually furnished and soundproof, rooms here include a LCD TV, a mini-bar. The private bathroom has a hairdryer and toiletries. The varied breakfast includes pastries and cakes. Staff are available 24 hours a day and can recommend local restaurants nearby. LH Hotel Andreotti is a 20-minute walk from both the Spanish Steps and the Trevi Fountain.

name: Genova Hotel
description: Near the Basilica of Santa Maria Maggiore, Hotel Genova offers elegant rooms with parquet floors and a marble bathroom. Roma Termini Train Station is a 2 minute walk away. The soundproof guest rooms at Hotel Genova are decorated in warm colors. They have a flat-screen TV, a work desk and a bathroom with toiletries. A bathrobe and slippers provide extra comfort. The Orange Bar serves Mediterranean cuisine prepared with seasonal ingredients, and international cocktails. Breakfast is served in the welcoming dining room each morning. The Genova's lobby features marble floors and pillars. The staff at the front desk can provide useful tourist and travel info. Wi-Fi access is available throughout the hotel.

name: Hotel Mecenate Palace
description: The Mecenate Palace is a 4-star hotel in the center of Rome which faces the Basilica of Santa Maria Maggiore. The Roof Garden Restaurant and the Sky Bar provide views of Rome's rooftops. The Hotel Mecenate Palace fts elegant rooms with air conditioning and a tea/coffee maker. Some rooms include panoramic views of the Eternal City. The Rome Termini Metro and Train Station is a short walk away. In about 15 minutes, you can also walk to the Colosseum and the Roman Forum.

name: Best Western Plus Hotel Universo
description: A 19th-century building offering interior design, Best Western Plus Hotel Universo is located 984 feet from Rome’s Termini Station. The rooms have free WiFi and a satellite flat-screen TV. The hotel has a well-equipped gym and a rooftop at the 8th Floor. Guests can enjoy free access to the wellness center. Rooms at Best Western Plus Hotel Universo are all air conditioned and feature a kettle and mini-bar. A varied breakfast buffet is served daily and includes Italian coffee, croissants, ham and eggs. You can enjoy traditional Roman and international dishes at the hotel’s Quattro Stagioni restaurant. Special diet menus are available upon request. This Best Western Hotel is just 492 feet from the Opera Theater and a 5-minute walk from Via Nazionale. The Baths of Diocletian are 1312 feet away.

name: Mercure Rome Colosseum Centre
description: Featuring a rooftop terrace and a seasonal pool (Open From May To September) with views of the Coliseum, Mercure Roma Centro Colosseo offers modern rooms and free WiFi throughout. The Coliseum is 1312 feet away. Rooms are equipped with LCD TV with satellite channels, air conditioning, and a mini-bar. Some rooms overlook the Coliseum. The extensive buffet breakfast features fresh, local traditional produce, and starts at 07:00 am. The snack bar is open every day until midnight, and the roof bar is available between May and September. The Mercure Roma is well served by public transport, and just 1640 feet from Colosseo Metro Station.The paleochristian Basilica of San Clemente is just opposite the hotel.

name: Hotel Della Torre Argentina
description: Hotel della Torre Argentina is an elegant historic building in the center of Rome, a 2 minute walk from the market in Campo de Fiori square. Rooms have free Wi-Fi, air conditioning, and a flat-screen satellite TV. The hotel features a panoramic terrace with chairs and tables, offering views of Rome's rooftops. The building dates back to the 18th century, and is complete with a elevator. The interiors are classically decorated, and rooms have carpeted or parquet floors. A sweet and savory buffet is served daily in the breakfast room, which features brick walls, arches, and vaulted ceilings. Della Torre Argentina Hotel sits right in front of a bus stop providing direct service to Roma Termini Train Station.

name: Hilton Rome Eur La Lama
description: Located in Rome, a 4-minute walk from EUR Fermi Metro Station, Hilton Rome Eur La Lama provides accommodations with a terrace, private parking, a restaurant and a bar. This 4-star hotel offers a concierge service and luggage storage space. The property has room service, a 24-hour front desk and currency exchange for guests. The hotel will provide guests with air-conditioned rooms offering a desk, a safety deposit box, a flat-screen TV and a private bathroom with a bidet. All guest rooms feature a closet. A buffet, à la carte or continental breakfast is served at the property. Popular points of interest near Hilton Rome Eur La Lama include PalaLottomatica Arena, Laurentina Metro Station and EUR Magliana Metro Station. Rome Ciampino Airport is 10 miles away.

neighborhood: Royal Palaca - Central Station - Dam Square
description: Hotel Estheréa is set along the Singel canal in the center of Amsterdam, only 984 feet from Dam Square. This hotel is in a quiet area and benefits from classically-styled decor with wooden paneling. Free WiFi access is available. Each of the stylish rooms are romantically decorated and have a private bathroom. Some rooms have a canal view. Breakfast at the hotel features an extensive range of choices including bread, toppings, juices and fresh fruit. There are also warm dishes including scrambled eggs, boiled or fried eggs, sausages and bacon. The hotel serves coffee, tea or hot chocolate free of charge in the lounge with canal view. Furthermore, you can make free use of the wired internet in the lobby, visit the small library and get coloring books for children. Hotel Estheréa is located in the heart of the city center within walking distance of museums, the main shopping area and night life. You will find plenty of cafés and restaurants in the area.

neighborhood: Royal Palaca - Central Station - Dam Square

Rooms here provide you with satellite flat-screen TV. Featuring a shower, private bathrooms also come with a hairdryer. Extras include a desk, a safe and ironing facilities. At Hotel Luxer you will find a 24-hour front desk and a bar. Other facilities include luggage storage. The hotel is in the Red Light District area, 200 yards from Amsterdam Central Train Station, just over a quarter mile from Dam Square and 1 mile from Leidseplein. Schiphol Airport is 7.5 miles away.

name: Four Elements Hotel
description: Located in Amsterdam, close to the IJburg harbor Four Elements Hotel has a sustainable design. It features accommodations with a Rooftop Sky Bar, a waterside terrace, and private parking. Among the facilities of this property are a restaurant, a 24-hour front desk and free WiFi. The property is nonsmoking and is set 5.6 mi from Rembrandt House. At the hotel, the 192 rooms have a desk, a flat-screen TV and a private bathroom. All rooms at Four Elements Hotel have natural air conditioning by Bronsema. Sun and wind provide the energy for the air circulation, and falling water moisturizes or dries the air and heats or cools it. Breakfast, lunch and diner is served in the Restaurant FIVE. All meals are prepared with local products. Guest can enjoy a drink in the Rooftop Sky Bar with lake views. Dutch National Opera & Ballet is 5.6 mi from the accommodations, while Johan Cruijff Arena is 5.6 mi from the property. The nearest airport is Schiphol Airport, 16 mi from Four Elements Hotel. Direct tram connection to the city center.

name: Avani Museum Quarter Amsterdam Hotel
description: Avani Museum Quarter Amsterdam Hotel is located a 7-minute walk from both the Van Gogh Museum and Rijksmuseum, housed on the Museum Square. The hotel offers a 24-hour room service and on-site fitness facilities. Free Wi-Fi is available. The guest rooms are comfortably equipped with satellite TV and a separate bathroom with free toiletries. Some rooms look out over the canal in front of the hotel. Restaurant Palette serves Dutch meals and international dishes, including a variety of sandwiches, hamburgers and pizzas. A breakfast buffet is offered every morning. Avani Museum Quarter is located a 5-minutes walk from the Heineken Brewery. De pijp metro stop is located 1476 feet away and offers access to Amsterdam Central Station or Zuid Station with metro 52. Leidseplein square is a 14-minute walk from this accommodations.

name: Hyatt Place Amsterdam Airport
description: Hyatt Place Amsterdam Airport is located along motorway N201, only 5 minutes' drive from Schiphol Airport. It offers a Stay Fit Fitness Center, which is open 24/7, a 24-hour front desk, a terrace. Complimentary shuttle from the airport to the hotel. From the hotel to the airport the shuttle includes a surcharge. Free WiFi is available throughout your stay. Each nonsmoking accommodations comes with a seating area, a TV and tea/coffee making facilities. The bathroom features a bath or shower and a toilet. Breakfast is served every morning at the hotel's Gallery, which also serves a varied lunch and dinner menu. Guests can enjoy drinks and snacks at The Bar and The market, both located on site and open 24/7. Hoofddorp station is 1.5 away and the center of Hoofddorp is located 3.7 mi from Hyatt Place Amsterdam Airport. Amsterdam is a 15-minute drive. Zandvoort beach is 30 minutes by car.

Rooms are equipped with air conditioning, a flat-screen TV with satellite channels, a fridge, a kettle, a shower, a hairdryer and a desk. A wardrobe and a private bathroom are also featured. Popular points of interest near Clayton Hotel Amsterdam American include Van Gogh Museum, Heineken Experience and Moco Museum. The nearest airport is Schiphol Airport, 8.1 mi from the hotel.

You can reach Schiphol Airport in a 10-minute drive. Please be informed that a daily shuttle bus operates between the hotel and Schiphol Amsterdam Airport at fixed times. Per person fees are EUR 12.50- for a day pass. The hotel contains 260 renewed bedrooms with air conditioning and bathrooms with separate bath and shower. Free Wi-Fi is included. The bedrooms also feature access to internet TV, including Netflix, YouTube and Pandora. Guests can enjoy different menus at the brasserie with a terrace or have a drink at the bar. There is also a 24-hour food market on site.The latest renovation of the accommodations was in April 2017. Tourist attractions like Amsterdam, Haarlem, the Keukenhof and Zandvoort beach are within easy reach from Courtyard by Marriott Amsterdam Airport. A total of 20 bowling alleys and an array of restaurants and bars are located next to the hotel. A casino is also located within walking distance. The hotel also offers 10 meeting spaces, including an auditorium room for up to 330 guests. There is ample parking and the hotel is easily reached from the motorway.

name: Novotel Amsterdam City
description: This 4-star hotel offers modern rooms with free WiFi and is less than 10 minutes’ walk from Amsterdam RAI convention center. Novotel benefits from a gym and a sauna. Guests can park in the spacious on-site paid parking area. All of the rooms at Novotel Amsterdam City feature a spacious layout with a seating area. The modern amenities include tea facilities, a Nespresso coffee machine, a 55-inch flat-screen TV and a mini-bar. A Continental breakfast is served every morning from a standard breakfast platter with additional supplements available. The hotel also has a restaurant with a diverse menu that varies according to season. A bike rental service is available at the property. The hotel is set right next to Amstelpark and 5 minute walk to the Noord-Zuidlijn which has a direct connection to the city center. Schiphol Airport is reached in less than a 15-minute by car or public transport.

name: Best Western Plus Amsterdam Airport Hotel
description: Located directly next to Schiphol Airport, Best Western Amsterdam Airport Hotel has a free shuttle service, which is available from 06:15 until 23:45 (every half hour). There is an indoor gym. Best Western Amsterdam Airport Hotel offers a 24-hour front office and rooms with a private bathroom. Guests are always welcome in the hotel bar, which features LCD TV and air conditioning or they can relax in the lounge chairs in the lobby. The hotel also features an à la carte restaurant. The hotel also offers free Wi-Fi in the entire hotel. In the lobby, there is a computer with free internet access for guests. Haarlem and Amsterdam, as well as the seaside resort of Zandvoort, are easily accessible from the hotel. The pool is no longer in use and will not open.

name: Park Plaza Vondelpark Amsterdam
description: Park Plaza Vondelpark Amsterdam is located in Amsterdam’s uptown neighborhood Oud-Zuid, just steps from the Vondelpark. The hotel is close to the vibrant "Little Paris", famous for its large variety of exclusive shops, restaurants and bars, as well as the city’s main highlights such as Museum Square where most of the famous museums can be found. Park Plaza Vondelpark Amsterdam guest rooms feature a design and luxury bedding. Guests benefit from a tea/coffee maker and a TV with cable channels. Some rooms have large windows offering views of the Vondelpark. The property offers the vibrant and award winning Italian restaurant and bar concept TOZI, specializing in small Venetian sharing plates, alongside classic Italian cocktails and an extensive wine list. At TOZI you will experience a taste of authentic Italian cuisine. The hotel also offers a private garden, bike rental and concierge services. Hotel guests can enjoy complimentary use of the on-site fitness. Free WiFi is available in the entire hotel. Cornelis Schuytstraat tram stop can be reached within walking distance. There is a direct access to Rijksmuseum, Van Gogh Museum, Leidse Square, Dam Square and The Central Station.

name: Avenue Hotel
neighborhood: Royal Palaca - Central Station - Dam Square
description: The Avenue is a 3-star hotel located in Amsterdam, just under a quarter of a mile from the Amsterdam Central Train Station. It features free Wi-Fi, a 24-hour front desk and a breakfast buffet. The rooms at Avenue Hotel have satellite TV. Each of the simply furnished rooms is also air-conditioned and comes furnished with a work desk. Dam Square, featuring the Royal Palace and Madame Tussauds, is only a 5-minute walk away. Hotel Avenue offers a packed lunch service and tour desk for guests exploring the local area. The breakfast buffet is served daily and features cereal, bread and warm dishes such as eggs.

name: Tribe Amsterdam City
description: Located in Amsterdam, 2.6 miles from A'DAM Lookout, Tribe Amsterdam City has accommodations with a fitness center, private parking, a shared lounge and a bar. This 4-star hotel offers a 24-hour front desk, luggage storage space and free WiFi. The hotel has family rooms. At the hotel all rooms have air conditioning, a seating area, a flat-screen TV with satellite channels, a safety deposit box and a private bathroom with a shower, free toiletries and a hairdryer. All rooms will provide guests with a desk and a coffee machine. A buffet, à la carte or continental breakfast is available at the property. Rembrandt House is 3.4 miles from Tribe Amsterdam City, while Artis Zoo is 3.5 miles from the property. Schiphol Airport is 16 miles away.

name: The July - Twenty Eight
description: The unique The July - Twenty Eight offers a new hotel/apartment concept with spacious, comfortable design apartments combined with the service and facilities of a luxury hotel. Featuring a sauna and fitness facilities. Guests can make use of the underground garage. All apartments have a fully equipped kitchen, a living room with a spacious seating area and a luxurious bathroom equipped with a rain shower. Climate control, flat-screen TV and high-speed WiFi offer extra comfort. Other than cooking in your own apartment the hotel serves a boutique breakfast sourced from local producers. You can work in the co-working space or relax in the living room. The lobby, lounge, bar and reception are open 24-hours per day. The reception staff are available for planning excursions, offering rental bikes and information about the area. Within 984 feet of The July - Twenty Eight you will find the nearest metro station and opposite the hotel you will find the direct tram to the nearby located Museum Square and the City Center. The Amsterdamse bos and Vondelpark are 0.9 mi away and the Zuidas, the WTC and the RAI can be found within 1.2 mi.

name: NYX Hotel Amsterdam Rembrandt Square
description: Ideally located in Amsterdam, NYX Hotel Amsterdam Rembrandt Square has a buffet breakfast and free WiFi. The property is close to several well-known attractions, a 15-minute walk from Our Lord in the Attic Museum, 0.9 miles from Basilica of St. Nicholas and a 8-minute walk from Rembrandt House. The hotel has family rooms. You can play pool at this 4-star hotel. Speaking Arabic, German, English and Spanish at the reception, staff are always at hand to help. Popular points of interest near the hotel include Dam Square, Royal Palace Amsterdam and Beurs van Berlage. Schiphol Airport is 11 miles from the property.

name: Inntel Hotels Amsterdam Centre
neighborhood: Royal Palaca - Central Station - Dam Square
description: Inntel Hotels Amsterdam Center offers rooms with free Wi-Fi and satellite TV, just a 5-minute walk from Amsterdam Central Station. It features a modern atrium breakfast room and a stylish bar. The air-conditioned rooms are modern and warmly decorated. They have a luxurious private bathroom, climate control and coffee and tea facilities. Room service is available. Guests can start their day with a good breakfast in the trendy restaurant, including fruits, eggs, and fresh orange juice. Even a glass of bubbles is available. Dinner is served at the neighboring restaurant Humphrey's. The costs can be charged to the guest's hotel account. A drink in the hotel bar lounge is the perfect way to end the day. Inntel Hotels Amsterdam Center is located in the historical heart of the city. Within walking distance you will find shopping streets as well as museums and historical sights.

name: Hilton Amsterdam Airport Schiphol
description: Hilton Amsterdam Airport Schiphol is directly connected to the Amsterdam Airport Schiphol. The hotel is only a 7 minute walk away via a covered walkway from Schiphol. The hotel offers 433 spacious rooms with diamond-shaped windows that view over the airport and its runways. The hotel’s seemingly endless geometric façade and vast, open lobby with 42-yard high atrium is a fitting welcome to the level of outstanding service. Perfect for business and leisure travelers. The hotel has free Wi-Fi throughout the property and there is underground parking garage with charging stations for electric cars. Savor a delicious dinner at Bowery Restaurant. Bowery is inspired by the Dutch heritage and the menu presents delicious dishes proudly prepared with local and seasonal products. The restaurant offers various grill specialties to a blend of Asian flavors and carefully selected authentic classics. Axis Lobby & Cocktail Bar is located in the heart of the hotel. The bar serves as a bustling café during the day and a lively bar in the evening – specializing in a wide selection of gin and Dutch jenevers. Unwind in our Fitness Center and relax in our spa. Make use of our whirlpool, sauna and steam room or treat yourself with a massage. The city center of Amsterdam is just a 15-minute train ride away. Visit local attractions such as the Van Gogh Museum, the Anne Frank House or the Rijksmuseum. Other cities like Rotterdam, The Hague and Utrecht are also easily accessible within 30 minutes by train. The popular beach destination Zandvoort is just a 30-minute drive away.

name: Holiday Inn Express Amsterdam - North Riverside By IHG
description: Located in Amsterdam, 1.1 miles from A'DAM Lookout, Holiday Inn Express Amsterdam - North Riverside by IHG provides accommodations with a shared lounge, private parking, a terrace and a restaurant. Providing a bar, the property is located within 2.8 miles of Rembrandt House. Free WiFi is available and Dutch National Opera & Ballet is 2.8 miles away. At the hotel, every room is equipped with a closet. Complete with a private bathroom equipped with a shower and free toiletries, guest rooms at Holiday Inn Express Amsterdam - North Riverside by IHG have a flat-screen TV and air conditioning, and selected rooms have a seating area. The accommodation offers a buffet or continental breakfast. The area is popular for hiking and cycling, and bike rental is available at this 3-star hotel. Speaking Arabic, German, English and Spanish at the 24-hour front desk, staff are willing to help at any time of the day. Artis Zoo is 2.8 miles from Holiday Inn Express Amsterdam - North Riverside by IHG, while Our Lord in the Attic Museum is 3.4 miles away. Schiphol Airport is 13 miles from the property.

name: Q-Factory Hotel
description: Featuring free WiFi throughout the property, Q-Factory Hotel offers accommodations in Amsterdam. Guests can enjoy the on-site restaurant. Parking is available on site against a surcharge. Every room is fitted with a flat-screen TV with cable channels. Certain rooms include a seating area to relax in after a busy day. Each room includes a private bathroom. You will find a 24-hour front desk at the property. The hotel also offers bike hire. Carre Theater is 1.2 mi from Q-Factory Hotel, while Dutch National Opera & Ballet is 1.4 mi from the property. The nearest airport is Schiphol Airport, 8.1 mi from Q-Factory Hotel.

name: XO Hotels Blue Tower
description: XO Hotels Blue Tower offers air-conditioned rooms with free Wi-Fi and flat-screen satellite TV, in the West-side of Amsterdam. It features bicycle rental and is only 820 feet away from Bos en Lommerplein bus and tram stop, where trams to the city center depart. All of the rooms at XO Hotels Blue Tower include a work desk and coffee and tea facilities A buffet breakfast is served in Restaurant Saffron. Amsterdam Sloterdijk Railway Station is less than 20 minutes’ walk away and the center of Amsterdam is 25 minutes’ journey away by public transport. Schiphol Airport is a 15-minute car journey from XO Hotels Blue Tower.

name: Grand Hotel Amrath Amsterdam
description: The luxurious 5-star Grand Hotel Amrâth Amsterdam, located in a monumental building just 1640 feet from Central Station, offers an extensive Spa & Wellness center and spacious rooms with high ceilings. Free Wi-Fi is available throughout the entire hotel. The 205 Art Nouveau-style rooms, of which 22 suites, feature high ceilings and large windows, providing lots of daylight. Extras include a Nespresso coffee machine, tea facilities and a flat-screen TV. Each room has climate control, a hairdryer, bathrobes and slippers. Enjoy your lunch or dinner at the hotel's Bar Lounge overlooking the canals. Guests have free access to the Spa & Wellness center featuring 2 saunas (70 and 90 degrees), an infrared sauna, steam cabin, whirlpool, an indoor pool and fitness. There are 8 meeting rooms. The historical Grand Hotel Amrâth Amsterdam is 0.9 mi from the Hermitage and Beurs van Berlage is only 2625 feet away. Dam Square, featuring the Royal Palace, is less than a 15-minute walk. A 15-minute train ride will bring you to Schiphol Airport.

name: ibis budget Amsterdam Airport
description: This 2-star hotel is located within a 7-minute drive from Schiphol Airport. ibis budget Amsterdam Airport offers free Wi-Fi, free shuttle service to and from Schiphol airport and a 24-hour front desk. The rooms have a colorful urban decor. They feature a desk, and flat-screen TV. A shower is fitted in the bathroom. Ibis Budget Amsterdam Airport provides a continental buffet breakfast. There is a variety of cafes and restaurants in the adjacent Ibis hotel. Business district Amsterdam South Axis is a 9-minute drive. Nature area Amsterdamse Bos is 5 minutes by car. It is 1 mi to the A9 highway.

name: Ibis Amsterdam Centre
neighborhood: Royal Palaca - Central Station - Dam Square
description: Hotel ibis Amsterdam Center is located in the city center of Amsterdam, right next to Central Station and only a 10-minute walk to Dam Square. This 3-star hotel offers nonsmoking rooms. Free WiFi is available in the hotel rooms and in all public areas. All rooms at ibis Amsterdam Center come with air cooling, ibis Sweet Beds and a flat-screen TV. The private bathroom is fitted with a shower and toilet. Breakfast is served every morning in the breakfast area. A wide variety of restaurants, bars and cafes can also be found in the direct area of the hotel. Schiphol Airport is only 15 minutes by train, while the RAI congress center is 20 minutes by tram. Amsterdam ArenA is 15 minutes away by metro. Please note that a maximum of 1 pet is allowed per booking. Please note that pets are only allowed upon request and subject to approval. Additional charges may apply.

name: Holiday Inn Express Amsterdam - Sloterdijk Station By IHG
description: Holiday Inn Express is next to Sloterdijk train station which offers convenient connections to Amsterdam Central Train Station and Schiphol Airport. It has modern rooms with flat-screen TV's and free Wi-Fi. Each of the rooms at Holiday Inn Express Amsterdam - Sloterdijk Station features modern furnishings, box-spring beds, an LCD TV and a bathroom with a walk-in shower. Other amenities include a desk and a tea/coffee maker. Guests can enjoy a drink at the bar and snacks, sandwiches and drinks can be bought from the vending machines in the lobby. Guests can also eat out at one of the restaurants in the surrounding area of the hotel. Amsterdam’s historic center is a 5-minute train ride away. It is 1.5 miles from the hotel to the Westergasfabriek. and the famous Vondelpark is 2.5 miles away. Schiphol Airport is 10-minutes away by train and by car.

name: Park Plaza Victoria Amsterdam
neighborhood: Royal Palaca - Central Station - Dam Square
description: Park Plaza Victoria Amsterdam is located in a historical building opposite Amsterdam Central Station. It features a brasserie with focus on quality Dutch food. This 4-star hotel offers well-appointed guest rooms. They are decorated with warm colors and large windows. Each room has a private bathroom with a bath or shower, air conditioning and coffee/tea facilities. The contemporary designed restaurant offers all-day dining serving international cuisine with Dutch influences. A breakfast buffet is also served. Guests can enjoy homemade pastries, freshly brewed coffee and a smooth jazz soundtrack at VIC's BAR. A selection of international spirits, local beers and enticing à la carte dishes is also available. Park Plaza Victoria Amsterdam is located at walking distance from Dam Square and the Royal Palace. Schiphol Airport is just 15 minutes by train and 20 minutes by car.

name: Leonardo Hotel Amsterdam Rembrandtpark
description: Leonardo Hotel Amsterdam Rembrandtpark offers modern and elegant rooms next to Rembrandtpark and the A10 ring road in Amsterdam. It includes a 17th-floor sky bar with scenic views over Amsterdam and free WiFi. Guests can make use of the shuttle bus service to Schiphol Airport. All of the air-conditioned rooms at Leonardo Hotel Amsterdam Rembrandtpark come with flat-screen TV, a seating area and tea/coffee making facilities. They also have a bathroom with a bath or shower. Guests can enjoy a refreshing work out in the spacious gym, relax in the sauna or top up their tan in the solarium. Guests can order a cocktail or other beverages while soaking up a 360-degree view over Amsterdam from the Floor17 Rooftop Terrace with its special Drink, Dine & Dance concept. Guests can also benefit from the 24-hour breakfast service. Schiphol Airport is 15 minutes' drive from Leonardo Hotel Amsterdam Rembrandtpark, and a shuttle is available on request. Admiraal Helfrichstraat tram stop, offering a direct tram connection to Dam Square in approximately 20 minutes, is 1148 feet away. There is an indoor car park available on site.

name: NH Schiphol Airport
description: NH Schiphol Airport offers comfortable accommodations and a wellness center near Schiphol Airport. Whether you have to catch a flight or need a few days of rest, this NH hotel is a practical choice. Free Wi-Fi is available in all areas. The hotel does not offer free parking, it is 22.50€ for each day instead. The hotel has cozy rooms that have a bath and coffee and tea facilities. You can choose a comfortable pillow from the NH pillow menu. Make sure you visit the wellness center with its indoor swimming pool, fitness area, sauna and Turkish steam bath. It also features a whirlpool. You can also play squash and tennis. Restaurant Gusto serves breakfast as well as international cuisine throughout the day. The open-plan Meeting Point restaurant serves drinks, lunch and dinner in an informal setting. The Point bar shows sports events while serving drinks and snacks. NH Schiphol Airport is a 5-minute ride away from the airport. Shuttle service from and to the airport is offered, extra cost may apply. From Schiphol, there are direct train connections to the RAI congress center, the World Trade Center and Amsterdam.

name: Van der Valk Hotel Schiphol
description: Van der Valk Schiphol is 10 minutes’ drive from Schiphol Airport and 13 mi from Amsterdam. Guests benefit from the shuttle service and free WiFi throughout the hotel. Guests benefit from free parking during their stay at the hotel. All rooms and suites at Van der Valk Hotel Schiphol have a private bathroom with a shower and/or bath. An extensive buffet breakfast is served daily in the restaurant. International dishes are offered at lunchtime and in the evening. Van der Valk features an extensive wellness center including an indoor swimming pool plus a sauna, steam bath and more. There are also unique heated lounge chairs where guests can relax. In addition, the hotel offers a gym with all modern high tech equipment, as well as an outdoor tracking field. Van der Valk Hotel Schiphol is only 20 minutes from the RAI Exhibition Center and the Keukenhof.

name: Volkshotel
description: Volkshotel is located in the East district of Amsterdam, only 164 feet from metro station Wibautstraat. It offers a vibrant lobby café, a nightly cocktail bar, work places, meeting rooms and a creative hub that includes studios for designers and music producers. The 7th floor features a restaurant with 360º view over Amsterdam. Guests benefit from free WiFi. Each hotel room features a minimalistic décor and private rooms with shared private bathrooms. Flat-screen TVs are available in rooms with attached bathroom. The restaurant serves tasty meals and is also popular among locals. On the rooftop, there’s a mini spa with three hot tubs and a sauna. Next to that the hotel offers yoga, sports classes and a range of cultural events. Volkshotel has a lively night program on weekends. The river Amstel is a 2-minute walk from the Volkshotel, while Oosterpark is 2789 feet away. A variety of bars and restaurants can also be found there. The hotel is 0.8 mi from De Pijp, 1.4 mi from Rembrandtplein and 1.7 mi from the museum quarter.

name: Moxy Amsterdam Schiphol Airport
description: Moxy Amsterdam Schiphol Airport - a stylish and playful hotel, just minutes away from Schiphol Airport. At the hotel you will experience smart service and an industrial design. Airport shuttle service is available upon request and free high-speed WiFi is available throughout. There is also a fitness center at the hotel. Guest rooms in the hotel are equipped with a Smart flat-screen TV, air conditioning and a private bathroom with a walk-in shower and hairdryer. A buffet breakfast is available daily at the accommodations. Guests at Moxy Amsterdam Schiphol Airport will be able to enjoy activities in and around Hoofddorp, like cycling. Bike rental is available at the hotel for your convenience. Speaking English and Dutch, staff at the 24-hour front desk can help you plan your stay. The nearest airport is Schiphol, 1.9 mi from the hotel, and the property offers an airport shuttle service

name: Holiday Inn Express Amsterdam - Schiphol By IHG
description: Holiday Inn Express features modern decorated rooms with free WiFi and a free breakfast in the morning. Holiday Inn Express Amsterdam Schiphol benefits from sound-proofed rooms with air conditioning, a work desk and tea and coffee making facilities. They have a flat-screen TV with international channels and a private bathroom with a walk-shower. Guests can enjoy a drink at the bar and snacks, sandwiches and drinks can be bought from the vending machines in the lobby. Guests can also eat out at one of the restaurants in the surrounding area of the hotel. The center of Amsterdam, including the Rijksmuseum, Van Gogh Museum and Dam Square, can be reached by car within 30 minutes. Holiday Inn Express Schiphol features a business corner and a 24-hour front desk. The hotel is located close to the A4 highway to The Hague.

name: Inntel Hotels Amsterdam Landmark
description: Featuring a fitness center, a terrace as well as a bar, Inntel Hotels Amsterdam Landmark is located in the center of Amsterdam, 1.1 miles from Artis Zoo. Among the facilities at this property are room service and a 24-hour front desk, along with free WiFi throughout the property. Certain rooms at the property include a balcony with a city view. The hotel will provide guests with air-conditioned rooms with a desk, an electric tea pot, a fridge, a safety deposit box, a flat-screen TV and a private bathroom with a shower. Guest rooms feature a closet. Guests at Inntel Hotels Amsterdam Landmark can enjoy a buffet breakfast. At the accommodation you'll find a restaurant serving Dutch and French cuisine. Vegetarian, dairy-free and halal options can also be requested. Inntel Hotels Amsterdam Landmark offers 4-star accommodations with an indoor pool, sauna and hammam. The area is popular for cycling, and bike rental is available at the hotel. Rembrandt House is 2.3 miles from Inntel Hotels Amsterdam Landmark, while Royal Theater Carré is 2.3 miles away. Schiphol Airport is 11 miles from the property.

name: Doubletree By Hilton Hotel Amsterdam Central Station
description: DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station has modern rooms, business facilities with the latest technology, a fitness center and an ideal location overlooking the River IJ and city center. It is next to Amsterdam Central Railway Station. The dutch coastline is located less than 1-hour away by public transport. All of the guest rooms at DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station feature floor-to-ceiling windows, a flatscreen TV and complimentary WiFi. DoubleTree by Hilton Amsterdam Centraal Station includes a high-tech gym and many open-air spaces including a courtyard. Guests can enjoy a delicious and wide arranged breakfast on the ground floor. Before starting their journeys around the city, or just to have a small and cozy break, our new coffee store LOT61 offers high quality coffee and fresh drinks. For lunch or coffee time, or at night, come up to our rooftop bar LuminAir, a high vibe sky bar and terrace, dedicated to the craft of new wave mixology. Tram and metro connections are available less than a 2-minute walk away. Dam Square is a 5-minute walk from the hotel. Amsterdam Schiphol Airport is 20 minutes away by train or car.

name: Holiday Inn Express Amsterdam Arena Towers By IHG
description: Holiday Inn Express Amsterdam Arena Towers is located in the center of Amsterdam Southeast, the most dynamic entertainment area of that part of Amsterdam. Free WiFi access is available throughout the hotel. All rooms are located on the 7th floor or higher. Snacks, sandwiches and drinks can be bought from the vending machines in the lobby. Each room at Holiday Inn Express Amsterdam Arena Towers features a modern decor, an LCD TV, box-spring beds and a bathroom with a walk-in shower. Other amenities include a work desk and a tea/coffeemaker. Guests at this 3-star hotel can make use of the facilities offered by the neighboring 4-star Holiday Inn Hotel, which is located in the same building. These facilities include meeting and event spaces, the hotel's Open Lobby Restaurant, which offers an all day dining experience with a varied menu with high quality ingredients, and a To Go Café with Starbucks products. If you like to explore the surroundings, Heineken Music Hall is 1640 ft away, while Ziggo Dome is 2297 ft. Amsterdam Arena and the IMAX theater are both 1969 ft. A wide variety of shops and restaurants can be found are within walking distance from the hotel. The train and metro station is only 2133 ft with direct links to Central station in 15 minutes. Schiphol Airport is a 10-minute drive away. You can park your car at one of the 450 parking spots offered at Holiday Inn Express Amsterdam Arena Towers at a surcharge.

name: Hampton By Hilton Amsterdam Airport Schiphol
description: This 4-star hotel is located just a 4-minute train ride from Schiphol Airport. Hampton by Hilton offers free Wi-Fi and free use of the fitness center. Amsterdam’s historical center is 20 minutes by train. Each air-conditioned, soundproofed room has an LCD TV with international channels, a work desk, tea-and-coffee-making facilities and a pillow menu. Bathrooms are fitted with a walk-in shower. A complimentary hot breakfast buffet is served daily, and guests can enjoy a drink at the bar. The hotel offers international cuisine in its restaurant. Hampton by Hilton Schiphol hotel has a 24-hour front desk and business center. Guests can store their luggage for free and make use of the safety deposit boxes located in the rooms for free as well. Amsterdam South Axis business district is a 13-minutes’ train ride. RAI event hall is 15 minutes by train from Hampton by Hilton. It is a 5-minute drive to the A4 highway. Hoofddorp Train Station is 525 feet away.

name: Hotel De Hallen
description: Hotel De Hallen is located in the Oud-West district of Amsterdam, 1.2 mi from Dam Square. It offers an a la carte restaurant and nonsmoking rooms with free WiFi. Rooms here will provide you with a flat-screen TV, air conditioning and upon request a mini fridge. Tea and coffee making facilities are included. Private bathrooms also come with free toiletries and a hairdryer. Tram stop Kinkerstraat is 1640 ft away and offers direct links to Central Station in 20 minutes. The market at Ten Katestraat is 5 minutes by foot. Leidseplein is 1 mi away.

name: Hotel Mai Amsterdam
neighborhood: Royal Palaca - Central Station - Dam Square
description: Great care is taken to ensure guests experience comfort through top-notch services and amenities. Remain linked during your visit by utilizing the complimentary internet access available.Prior to your check-in date, you can arrange airport transportation services, guaranteeing a seamless and efficient experience for both arrival and departure.Effortlessly plan your daily activities and travel requirements with express check-in or check-out, luggage storage and safety deposit boxes provided by the front desk services.For extended visits or whenever required, the dry cleaning service and laundry service ensures your preferred travel garments remain clean and accessible.Need some relaxation? Your room features daily housekeeping to make your stay even more comfortable and enjoyable.The hotel is completely smoke-free.Crafted for coziness, every guestroom provides an array of features, guaranteeing a tranquil night's sleep while maintaining the level of comfort.For a more enjoyable stay, select rooms at hotel are equipped with linen service and air conditioning. For certain chosen rooms, guests can enjoy in-room amusement like television and cable TV as a part of their stay.Rest assured that your hydration needs will be met, as some guestrooms are equipped with a coffee or tea maker and instant tea.It is worth noting that certain guest bathrooms feature a hair dryer, toiletries and bathrobes for your convenience. Each morning at Hotel Mai Amsterdam, a scrumptious, homemade breakfast kick-starts the day.During your visit, indulge in a range of delightful culinary choices at hotel to enhance your experience. Experience a fantastic evening effortlessly! Relish an entertaining night without venturing beyond the confines of the bar.

name: ibis Styles Amsterdam Airport
description: ibis Styles Amsterdam Airport offers air-conditioned rooms and a free shuttle service near Schiphol International Airport. Free WiFi is available throughout the hotel and paid parking can be found in the nearby parking lot. The hotel has 141 spacious and soundproof rooms with a focus on design, equipped with black-out curtains and LED TVs. The vibrant Skymaster Restaurant & Bar offers a full service concept from morning till after midnight, catering for all meals of the day. Guests can enjoy activities such as cycling, canoeing and horse riding in the Amsterdamse Bos, a large city park located close to the hotel. The city center of Amsterdam and several popular destinations such as RAI Convention Center, Keukenhof, Rijksmuseum or Johan Cruijff ArenA can be reached by bus or train in 45 minutes.

name: Amedia Amsterdam Airport, Trademark Collection by Wyndham
description: Featuring free WiFi throughout the property, AMEDIA Hotel Amsterdam Airport offers accommodations in Schiphol with a 24 hours reception . Guests can enjoy the on-site bar. Private parking is available on site. Rooms have a TV with satellite channels. Some rooms have a seating area for your convenience. You will find a kettle in the room. Every room is fitted with a private bathroom. For your comfort, you will find free toiletries and a hairdryer. The nearest airport is Schiphol Airport, 2.5 mi from the property.

name: XO Hotels Park West
description: Attractively set in the Sloterdijk district of Amsterdam, XO Hotels Park West is located 2.5 miles from Anne Frank House, 2.6 miles from Amsterdam Central Station and 3.7 miles from Vondelpark. Featuring a shared lounge, the 4-star hotel has air-conditioned rooms with free WiFi, each with a private bathroom. Private parking is available on site. The rooms at the hotel come with a flat-screen TV with satellite channels and a safety deposit box. Guest rooms will provide guests with a fridge. XO Hotels Park West offers a buffet or continental breakfast. A business center and vending machines with snacks and drinks are available on site at the accommodation. Speaking German, English, Spanish and French at the reception, staff are ready to help around the clock. Van Gogh Museum is 4 miles from XO Hotels Park West, while Leidseplein is 4.9 miles from the property. Schiphol Airport is 8.7 miles away.

name: Mercure Amsterdam North Station
description: Located in Amsterdam, 2.6 miles from A'DAM Lookout, Mercure Amsterdam North Station provides accommodations with a fitness center, private parking, a shared lounge and a bar. With free WiFi, this 4-star hotel offers a 24-hour front desk and luggage storage space. Guests can have a drink at the snack bar. The hotel will provide guests with air-conditioned rooms with a desk, an electric tea pot, a fridge, a safety deposit box, a flat-screen TV and a private bathroom with a shower. Guest rooms include a closet. Breakfast is available, and includes buffet, à la carte and continental options. Rembrandt House is 3.5 miles from Mercure Amsterdam North Station, while Artis Zoo is 3.5 miles away. Schiphol Airport is 16 miles from the property.

name: Hotel Mercier
neighborhood: Jordaan - Canal Belt West - Ann Frank House
description: Conveniently set in Amsterdam, Hotel Mercier provides air-conditioned rooms, a garden, free WiFi and a shared lounge. Featuring a 24-hour front desk, this property also has a restaurant and a terrace. Guests can have a drink at the bar. Guest rooms at the hotel are equipped with a flat-screen TV and a safety deposit box. With a private bathroom equipped with a shower and free toiletries, certain units at Hotel Mercier also provide guests with a city view. Guests at the accommodation can enjoy a continental breakfast. Popular points of interest near Hotel Mercier include Anne Frank House, Rembrandtplein and Amsterdam Central Station. Schiphol Airport is 9.3 miles away.

name: ibis Amsterdam Centre Stopera
description: Hotel ibis Amsterdam Center Stopera is a 10 to 15-minute walk from Dam Square, Rembrandt Square and the station. It offers an 24-hour drink and snack service. The hotel rooms have air conditioning and feature flat-screen TVs. The ibis Center Stopera has a spacious courtyard where guests can sit during summer. Our breakfast is served every morning in our breakfast area. There are trams and buses available in the direct surrounding and the nearby metro station brings you to Central Station in 2 stops. Various restaurants, bars and shops are in the area as well.

name: easyHotel Amsterdam Arena Boulevard
description: easyHotel Amsterdam Arena Boulevard is located in east Amsterdam, next to Bijlmer Arena train station. It’s just 984 feet from the Johan Cruijff Arena and offers direct train connections to Amsterdam city center. Ideal for event‑goers or travelers looking for an affordable stay with excellent transport links. All rooms are fitted with a private bathroom with a shower. EasyHotel Amsterdam Arena Boulevard features free WiFi throughout the property. You will find a 24-hour front desk at the property. The surcharge of € 15 per dog per night. Please note that your room can be cleaned every 6th day for free. Extra room clean costs €20. Bike hire is available at this hotel and the area is popular for cycling. Amsterdam Studio's is 1.7 mi from easyHotel Amsterdam Arena Boulevard, while Amsterdam RAI is 3.1 mi from the property. The nearest airport is Schiphol Airport, 7.5 mi from the property.

name: Aston City Hotel
description: Aston City Hotel offers basic rooms on the edge of De Pijp district in Amsterdam. It is less than 328 feet from the Heineken Experience. This budget hotel includes free Wi-Fi and has a 24-hour front desk with a ticket service. Each of the simply-furnished rooms at Aston City Hotel has satellite TV. They also have a private bathroom. Stadhouderskade tram stop is less than 328 feet away and offers direct links to Amsterdam Central Railway Station and Dam Square within 15 minutes. Museum Square and the Rijksmuseum are 5 minutes’ walk away. Aston City Hotel is a 10-minute walk from Leidseplein.

name: Pestana Amsterdam Riverside
description: This luxury 5-star hotel located in a monumental building, the former Town Hall and Archive of the Amstel Community. Located near the Albert Cuypmarkt street market this hotel features a variety of facilities including a restaurant, a fully equipped fitness center, spa and massage services. Pestana Amsterdam Riverside provides rooms with air conditioning. Free WiFi is available throughout the property. All 154 luxury bedrooms and suites located in the Town Hall, Archive Building offer a flat-screen TV and coffee and tea facilities. Each building gives its own identity to the rooms and suites. The private bathroom is equipped with a shower, a hair dryer and free toiletries. Pestana Amsterdam also offers 16 studios equipped with a kitchenette. Some rooms offer a river view and feature a private bathroom with a bath. A buffet breakfast can be enjoyed in the breakfast area. ARCHIVE by Pestana restaurant has a patio garden at the hotel. There is an in-house bar and guests can also make use of the business area including 10 meeting rooms. The wellness area in the hotel includes 2 types of saunas, an indoor swimming pool and treatment of massage can be booked for complete relaxation. Speaking Portuguese and English at the 24-hour front desk, staff are ready to help around the clock. Parking is available on-site. Heineken Experience is a 18-minute walk from the property, while Carre Theater is a 12-minute walk away. Hermitage Amsterdam is 0.9 mi from the property while Rijksmuseum and Stedelijk museum are only 1.1 mi away.

name: Monbijou Hotel
description: Just 320 yards from Berlin’s lively Hackescher Markt square, this boutique hotel features a fitness center, rental bikes and stylish rooms with free Wi-Fi. Museum Island is only a quarter mile away. Decorated in a vintage British style, the rooms have large windows and hardwood floors. Comforts include a flat-screen TV with satellite channels, an iPod docking station and a private bathroom. Monbijou Hotel has a restaurant and bistro, and drinks can be enjoyed at the bar. You can also relax with a book in the Monbijou’s library area. A large variety of cafes, bars and shops are within a 5-minute walk of Hotel Monbijou. Hackescher Markt S-Bahn Train Station is 500 ft away, with services to Alexanderplatz and the Friedrichstraße shopping street.

name: Holiday Inn Express Berlin City Centre By IHG
description: This superior hotel offers air-conditioned rooms and excellent public transport links throughout Berlin. The Potsdamer Platz and Checkpoint Charlie are only a 12-minute walk away. The bright and spacious rooms at the Holiday Inn Express Berlin City Center feature a flat-screen satellite TV, tea/coffee facilities, a desk and a modern bathroom. Free WiFi is available throughout the hotel. A buffet breakfast is included in the reservation. It is served each morning in the Holiday Inn Express Berlin’s breakfast room or outside in the leafy courtyard. The reception is open 24 hours a day, and can arrange tickets for Berlin’s sights and cultural events. Holiday Inn Express Berlin City Center has an on-site parking garage. It is 1312 feet from Anhalter Bahnhof S-Bahn Train Station, with good train and bus connections to Berlin Main Station and Friedrichstraße shopping street.

name: InterContinental Berlin By IHG
description: Conveniently located in the center of Berlin, InterContinental Berlin by IHG provides air-conditioned rooms, a fitness center, free WiFi and a terrace. Featuring a bar, the hotel is close to several noted attractions, around a 10-minute walk from Zoologischer Garten Metro Station, 1.1 miles from Kurfürstendamm and 1.1 miles from Berlin Philharmonic Orchestra. The property has room service, an ATM and currency exchange for guests. Guest rooms at the hotel are equipped with a flat-screen TV with satellite channels and a safety deposit box. Each room is equipped with a private bathroom with free toiletries, while some feature city views. All rooms will provide guests with a desk and an electric tea pot. The breakfast offers buffet, continental or Full English/Irish options. At InterContinental Berlin by IHG you'll find a restaurant serving German and International cuisine. Vegetarian, dairy-free and vegan options can also be requested. Speaking Czech, German, Greek and English, staff at the reception can help you plan your stay. Holocaust Memorial is 1.7 miles from the accommodation, while Potsdamer Platz is 1.8 miles from the property. Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt Airport is 15 miles away, and the property offers a paid airport shuttle service.

name: Riu Plaza Berlin
description: Attractively set in Berlin, Riu Plaza Berlin has air-conditioned rooms with free WiFi, free private parking and room service. A fitness room and a bicycle rental service are available for guests. The hotel has a terrace and city views, and guests can enjoy a meal at the restaurant or a drink at the bar. The rooms at the hotel come with a flat-screen TV with satellite channels and a safety deposit box. At Riu Plaza Berlin rooms have a private bathroom with free toiletries and a hairdryer. A buffet breakfast is available at the accommodation. Languages spoken at the reception include Arabic, German, English and Spanish, and guests are invited to request advice on the area when needed. Zoologischer Garten Metro Station is a 14-minute walk from Riu Plaza Berlin, while Kurfürstendamm is 1.2 miles from the property. Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt Airport is 14 miles away.

name: Hilton Berlin
description: This centrally located hotel on Berlin’s historic Gendarmenmarkt Square features rooms, an exclusive spa and 2 restaurants with stunning views of the German Cathedral. A beautiful terrace with seating is located directly on the square. Decorated in warm colors, the Hilton Berlin’s elegant rooms come equipped with a flat-screen TV, a mini-bar, tea/coffee facilities and a bathtub with shower attachment. Some rooms offer access to the 1181 ft² Executive Lounge, including free breakfast, WiFi, snacks and drinks. Relax in the 2625 ft² LivingWell Health Club Berlin with a top-modern fitness center, an indoor pool, sauna and steam room (sauna charges apply). Our Listo offers perfect setting for any of the day. Relax with an afternoon coffee, enjoy excellent food with a focus on seasonal and local products in our separate restaurant area or unwind with drinks and snacks at the bar or in front of the fireplace in the cozy library corner. The famous Friedrichstraße shopping street is just around the corner. Stadtmitte Underground Station is located just outside the building. Valet and public parking is available.

name: Mondrian Suites Berlin AM Checkpoint Charlie
description: Located at the famous Checkpoint Charlie monument in central Berlin, this accommodations offers modern studios and apartments in varying sizes.The Jewish Museum and Friedrichstraße shopping street can both be reached within 5 minutes on foot. All units at Mondrian Suites Berlin am Checkpoint Charlie include a balcony or terrace and face the courtyard. Other facilities include a flat-screen TV, ironing facilities, a laptop safe, wooden flooring, a refrigerator, a microwave oven, a dishwasher, and a Nespresso coffee machine. Guests can also enjoy complimentary Molten Brown toiletries and a USB port. Additionally, the front desk is open 24-hours a day. The property is surrounded by international cafés and restaurants. Offering a bike rental service, the property is ideal for guests looking to explore the city. Berlin’s Brandenburg Gate is easily reachable by foot. Mondrian Suites Berlin am Checkpoint Charlie is set just a 2-minute walk from Kochstraße Underground Station.

name: Melia Berlin
description: Offering an exclusive Executive club and spacious rooms, this stylish hotel stands beside the River Spree on Berlin’s Friedrichstraße shopping street. Free and unlimited high-speed WiFi is featured throughout the property. The bright rooms and suites at the nonsmoking Meliá Berlin include a flat-screen TV, soundproofed windows, and a bathroom with heated floors. Spa facilities at the Meliá Berlin include a modern gym and sauna. Rental bicycles are provided on request. A rich buffet breakfast is offered each morning. Guests can also sample Mediterranean specialties and tapas in the bar. The Brandenburg Gate and many other famous sites are within 0.6 mi of the Meliá Berlin. Friedrichstraße Train Station is just 328 feet away, providing great underground, city rail, and tram links to all parts of Berlin.

name: Hotel Aldea Berlin Zentrum
description: Located in Berlin, within 1.1 miles of Berlin Philharmonic Orchestra and 1.5 miles of Zoologischer Garten Metro Station, Hotel Aldea Berlin provides a bar. The property is around 1.5 miles from Holocaust Memorial, 1.2 miles from Potsdamer Platz and 1.7 miles from Topography of Terror. Free WiFi is available and private parking can be arranged at an extra charge. Rooms are complete with a private bathroom, while certain rooms at the hotel also offer a seating area. A buffet breakfast is available at Hotel Aldea Berlin. Staff speak German and English at the reception. Checkpoint Charlie is 1.9 miles from the accommodation, while Kurfürstendamm is 1.9 miles away. Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt Airport is 13 miles from the property.

name: Wyndham Garden Berlin Mitte
description: Set in a historic building from the 1920s, this hotel in Berlin Mitte offers spacious rooms with free Wi-Fi in the whole hotel. It lies a 10-minute walk from Gesundbrunnen Train Station. Wyndham Garden Berlin Mitte offers classic or modern style rooms with a flat-screen TV and modern bathroom. You can get hot drinks facilities at reception. A daily newspaper is delivered to each room. A rich breakfast buffet is served in the Uhrwerk restaurant. The bar at the Wyndham Garden Berlin Mitte serves drinks and snacks, and features a terrace with glass roof. From Gesundbrunnen Train Station, guests can reach sights such as Alexanderplatz Square or the Brandenburg Gate in just 20 minutes. On-site private parking is available for an additional fee. Guests enjoy the use of a free internet terminal in reception.

name: Garner Hotel Berlin - Checkpoint Charlie By IHG
description: Located in Berlin and within a 9-minute walk of Topography of Terror, Garner Hotel Berlin - Checkpoint Charlie by IHG features a bar, non-smoking rooms, and free WiFi throughout the property. Popular points of interest nearby include Gendarmenmarkt, Berlin Philharmonic Orchestra and The Brandenburg Gate. Guests can have a drink at the snack bar. At the hotel each room includes a seating area, a flat-screen TV with cable channels, a safety deposit box and a private bathroom with a shower, free toiletries and a hairdryer. Guest rooms will provide guests with a desk and an electric tea pot. Guests at Garner Hotel Berlin - Checkpoint Charlie by IHG can enjoy a buffet breakfast. With staff speaking German and English, around the clock guidance is available at the reception. Popular points of interest near the accommodation include Checkpoint Charlie, Potsdamer Platz and Holocaust Memorial. Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt Airport is 16 miles away.

name: Maritim Proarte Hotel Berlin
description: This hotel in central Berlin offers elegant rooms and a spa area with an indoor pool. It is located on Friedrichstrasse shopping street, 984 feet from the underground station. The spacious, air-conditioned rooms and suites of the Maritim proArte Hotel Berlin feature Italian-style furnishings, satellite TV and a laptop safe. WiFi is provided free of charge for guests in the whole hotel. International cuisine as well as characteristic Berlin food is served in the hotel’s 2 restaurants in a cozy atmosphere. The Checkpoint bar offers an exquisite choice of cocktails, long drinks, high quality spirits as well as burgers, snacks and nibbles. The Maritim’s spa area includes a swimming pool, sauna, steam room and fitness room. Massages and beauty treatments are also available. The famous Unter den Linden Boulevard featuring the Brandenburg Gate is just 328 feet away. The UNESCO Museum Island is only 0.9 mi from the hotel. Other attractions within walking distance include the Friedrichstadt-Palast, Admiralspalast, Komische Oper, boat tours and Hackescher Markt.

name: Sana Berlin Hotel
description: Just 2297 ft from the KaDeWe department store on Berlin’s Kurfürstendamm, this stylish hotel offers soundproofed rooms, and dining in the Lobby Lounge, serving snacks and light meals throughout the day. The 4-star-superior SANA Berlin Hotel has modern, elegant rooms and self-catering apartments. They feature wooden floors, black-out curtains, and a laptop safe. Guests can make full use of the Hotel’s facilities: 1 Lobby Bar & Restaurant with Lounge terrace, a true urban meeting point for Guests, Locals and Visitors; 1 fitness space and a brand new SPA with indoor heated pool, a sauna with panoramic view, a Turkish bath, and a massage room. Berlin Zoo and the Kaiser Wilhelm Memorial Church are a 10-minute walk from the Hotel SANA Berlin. Augsburger Straße Underground Station is a 2-minute walk away. The hotel also offers bicycles and cars for hire.

name: Catalonia Berlin Mitte
description: Conveniently set in the center of Berlin, Catalonia Berlin Mitte provides air-conditioned rooms, a shared lounge, free WiFi and a terrace. Providing a restaurant, the property also features a bar, as well as a sauna. The property is non-smoking throughout and is located a 16-minute walk from Alexanderplatz. Guest rooms at the hotel are equipped with a flat-screen TV with satellite channels and a safety deposit box.
