Speaking German, English and Spanish, staff are willing to help at any time of the day at the reception. Popular points of interest near Catalonia Berlin Mitte include Alexanderplatz Metro Station, Gendarmenmarkt and Berlin Cathedral. Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt Airport is 14 miles away.

name: Meininger Hotel Berlin Hauptbahnhof
description: This hotel is located in the heart of Berlin, between Berlin Central Station and the Reichstag Parliament. The MEININGER offers soundproofed rooms with modern design and a flat-screen TV. The nonsmoking rooms at MEININGER Hotel Berlin Hauptbahnhof all feature a private bathroom. Free Wi-Fi is available in all rooms. Breakfast can be purchased each morning in the trendy M-Lounge. Guests are welcome to use the MEININGER's shared kitchen, TV and stereo, or relax in the Game Zone area. A washing machine and tumble dryer are also available for a fee. The MEININGER Berlin Hauptbahnhof offers panoramic views of the Government District and the Tiergarten Park. The Brandenburg Gate and Unter den Linden boulevard are a 10-minute walk away, and excellent public transport connections are available from Berlin Central Station.

name: Radisson Collection Hotel, Berlin
description: Well located in the center of Berlin, Radisson Collection Hotel, Berlin provides buffet breakfast and free WiFi throughout the property. Providing a restaurant, the property also features a terrace, as well as an indoor pool and a sauna. Certain rooms at the property include a balcony with a city view. The hotel will provide guests with air-conditioned rooms offering a desk, a coffee machine, a safety deposit box, a flat-screen TV and a private bathroom with a shower. Each room has an electric tea pot, while selected rooms come with a kitchenette with a fridge, a microwave and a stovetop. Guest rooms have a closet. Radisson Collection Hotel, Berlin offers 5-star accommodations with a spa center. Languages spoken at the reception include German, English, Spanish and French. Popular points of interest near the accommodation include Berlin Cathedral, Neues Museum and German Historical Museum. Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt Airport is 17 miles away.

name: MEININGER Hotel Berlin Airport
description: Offering free WiFi, this hotel is located next to Berlin Brandenburg Airport. It offers a rooftop terrace, a fitness room, and a lounge with billiard table. The modern rooms at Meininger Hotel Berlin Airport feature wooden floors, and the TV offers Sky satellite channels. Each room has a stylish private bathroom. A daily buffet breakfast is available for an extra cost from 06:30 to 10:30, and lunch packages are also available upon request. Guests can also relax in the Airliner lounge, in the bar or in the bistro. Private parking is available for an extra fee.

name: Premier Inn Berlin Alexanderplatz
description: Premier Inn Berlin Alexanderplatz is well located in Berlin, and provides a restaurant and free WiFi. This property is located a short distance from attractions such as Berlin TV Tower, Neues Museum, and German Historical Museum. Pergamon Museum is 1.1 miles from the hotel and Gendarmenmarkt is 1.5 miles away. At the hotel, all rooms include a desk. At Premier Inn Berlin Alexanderplatz, each room includes a private bathroom with a hairdryer. The breakfast offers buffet, continental or Full English/Irish options. Around the clock assistance is available at the reception, where staff speak German and English. Popular points of interest near the accommodation include Alexanderplatz Metro Station, Alexanderplatz and Berlin Cathedral. Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt Airport is 16 miles away.

name: Estrel Hotel Berlin
description: This 4-star-superior hotel in Berlin's Neukölln district is part of a large convention and entertainment center. It offers live shows, a spa, and a direct bus link to Schönefeld Airport. Free WiFi is available. The spacious rooms at the Estrel Hotel Berlin are decorated in soft, natural colors. Each room is air-conditioned and features soundproofed windows. The stylish bathroom includes a bathtub and hairdryer. Guests booking this accommodations enjoy free access to the on-site spa. International cuisine is served in the Estrel’s 3 restaurants. These are located in the large, timelessly elegant atrium. There are also 2 bars and a garden overlooking the Neukölln canal. Musical and comedy concerts are shown on site. Guests can also relax in the Estrel’s sauna or work out in the gym. Sonnenallee S-Bahn Station is just a 2-minute walk from the Estrel Berlin. Trains run directly to the ICC Exhibition Center.

name: Hampton by Hilton Berlin City Centre Alexanderplatz
description: This hotel is located in the heart of Berlin, just a 5-minute walk from Alexanderplatz Train Station. It offers a 24-hour reception as well as free WiFi and free use of the gym with weights and cardio equipment. The Hampton By Hilton Berlin City Center Alexanderplatz features contemporary-style rooms with a top-quality own-brand bed and a 55-inch flat-screen TV. Each room also has a large desk, tea/coffee facilities and a private bathroom. A hot breakfast is provided each morning at the Hampton By Hilton Berlin City Center. This consists of eggs, baked beans, waffles, fruit and many more options. Many cafés and restaurants can be found in the surrounding area. The Hampton By Hilton Berlin City Center Alexanderplatz also has a business center. Guests enjoy free use of a computer with free WiFi and there is also a fax and photocopy service. The nearby train station gives great access to public transport around Berlin by train, underground, bus and tram. Parking is available at the hotel for a daily surcharge.

name: Nhow Berlin
description: Nhow Berlin features a fitness center, terrace, a restaurant and bar in Berlin. The property is located a 5-minute walk from East Side Gallery, 2.3 miles from Alexanderplatz and 2.3 miles from Alexanderplatz Metro Station. Providing free WiFi throughout the property, the allergy-free hotel has a sauna and evening entertainment. The hotel will provide guests with air-conditioned rooms with a desk, a coffee machine, a safety deposit box, a flat-screen TV and a private bathroom with a shower. Nhow Berlin provides certain rooms with river views, and each room is equipped with an electric tea pot. Guest rooms include a closet. A buffet, continental or American breakfast is served at the property. The area is popular for cycling, and bike rental is available at the accommodation. A business center and vending machines with snacks and drinks are available on site at nhow Berlin. Speaking German and English, staff will be happy to provide guests with practical guidance on the area at the reception. Berlin Cathedral is 2.7 miles from the hotel, while Berlin TV Tower is 2.8 miles away. Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt Airport is 14 miles from the property.

name: acom-Hotel Berlin Kurfurstendamm
description: This elegant hotel is located directly on Berlin’s Kurfürstendamm shopping street, a 4-minute walk from the Kaiser Wilhelm Memorial Church. Acom Hotel Kurfürstendamm Berlin provides free WiFi and great public transport links. Hotel Kurfürstendamm Berlin features Baroque interiors with large pillars and beautiful wall paintings. All rooms are soundproofed and include cable TV and a modern bathroom. The classically-furnished breakfast room offers a direct view of the Kurfürstendamm. Guests can enjoy a rich breakfast buffet and drinks at the bar or in the cozy lounge with fireplace. Hotel Kurfürstendamm Berlin is a 10-minute walk from Berlin Zoo and the KaDeWe Department Store. It is a 2-minute walk from the Kurfürstendamm Underground Station and Zoologischer Garten Train Station. It is 7 minutes from Berlin’s A100 city motorway.

name: NH Berlin Potsdamer Platz
description: Located in Berlin, a 11-minute walk from Topography of Terror, NH Berlin Potsdamer Platz provides accommodations with a garden, private parking, a terrace and a bar. Featuring free bikes, the 4-star hotel has air-conditioned rooms with free WiFi, each with a private bathroom. The property has room service, a 24-hour front desk and luggage storage for guests. At the hotel, all rooms have a desk. All guest rooms at NH Berlin Potsdamer Platz are equipped with a flat-screen TV with cable channels and a safety deposit box. The breakfast offers buffet, continental or American options. Popular points of interest near the accommodation include Potsdamer Platz, Checkpoint Charlie and Holocaust Memorial. Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt Airport is 16 miles away.

name: A&O Berlin Hauptbahnhof
description: Just a 10-minute walk from Berlin Central Station, this hostel offers modern rooms, a 24-hour reception, and daily buffet breakfasts. On-site parking is available. Located in a quiet side street, the family-friendly a&o Berlin Hauptbahnhof has brightly decorated rooms with a private bathroom. WiFi is free in all rooms as well as in the lobby. Varied dinners are prepared at the a&o Berlin Hauptbahnhof on request. The a&o’s lobby bar invites guests to relax with a drink. The games room at the a&o Berlin Hauptbahnhof includes a billiards table and table football. A souvenir shop, bicycle rental, and free luggage storage facilities are also available. Guests can enjoy satellite TV broadcasting various sport channels in the lobby and bar. S-Bahn trains run from Berlin Central Station to Alexanderplatz Square in 5 minutes. The a&o Berlin Hauptbahnhof’s multilingual reception team can book sightseeing tours.

name: Ibis Styles Hotel Berlin Mitte
description: This 2-star-superior hotel in Berlin’s Mitte district lies beside Rosenthaler Platz Underground Station, a 10-minute walk from Hackescher Markt. It offers air-conditioned rooms with free Wi-Fi and a 24-hour reception. The modern, nonsmoking rooms of the ibis Styles Hotel Berlin Mitte include a flat-screen TV with free sports and movie channels. Guests also enjoy free national phone calls. A Wii console is available on request. Breakfast is served every morning, and tea, coffee, and water are available free of charge in the lobby bar from 12:00 p.m. to 10:00 p.m. The Welcome Lounge serves a selection of drinks and snacks throughout the day. Younger guests will enjoy the play area in the lobby. Alexanderplatz is just a 15-minute walk from ibis Styles Hotel Berlin Mitte.

name: Hotel Berlin, Berlin
description: Well set in the center of Berlin, Hotel Berlin, Berlin, a member of Radisson Individuals provides air-conditioned rooms, a fitness center, free WiFi and a garden. Well situated in the Mitte district, this hotel has a terrace, as well as a sauna. Guests can have a drink at the bar. At the hotel, all rooms have a desk. Every room has a private bathroom with a hairdryer, while some feature city views. All guest rooms at Hotel Berlin, Berlin, a member of Radisson Individuals are equipped with a flat-screen TV with satellite channels and a safety deposit box. Breakfast is available, and includes buffet, continental and vegetarian options. At the accommodation you'll find a restaurant serving German, International and European cuisine. Vegetarian, vegan and gluten-free options can also be requested. Languages spoken at the reception include German and English, and guests are invited to request guidance on the area when needed. Zoologischer Garten Metro Station is a 16-minute walk from Hotel Berlin, Berlin, a member of Radisson Individuals, while Berlin Philharmonic Orchestra is 1.1 miles away. Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt Airport is 14 miles from the property.

name: Ibis Berlin Hauptbahnhof
description: Offering hotel accommodations with free WiFi access in all areas, Ibis Berlin Hauptbahnhof is centrally located in Berlin. It is just 984 feet from Berlin Central Station. Each room at Ibis Berlin Hauptbahnhof comes complete with air conditioning, a desk and a flat-screen TV featuring satellite channels. All rooms also have a private bathroom providing a shower and a hairdryer. Guests can enjoy a drink or a snack in the hotel's in-house bar and a snack bar. Additionally, various restaurants and eateries can be found within walking distance. Many popular attractions such as the Brandenburg Gate (1.2 mi), the Reichstag parliament building (0.9 mi) and the Natural History Museum (2461 feet) are located close by. Berlin Tegel Airport is 4.7 mi away.

name: DoubleTree by Hilton Berlin Ku'damm
description: This hotel is located in the heart of the historic Berlin Ku'damm and offers 420 renovated guestrooms and suites, with access to a fitness facility. Escape to pure luxury and convenience at the DoubleTree by Hilton Berlin Ku’damm. Experience the refined ambiance of our fully renovated hotel, where tastefully designed rooms and suites offer a serene sanctuary, allowing you to unwind and relax in comfort. All of the rooms feature a flat-screen TV, a mini-bar-fridge, a working desk and free highspeed WiFi. Indulge in modern cuisine at " Berlin Eatery" and unwind in the spacious "The Bar". With a prime location near historical attractions, such as the significant Memorial Church, and easy access to public transportation, let us redefine your Berlin experience with a stay that exceeds all expectations.

name: Schulz Hotel Berlin Wall at the East Side Gallery
description: This hotel is located directly next the East Side Gallery in the cool Friedrichshain district of Berlin. The hotel features free WiFi, bar & canteen and a beer garden directly at the Berlin Wall. All rooms offer free WiFi, a TV and a bathroom with shower and complimentary toiletries. The Bakery offers toasted panini and several Portuguese pastries, coffee, a range of beers and soft drinks. Other facilities for guests at Schulz Hotel Berlin Wall include a guest kitchen and a youth lounge with football table.

name: ibis Budget Berlin City Potsdamer Plat
description: Just 984 feet from Checkpoint Charlie and 1 mi from the famous Brandenburg Gate, this stylish hotel enjoys a central location in Berlin. It offers buffet breakfasts and stylish rooms with free WiFi. Ibis Budget Berlin Potsdamer Platz features bright rooms decorated with contemporary furnishings. Each is complete with a flat-screen TV, automatic air conditioning, a desk and a modern bathroom. A hearty buffet breakfast is served each morning in the hotel’s trendy restaurant. In the evenings, guests are welcome to relax with a refreshing drink at the bar of the adjoining Ibis hotel. Ibis Budget Berlin Potsdamer Platz is 1.2 mi from the Berlin Wall Memorial Museum and 1640 feet from the popular Friedrichstraße shopping street. Parking is available for an extra charge at Ibis Budget Berlin Potsdamer Platz. Berlin Tegel Airport is 7.5 mi away.

name: AC Hotel by Marriott Berlin Humboldthain Park
description: Well set in the center of Berlin, AC Hotel by Marriott Berlin Humboldthain Park provides air-conditioned rooms, a fitness center, free WiFi and a terrace. The property is around 1.3 miles from Memorial of the Berlin Wall, 2 miles from Natural History Museum, Berlin and 2.6 miles from Berlin Central Station. Featuring a private bathroom with a shower and free toiletries, some units at AC Hotel by Marriott Berlin Humboldthain Park also provide guests with a city view. All guest rooms in the accommodation are equipped with a flat-screen TV and a hairdryer. A buffet breakfast is available at AC Hotel by Marriott Berlin Humboldthain Park. At the hotel you'll find a restaurant serving Mediterranean and Spanish cuisine. Vegetarian, dairy-free and vegan options can also be requested. There's an on-site bar and guests can also use the business area. Speaking German, English and Spanish at the reception, staff are ready to help around the clock. Berlin Cathedral is 2.7 miles from AC Hotel by Marriott Berlin Humboldthain Park, while Alexanderplatz Metro Station is 2.7 miles away. Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt Airport is 19 miles from the property.

name: Hampton by Hilton Berlin City East Side Gallery
description: This stylish hotel lies in Berlin’s popular Friedrichshain district, right between the Uber Arena and the East Side Gallery. Hampton By Hilton Berlin City East Side Gallery provides contemporary-style rooms with a work area, laptop safe, a flat-screen TV and tea/coffee facilities. Bathrooms feature a walk-in shower. A continental or hot breakfast are provided each morning. Many bars, cafes and restaurants can be found nearby in this popular going-out district. Warschauer Straße Train Station is 2461 feet from the hotel. This provides direct S-Bahn connections to Berlin- Brandenburg-Airport and Berlin Main Station. Alexanderplatz in the heart of Berlin is only 5 minutes away by train.

name: Garner Hotel Berlin - Charlottenburg by IHG
description: Featuring a bar, Garner Hotel Berlin - Charlottenburg, an IHG Hotel offers rooms in Berlin, 1.7 miles from Kurfürstendamm and 1.8 miles from Zoologischer Garten Metro Station. The property is located 2 miles from Berlin Central Station, 2.5 miles from Berlin Philharmonic Orchestra and 2.5 miles from Natural History Museum, Berlin. The hotel features a sauna, a 24-hour front desk and free WiFi throughout the property. At the hotel all rooms come with air conditioning, a seating area, a flat-screen TV with cable channels, a safety deposit box and a private bathroom with a shower, free toiletries and a hairdryer. All guest rooms feature a desk. A buffet breakfast is available at Garner Hotel Berlin - Charlottenburg, an IHG Hotel. The Reichstag is 2.7 miles from the accommodation, while The Brandenburg Gate is 2.9 miles away. Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt Airport is 18 miles from the property.

name: Hotel Amano Grand Central
description: Attractively located in Berlin, Hotel AMANO Grand Central has air-conditioned rooms, a garden, free WiFi and a terrace. The property has a bar, as well as a restaurant serving Italian cuisine. The property is allergy-free throughout and is located a 5-minute walk from Berlin Central Station. The rooms at the hotel come with a flat-screen TV with satellite channels and a safety deposit box. At Hotel AMANO Grand Central, rooms contain a private bathroom with free toiletries and a hairdryer. A buffet breakfast is available at the accommodation. The area is popular for cycling, and bike rental is available at Hotel AMANO Grand Central. Languages spoken at the reception include German and English. Popular points of interest near the hotel include Natural History Museum, Berlin, Memorial of the Berlin Wall and The Brandenburg Gate. Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt Airport is 18 miles from the property.

name: Hotel Bristol Berlin
description: Located in Berlin and with Kurfürstendamm reachable within a 5-minute walk, Hotel Bristol Berlin has concierge services, non-smoking rooms, a restaurant, free WiFi throughout the property and a bar. The property is around a 7-minute walk from Zoologischer Garten Metro Station, 2.1 miles from Berlin Philharmonic Orchestra and 2.6 miles from Holocaust Memorial. A spa and wellness center comprising a fitness center, an indoor pool, a sauna, as well as a terrace can be used by all guests. Some rooms also feature a kitchenette with a microwave and a minibar. Guests at the hotel can enjoy a buffet breakfast. A business center and a bicycle rental service are also offered by Hotel Bristol Berlin. Speaking German, English, Spanish and French at the reception, staff are always at hand to help. Potsdamer Platz is 2.7 miles from the accommodation, while The Reichstag is 2.8 miles from the property. Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt Airport is 17 miles away.

name: Moxy by Marriott Berlin Ostbahnhof
description: This stylish new hotel is located close to Berlin's Ostbahnhof train station, just 2 city rail stops from Alexanderplatz. Newly opened in September 2016, the MOXY Berlin Ostbahnhof offers free high-speed WiFi in all areas. The contemporary rooms are equipped with free high-speed WiFi, a built-in USB port and a 42-inch flat-screen TV. All rooms are nonsmoking and also offer air conditioning and a private bathroom. A free welcome (alcoholic or soft) drink is provided on arrival. A continental breakfast can be purchased each morning at MOXY Berlin Ostbahnhof. Snacks are drinks are also available 24/7. Guests are welcome to relax in the lobby or public areas that include modern ergonomic seating, large writing walls and a 56-inch flat-screen TV. Pets are also welcome at the hotel. The MOXY Berlin Ostbahnhof is ideally placed for exploring Berlin's city center attractions and also the hip going-out areas in the Friedrichhain and Kreuzberg districts.

name: Grand Hyatt Berlin
description: This 5-star hotel has a large rooftop spa and pool with spectacular views of Berlin. Located in the lively Potsdamer Platz district, 984 feet from the Sony Center, it also offers stylish restaurants and bars. Grand Hyatt Berlin’s elegant rooms and suites feature 55-inch TVs and hot drinks facilities. The marble bathrooms include flat-screen TVs, and free WiFi. All guests receive a free bottle of mineral water. All guests at the hotel enjoy free access to the Club Olympus Spa & Fitness, which offers great views of the Berlin skyline. Facilities include a pool, spa pool and modern gym, as well as various saunas. Massages and beauty treatments are available for a surcharge. International, Asian and seasonal cuisine is served in the Vox Restaurant. During summer months, guests can dine on the Grand Hyatt’s terrace. The Berlin Philharmonic Hall and Tiergarten Park are a 5-minute walk away. The Brandenburg Gate can be reached on foot in less than 15 minutes.

name: Holiday Inn - the niu, Hide Berlin Friedrichshain By IHG
description: Located in Berlin, 2.7 mi from Alexanderplatz, the niu Hide features a bar. Located around 3.1 mi from Berlin TV Tower, the hotel with free WiFi is also 3.1 mi away from Museum Island. The rooms in the hotel are fitted with a flat-screen TV. All rooms feature a private bathroom and a Teufel Boomster™ sound system. This accommodations has a restaurant and a buffet breakfast is available each morning at the niu Hide. This accommodations also offers a 24-hour reception. German Historical Museum is 3.1 mi from the accommodations. The nearest airport is Berlin Brandenburg Airport, 15 mi from the niu Hide. The hotel parking lot is located on Level C of the Ring Center. The hotel entrance is located in Ring Center 2, opposite Smashmeister, next to the Freenet shop under the covered area – then take the elevator to the 5th floor to reach the hotel.

name: Hotel Berlin Potsdamer Platz by Leonardo Hotels
description: This modern luxury hotel in Berlin city center features a gym and a wellness area. It is a 10 minutes’ walk from Potsdamer Platz and other sights are within close proximity. The Posthouse Berlin Potsdamer Platz- Leonardo Limited Edition hotel features contemporary-style rooms. Each room comes with a flat-screen TV, mini-bar and hot drinks facilities. Breakfast is available each morning in the breakfast restaurant. Traditional Berlin cuisine is served in the hotel restaurant, where reservations are recommended. The hotel is located opposite Anhalter Bahnhof Train Station and is a 10-minute walk from Potsdamer Platz and Möckernbrücke‎ underground stations. From here, guests can reach Alexanderplatz square and the Brandenburg Gate in less than 15 minutes. Free public parking at the The Posthouse Berlin Potsdamer Platz- Leonardo Limited Edition is subject to availability. Berlin MainTrain Station is 2.1 mi away while Schönefeld Airport is 7.5 mi away.

name: Mercure Hotel Berlin City
description: Just 328 feet from the famous shopping street Friedrichstrasse, this modern hotel in central Berlin offers air-conditioned rooms with flat-screen TV, international cuisine, and easy underground connections. The Mercure Berlin City has bright, allergy-free rooms with a desk and spacious bathroom. Free WiFi is available in all areas of the hotel. International and local food is prepared in the Mercure Berlin’s restaurant with terrace. The Relax Bar serves German beer, fine wines, and small snacks. The Charité University Hospital is a 5-minute walk from the Mercure Berlin. It is 328 feet to Naturkundemuseum Underground Station which connects to Checkpoint Charlie in 7 minutes. The Mercure’s reception is open 24 hours a day. Private parking is available on request.

name: Hotel MOA Berlin
description: Located in Berlin, 2.5 miles from Berlin Central Station, Hotel MOA Berlin has accommodations with a fitness center, private parking, a restaurant and a bar. With free WiFi, this 4-star hotel offers room service and a 24-hour front desk. The property is 0.9 miles from the city center and 3 miles from Natural History Museum, Berlin. The hotel will provide guests with air-conditioned rooms offering a desk, an electric tea pot, a fridge, a safety deposit box, a flat-screen TV and a private bathroom with a shower. Some rooms contain a kitchenette with a microwave. The rooms have a closet. A buffet, continental or vegetarian breakfast is served at the property. The area is popular for cycling, and bike rental and car rental are available at Hotel MOA Berlin. Memorial of the Berlin Wall is 3.2 miles from the accommodation, while The Brandenburg Gate is 3.4 miles from the property. Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt Airport is 17 miles away.

name: Hollywood Media Hotel AM Kurfurstendamm
description: Well set in Berlin, Hollywood Media Hotel am Kurfürstendamm provides air-conditioned rooms with free WiFi, private parking and room service. This 4-star hotel offers a business center and a concierge service. The property has a shared lounge, an ATM and currency exchange for guests. All guest rooms at the hotel are equipped with a flat-screen TV with satellite channels and a safety deposit box. Every room includes a private bathroom with free toiletries, while certain rooms here will provide you with a balcony and others also provide guests with city views. Guest rooms feature a desk. Guests at Hollywood Media Hotel am Kurfürstendamm can enjoy a buffet breakfast. At the accommodation you'll find a restaurant serving British, French and German cuisine. Vegetarian, dairy-free and vegan options can also be requested. At Hollywood Media Hotel am Kurfürstendamm guests are welcome to use a sauna. Languages spoken at the reception include Arabic, German, English and French. Kurfürstendamm is a few steps from the hotel, while Zoologischer Garten Metro Station is a 12-minute walk away. Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt Airport is 17 miles from the property.

name: A&O Berlin Mitte
description: This hostel in central Berlin is a 10-minute walk from the famous East Side Gallery. It offers a variety of accommodations and a shared lounge. The a&o Berlin Mitte has a table tennis and air-hockey table and provides brightly decorated hotel and hostel rooms on different floors. WiFi is available in all rooms and public areas free of charge. A varied breakfast buffet is provided every morning at the a&o, and guests can relax in the bar in the evenings. Restaurants and cafés can be found within walking distance. Guests can enjoy satellite TV broadcasting various sport channels in the lobby and bar. In October 2018 the property has been completely refurbished. Heinrich-Heine underground station is a 5-minute walk away.

name: Hotel ROMY by AMANO
description: Attractively located in Berlin, Hotel ROMY by AMANO has air-conditioned rooms, a restaurant, free WiFi and a bar. The property is located 1.4 miles from Berlin Philharmonic Orchestra, 1.1 miles from The Brandenburg Gate and 1.6 miles from Holocaust Memorial. The property provides a concierge service and luggage storage space for guests. The rooms at the hotel come with a flat-screen TV and a safety deposit box. With a private bathroom equipped with a shower and free toiletries, certain accommodations at Hotel ROMY by AMANO also feature a city view. All guest rooms have a closet. A buffet breakfast is available at the accommodation. Speaking German and English, staff are willing to help at any time of the day at the reception. Popular points of interest near Hotel ROMY by AMANO include Berlin Central Station, Natural History Museum, Berlin and Memorial of the Berlin Wall. Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt Airport is 18 miles from the property.

name: Locke at East Side Gallery
description: Locke at East Side Gallery features a fitness center, terrace, a restaurant and bar in Berlin. Located around a 7-minute walk from East Side Gallery, the hotel with free WiFi is also 1.5 miles away from Alexanderplatz. Certain units at the property include a balcony with a city view. The hotel will provide guests with air-conditioned rooms offering a desk, an electric tea pot, a fridge, a microwave, a safety deposit box, a flat-screen TV and a private bathroom with a shower. Selected rooms contain a kitchen with a dishwasher and a stovetop. Guest rooms feature a closet. Around the clock guidance is available at the reception, where staff speak German and English. Alexanderplatz Metro Station is 1.5 miles from Locke at East Side Gallery, while Berlin Cathedral is 2 miles away. Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt Airport is 15 miles from the property.

name: Hotel MANI by AMANO
description: Well located in the center of Berlin, Hotel MANI by AMANO provides air-conditioned rooms, a garden, free WiFi and a terrace. The property is located a 17-minute walk from Alexanderplatz Metro Station, one mile from Berlin TV Tower and a 17-minute walk from Neues Museum. Guests can enjoy French and Middle Eastern dishes at the restaurant or have a drink at the bar. Guest rooms at the hotel are equipped with a flat-screen TV with satellite channels and a safety deposit box. With a private bathroom equipped with a shower and free toiletries, certain units at Hotel MANI by AMANO also offer a city view. All guest rooms include a desk. A buffet breakfast is available at the accommodation. Staff speak German and English at the reception. Popular points of interest near Hotel MANI by AMANO include Memorial of the Berlin Wall, Natural History Museum, Berlin and Berlin Cathedral. Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt Airport is 16 miles away.

name: Suite Novotel Berlin Potsdamer Platz
description: Located in Berlin, a 7-minute walk from Topography of Terror, Novotel Suites Berlin City Potsdamer Platz provides accommodations with a fitness center, private parking, a terrace and a bar. With free WiFi, this 3-star hotel offers luggage storage space. Guests can have a drink at the snack bar. Guest rooms at the hotel come with air conditioning, a seating area, a flat-screen TV with satellite channels, a safety deposit box and a private bathroom with free toiletries and a hairdryer. The rooms will provide guests with a desk and an electric tea pot. Breakfast is available, and includes buffet, continental and vegetarian options. Speaking Arabic, German, English and Spanish at the reception, staff are ready to help around the clock. Popular points of interest near Novotel Suites Berlin City Potsdamer Platz include Checkpoint Charlie, Potsdamer Platz and Holocaust Memorial. Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt Airport is 16 miles away.

name: Hotel Goldmarie
description: Free Wi-Fi and stylish interiors are offered at this hotel in Berlin’s lively Friedrichshain district. Goldmarie is a 5-minute walk from Warschauer Straße S-Bahn Train Station. Newly opened in 2017, Goldmarie Berlin offers rooms with a desk and an private bathroom. Guests are welcome to relax in the lounge in the foyer. The bars, clubs and restaurants of the popular Simon-Dach-Straße are within a 5-minute walk. Breakfast is not available on site, but there are many places nearby to enjoy breakfast. Alexanderplatz and the Hackescher Markt entertainment district are within a 10-minute journey from Warschauer Straße S-Bahn Station. Frankfurter Tor Underground Station is a 10-minute walk from Goldmarie. The world-famous Berghain club and The Eastside Gallery, a large section of the former Berlin Wall, can be reached in a 10-minute walk. Sports events and music concerts take place in the Mercedes-Benz Arena, a 10-minute walk away.

name: Intercityhotel Berlin Hauptbahnhof
description: In a prime location in the center of Berlin, IntercityHotel Berlin Hauptbahnhof provides buffet breakfast and free WiFi throughout the property. Featuring a bar, the hotel is close to several noted attractions, around a 4-minute walk from Berlin Central Station, 0.8 miles from Natural History Museum, Berlin and a 18-minute walk from The Brandenburg Gate. Guests can have a drink at the snack bar. All guest rooms at the hotel come with air conditioning, a seating area, a flat-screen TV with satellite channels, a safety deposit box and a private bathroom with a shower. Guest rooms feature a desk. Staff at the 24-hour front desk speak German and English. Popular points of interest near IntercityHotel Berlin Hauptbahnhof include The Reichstag, Berlin Philharmonic Orchestra and Holocaust Memorial. Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt Airport is 18 miles away.

name: Safestay Berlin
description: This 3-star hotel is a 2-minute walk from the lively Wittenbergplatz Square in Berlin’s central Schöneberg district. It offers free Wi-Fi, colorful interiors and great transport connections. The rooms and apartments at the Safestay Berlin Kurfurstendamm are warmly furnished with wooden floors and historical-style furniture. All rooms include cable TV, a work desk and a private bathroom. A full breakfast buffet is served at the Safestay Berlin Kurfurstendamm each morning. Both breakfast rooms are decorated in a drawing room style and feature elegant stucco ceilings. The Safestay Berlin Kurfurstendamm is a 3-minute walk from the world-famous KaDeWe Department Store. There are many popular bars, cafes and restaurants nearby, and the Kurfüstendamm shopping mile begins a 5-minute walk away. On-site parking is available. From Wittenbergplatz, the U2 underground line offers direct connections to the ICC Exhibition Center, the Olympic Stadium and Potsdamer Platz Square.

name: The Westin® Grand Berlin
description: This hotel on Berlin's historic Friedrichstrasse offers a spa, an attractive garden, and a unique lobby with grand staircase. The Brandenburg Gate is a 10-minute walk away. The Westin Grand Berlin’s elegant rooms and suites feature flat-screen TVs and comfortable beds. Bathrobes and slippers are provided in the modern bathrooms, which include a hairdryer. The Relish Restaurant & Bar serves modern food with French and Asian influences. A rich breakfast buffet is available in the Coelln restaurant every day. Guests can enjoy drinks in the classical lobby bar, which has panoramic windows. The Westin Spa & Fitnesslounge includes a fitness center. Relaxing massages and a range of beauty treatments can be booked. Französische Strasse Underground Station is a 1-minute walk away. There are several bus stops on the famous Unter den Linden Boulevard, just 328 feet from the hotel.

name: Hilton Los Angeles Airport
description: Offering free 24-hour shuttle service to Los Angeles International Airport, this hotel features a spacious outdoor pool and whirlpool. Car hire service and 4 food venues are available at the hotel. Hilton Los Angeles Airport offers modern, elegantly decorated rooms with cable TV and a radio with MP3 connection. A coffee maker, work desk and ironing facilities are included. A variety of dining options are available at this hotel. The Café features American cuisine and the Bistro makes a variety of to-go items and brews Starbucks coffee 24 hours a day. Guests may also dine at Andiamo, a northern Italian restaurant or relax with a drink at Landings Bar in the evenings. Landings Bar and Grill now offers a dinner & cocktails daily. Guests of Hilton Los Angeles Airport are welcome to enjoy the on-site fitness center. A business center and gift shop are also available. Hilton Los Angeles Airport is less than 4 miles from Dockweiler Beach State Park and 20 minutes from downtown Santa Monica and proximity to SoFi Stadium, The Forum, and Intuit Dome.

name: Hilton Garden Inn LAX Los Angeles Airport
description: Just off Interstate 405 and only 1 mile from Los Angeles International Airport, this hotel offers many exceptional amenities. Popular area attractions, including Venice Beach and Santa Monica Beach are located only minutes from the Hilton Garden Inn Los Angeles Airport. The SoFi Stadium, Kia Forum, & Intuit Dome are also located near this hotel.

name: The Westin Bonaventure Hotel & Suites, Los Angeles
description: Featuring a restaurant with 35th floor panoramic views and an outdoor pool, this hotel is within 1 mi from the Grammy Museum, Los Angeles Convention Center, Peacock Theater L.A. LIVE and the Staples Center. Offering floor to ceiling windows, each modern air-conditioned room provides a laptop safe, wake-up service, a spacious desk and free spa toiletries in the private bathroom at The Westin Bonaventure Hotel & Suites, Los Angeles. Rooms are styled in earth tones and luxury linens. Starbucks coffee and Tazo tea-making facilities are also offered. A spacious seating area is featured in select suites. While overlooking downtown Los Angeles, gourmet steaks and seafood can be enjoyed at the LA Prime Restaurant at The Westin Bonaventure. Lakeview Bistro and BonVista Lounge feature classic American fare. Fresh snacks are featured in the Lobby Court. Dry cleaning services, valet parking, interactive cooking classes and a fitness center are available for guests at Los Angeles The Westin Bonaventure Hotel & Suites, Los Angeles. A 24-hour reception is at their service. Dodger Stadium is just 10 minutes’ drive away. Los Angeles International Airport is just 20 minutes’ drive from The Westin Bonaventure Hotel & Suites, Los Angeles. Venice Beach is 20 miles away

name: Sheraton Gateway Los Angeles Hotel
description: This modern hotel provides free 24-hour dedicated shuttle service to Los Angeles International Airport, just 3 minutes’ drive away. Guests can relax in the outdoor heated pool. Dining options are available on site. Each guest room includes a 50-inch LCD TV. All guest rooms at Sheraton Gateway Los Angeles Hotel offer modern décor along with an oversize work desk, a coffee machine and a refrigerator. The private bathrooms include a hairdryer and free toiletries. Costero California Bar and Bistro is open for dinner and specializes in locally sourced small plates. For breakfast guests can stop by Brasserie, which offers a breakfast buffet with custom made omelets and specialties such as brioche French toast. The on-site gym features free weights and cardio machines with personal TVs. Large windows provide views of the landscaped outdoor pool and hot tub. Loyola Marymount University is 3.1 mi away. Marina del Rey is 20 minutes’ drive away from Sheraton Gateway Los Angeles Hotel.

name: Sonesta Los Angeles Airport LAX
description: Step into a fully renovated retreat just minutes from LAX, where stylish interiors and a calming atmosphere provide the perfect backdrop for your journey. Located less than a mile from the airport and offering 24/7 complimentary shuttle service, our modern spaces capture the vibrant energy of Los Angeles, welcoming you to discover a world of nearby attractions. Explore the iconic shores of Venice Beach, feel the thrill of world-class venues like SoFi Stadium and Intuit Dome, and immerse yourself in the electric atmosphere that makes L.A. truly one-of-a-kind. Retreat to our thoughtfully designed rooms and suites, showcasing elevated interiors, plush bedding, and modern amenities that prioritize your comfort & relaxation. Indulge in culinary delights at our four onsite restaurants, each offering a distinct culinary experience that celebrates both local flavors and global cuisine.

name: Renaissance Los Angeles Airport Hotel
description: Renaissance Los Angeles Airport Hotel is located 1.2 mi from Los Angeles International LAX Airport. It has an outdoor pool and guest rooms with high speed internet and flat-screen cable TVs. Rooms at Renaissance Los Angeles Airport Hotel offer contemporary furnishing and are equipped with a mini refrigerator, a coffee machine and ironing facilities. Guests of Renaissance Los Angeles Airport Hotel can relax at the outdoor swimming pool or work out at the hotel’s fitness center that has cardiovascular equipment and free weights.There is also space for meetings and events available. The restaurant and bar Studio 12 serves American breakfast, lunch and dinner. It has a regional Californian wine menu. Los Angeles Airport Renaissance Hotel, A Marriott Luxury & Lifestyle Hotel is 3 mi away from Manhattan Beach. Westchester Golf Course is 1.9 mi from the hotel.

name: The Biltmore Los Angeles
description: Located in the heart of Downtown Los Angeles, the iconic Biltmore Los Angeles blends historic grandeur with modern comfort. Just a four-minute walk from Pershing Square Metro Station, the hotel offers convenient access to the city’s premier cultural, entertainment, and business destinations. Guests can enjoy on-site dining at the elegant Smeraldi's Restaurant for breakfast or unwind with handcrafted cocktails at the historic Gallery Bar & Grill. Guest rooms are designed with rich, warm tones and classic furnishings, featuring a work desk, in-room safe, coffee maker, and satellite TV for added comfort and convenience. The bathrooms include a hairdryer and refined finishes that reflect the hotel’s timeless style. During their stay, guests may relax with a swim in the hotel’s signature Roman-style indoor pool or maintain their wellness routine in the fully equipped fitness center. The hotel is within an eight-minute walk of renowned cultural landmarks including The Museum of Contemporary Art (MOCA) and the Walt Disney Concert Hall, placing guests at the center of Downtown Los Angeles’ vibrant arts scene.

name: The Godfrey Hotel Hollywood
description: The Godfrey Hotel Hollywood features an outdoor swimming pool, fitness center, a restaurant and bar in Los Angeles. With free WiFi, this 4-star hotel offers room service and a 24-hour front desk. Certain rooms at the property include a balcony with a city view. The hotel has a sun terrace. Capitol Records Building is a 10-minute walk from The Godfrey Hotel Hollywood, while Dolby Theater is 1.2 miles away. Hollywood Burbank Airport is 7.5 miles from the property.

name: Embassy Suites By Hilton Hotel Los Angeles-International Airport North
description: Conveniently located one half mile from the Los Angeles International Airport, this suite-style property offers spacious accommodations and free breakfast. Rooms at the property offer a coffee machine, a flat-screen cable TV, mini refrigerator, and a microwave. Some rooms offer city views. Embassy Suites features a nightly manager's reception daily between 5pm - 7pm. Free WiFi is also available throughout the entire hotel. There are meeting rooms and a business center available as well. Visit the Staples Center, home of the Los Angeles Lakers and Clippers, which is within 9.9 mi of Embassy Suites North. Guests can also easily reach the Manhattan Beach Pier and Hollywood Park.

name: USC Hotel
description: Located 3 minutes’ walk from USC campus this hotel offers easy access to campus events. It features an outdoor pool and hot tub and rooms with free WiFi. A restaurant and bar are located on-site. A cable TV is provided in each air-conditioned room at USC Hotel. Each guest room includes ironing facilities, a hairdryer and a coffee maker. McKay's Restaurant offers a daily breakfast buffet from 6:30 AM to 11:00 AM (additional fee applies). Room service is available daily from 6:30 AM to 10:00 PM. Rosso Oro's Pizzeria is open Monday to Friday from 11:00 AM to 7:00 PM. Guests can work out anytime in the 24-hour fitness center at USC Hotel. A 24-hour business center with fax and photocopying services is also available Los Angeles Convention Center and Los Angeles Memorial Coliseum are within 5 minutes’ drive away from this hotel. Los Angeles International Airport is 20 minutes’ drive away.

name: Moxy Downtown Los Angeles
description: Ideally located in Los Angeles, Moxy Downtown Los Angeles has air-conditioned rooms, an outdoor swimming pool, free WiFi and a fitness center. This 3-star hotel offers a 24-hour front desk and an ATM. Guests can enjoy American and Japanese dishes at the restaurant or have a drink at the bar. At the hotel, the rooms come with a desk. With a private bathroom equipped with a shower and free toiletries, some rooms at Moxy Downtown Los Angeles also feature a city view. All rooms at the accommodation come with a flat-screen TV with cable channels and a safety deposit box. The area is popular for hiking, and bike rental is available at Moxy Downtown Los Angeles. A business center and vending machines with snacks and drinks are available on site at the hotel. Staples Center is a 2-minute walk from Moxy Downtown Los Angeles, while Microsoft Theater is 500 yards from the property. Hawthorne Municipal Airport is 11 miles away.

name: Hotel Angeleno Los Angeles
description: Minutes from the Getty Center museum and the University of California - Los Angeles, this hotel offers a gym and outdoor pool. Free WiFi is provided. Hotel Angeleno features an outdoor fireplace in a nice area to relax. Guests can enjoy Bluetooth media streaming and the ability to call an Uber at the property's front desk to have the charges billed directly to their room. Fresh Californian cuisine with new American influences is served in the penthouse-level, at West Restaurant and Lounge. All food is seasonally centered. Guests can enjoy stunning views of Los Angeles . We now only serve breakfast and dinner Guests can attend a complimentary daily on-site new wine hour hours: 16:00-17:00 Angeleno Hotel is located between Beverly Hills and Santa Monica. Public buses stop directly outside the property. The hotel is located on a busy street and area attractions are not within walking distance. Complimentary breakfast for up to 2 guest per room from 6am-10am.

name: citizenM Los Angeles Downtown
description: Featuring a shared lounge, a restaurant as well as a bar, citizenM Los Angeles Downtown is located in the center of Los Angeles, a 19-minute walk from LA Union Station. This 4-star hotel offers a 24-hour front desk, a business center and free WiFi. Dodger Stadium is 3.7 miles away and California Science Center is 4.2 miles from the hotel. A private bathroom is available in guest rooms, while certain rooms include a Blu-ray player. Guests at the hotel can enjoy a buffet breakfast. Microsoft Theater is 1.5 miles from citizenM Los Angeles Downtown, while Staples Center is 1.5 miles away. Hawthorne Municipal Airport is 12 miles from the property.

name: Holiday Inn Express Los Angeles LAX Airport By IHG
description: Positioned near Los Angeles International Airport and a short drive from the city center, this hotel offers free 24-hour airport shuttles along with an on-site gift shop and modern guest rooms. A free breakfast buffet and on-site parking is provided to registered hotel guests. Rooms at the property include a desk, free WiFi, and an HDTV. There is a 24-hour business center available. name: Parc 55 San Francisco - A Hilton Hotel
description: Parc 55 San Francisco places you steps from Union Square, with sleek, contemporary rooms and some of the best downtown views in the city. This is a hotel designed for the way you actually travel—efficient, comfortable, and unexpectedly local. Start your morning at Morning Market, our grab‑n‑go for coffee and a quick bite. Rent an e‑bike from the garage and see the waterfront, the hills, and the neighborhoods on your own terms. When hunger hits, you do not need to leave the building: Kin Khao, a Michelin‑starred Thai restaurant, serves bold, authentic flavors just upstairs. For something more relaxed, Cable 55 Restaurant & Bar offers classic American fare and craft cocktails. Need a pool or a serious workout? You have full access to the outdoor heated pool and fitness center at Hilton San Francisco Union Square, just across the street. Same ownership, same Hilton standard. And yes, you can charge your meals there back to your Parc 55 room.

Select rooms offer stunning views of San Francisco Bay. At Hotel Zephyr San Francisco, you will find a 24-hour reception and a mini-market. The hotel is 2625 feet from Lombard Street and Ghirardelli Square. San Francisco International Airport is 13 mi away.

name: Hilton San Francisco Union Square Hotel
description: Located in the heart of downtown San Francisco and just 5 minutes' walk from the Powell Street subway station, this Hilton features an on-site Herb n´ Kitchen and a beautiful courtyard pool. Hilton San Francisco Union Square offers modern rooms with a flat-screen HDTV and an alarm clock with MP3 player connection. A coffee machine and Crabtree & Evelyn bathroom amenities are included. Guests of the Union Square Hilton are welcome to enjoy the 2,800 square-foot health club and relaxing outdoor whirlpool. The business center offers public computers, copy and fax services. Urban Tavern serves an extensive menu for dinner in an artistic atmosphere. The lounge area offers a variety of sophisticated snacks and drinks. Hilton San Francisco Union Square is 1 block from the American Conservatory Theater and less than 1.6 km from the San Francisco Museum of Modern Art. The mandatory $25 per night Destination Fee includes: $25 food and beverage credit per day, $25 Tower Tours credit per day, Premium WiFi. Hilton San Francisco Union Square is the largest hotel on the West Coast, purpose‑built to welcome the world. From citywide conventions to celebratory gatherings, this is where San Francisco comes together. Guest rooms and private balconies sit higher than any other hotel in the city, framing views that turn arrival into an event. The outdoor heated pool and hot tub are open year‑round. Cityscape Sky Bar—San Francisco’s tallest—offers 360‑degree vistas of the Bay, the Pacific Ocean, and the glittering streets below. Step outside and you are at the intersection of Union Square, Chinatown, the Theater District, and the Financial District. Powell Street cable car turnaround is one block away. MUNI and BART connect you to every corner of the city. The amenities are anything but an afterthought. Stay on track in the 24‑hour fitness center. Grab a coffee and a quick bite at Herb N’ Kitchen, our grab n' go market. Start the morning at Poached breakfast buffet or rent an e‑bike from G Level and see the city at your own pace. An Avis/Budget rental car desk is also conveniently located inside the hotel. All of it, backed by the world’s most iconic host.

name: The Pickwick Hotel San Francisco
neighborhood: Union Square East - South of Market
description: Just 2 minutes' walk from Westfield Shopping Center, this Central San Francisco hotel features a restaurant and bar. It offers traditional guest rooms with free WiFi and cable TV. A fridge and coffee maker are provided in every light-colored room at The Pickwick Hotel San Francisco. The spacious rooms offer a hairdryer for guest convenience. Serving Italian and Mediterranean cuisine, guests of The Pickwick can dine at SOMA Bar & Restuarant and Zevi cafe. Fitness and business facilities are located at Hotel Pickwick. This hotel is 0.5 miles from the Museum of Modern Art, and 2.5 miles from Alcatraz Cruises. Fisherman’s Wharf is just 10 minutes' drive away.

name: Hotel Via
neighborhood: Union Square East - South of Market
description: Located in the South Beach neighborhood of San Francisco, with Oracle Park across the street, Hotel Via is outfitted with modern, custom-made furniture and features a sun terrace and views of the city. Guests can enjoy the on-site rooftop bar with 360-degree views of Oracle Park, the Bay, and the San Francisco skyline. The rooms come with a flat-screen TV with cable channels. Extras include free toiletries and a hairdryer. There is a 24-hour front desk at the property. Guests can enjoy the high speed fiber optic WiFi on-site. Other amenities include a breakfast café, a meeting room, event space, a communal workspace, and a fitness center. The onsite bar and restaurant serves cocktails and small plates based on seasonal ingredients. Union square is 1.1 mi from Hotel Via, while San Francisco City Hall is 1.5 mi from the property. Moscone Center is 2953 feet away. Oakland International Airport is 9.9 mi away

name: Canopy by Hilton San Francisco SoMa
neighborhood: Union Square East - South of Market
description: Our downtown San Francisco hotel is within three blocks of the Moscone Center, Yerba Buena Gardens, and several museums. We’re within a mile of countless restaurants and shops, and we’re half a mile from transit stations. Enjoy locally inspired fare and handcrafted beverages at our rooftop lounge. Each room at Canopy by Hilton San Francisco SoMa offers a dressing room area separated from the bedroom by sliding door panels.. The dressing area features a closet with shelving and storage space, a make-up desk with lighting and a walk-in shower with a rainfall shower head. An ergonomic bed and a 42-inch flat-screen smart TV are provided in the bedroom area. Panoramic city skyline views surround the hotel's heated outdoor rooftop lounge. The Bean Bar coffee shop offers breakfast and grab-and-go options until the evening. The Mezzanine combines an expert craft cocktail and wine program. Union square is 0.8 mi from the hotel, while AT&T Park is 1 mi from the property. The nearest airport is San Francisco International Airport, 13 mi from the property.

name: Axiom Hotel
description: Sensor locks and online check-in make staying at the Axiom Hotel a technology forward experience. Lounge areas , Century-old architecture fuses with an electric modern design in this boutique hotel. A 48-inch Samsung flat-screen Smart TV with wireless streaming capabilities is featured in each room. A Kube Bluetooth clock radio and an electronic laptop safe are provided for convenience. Premium linens, signature Axiom robes and LATHER brand toiletries are also provided. The entire property includes fiber optic free WiFi, including the lounge common areas and guest rooms. A 24-hour reception is available to assist guests. Shopping and dining opportunities in San Francisco’s Union Square are just 984 feet from Axiom Hotel. The Dragon’s Gate entrance to Chinatown is 0.6 mi away. The Coit Tower and North Beach are 1.9 mi away from this hotel.

name: Motel 6 San Francisco, CA Great Highway
description: Directly across the street from Ocean Beach, Rodeway Inn & Suites San Francisco-Great Highway offers guest rooms with free WiFi access and free guest parking. The Judah/La Playa/Ocean Beach tram stop, with service to Central San Francisco, is just 2 blocks away. Each guest room has cable TV, and a refrigerator and private bathrooms. Our staff is here to assist you 24-hours per day. Surfing, hiking and cycling nearby. An entrance to Golden Gate State Park, site of the Outside Lands Festival and the Hardly Strictly Bluegrass Festival, is across the street. Golden Gate Bridge can be reached within 10 minutes’ drive. Union Square is 5.6 mi away.

name: Hotel Garrett
neighborhood: Civic Center South - South of Market
description: Located in San Francisco’s vibrant SoMa district, renowned for its museums, shops, and gourmet restaurants, Hotel Garrett offers a lively city atmosphere with a youthful energy. Civic Center Plaza is just a 9-minute walk away. Guests can enjoy complimentary coffee and tea each morning in the hotel’s trendy lobby. Additionally, access to a fitness center and a heated outdoor pool is available at the hotel’s sister property, located just across the street. Each room includes complimentary Wi-Fi, a smart TV, and an iPod docking station. Guest robes, a coffee machine, and an in-room safe are also provided for your convenience. Parking is available on site with a surcharge, based on availability on a first-come, first-served basis. Please note that an additional fee applies for oversize vehicles. For more information, kindly contact the Front Desk. Explore nearby attractions with ease—The Strand Theater is just a 5-minute walk from the hotel, and Oracle Park, home of the San Francisco Giants, is only 2 mi away. The Civic Center/UN Plaza BART Station, offering service to San Francisco International Airport, is a mere 4-minute walk from Hotel Garrett.

name: Motel 6 San Francisco CA Fisherman"s Wharf
description: Fisherman's Wharf and Pier 39 are both just 1 mi from Van Ness Inn. This San Francisco hotel offers free WiFi. Cable TV and free WiFi are included in every room at Van Ness Inn. A work desk and private bathroom with a hairdryer is also offered. Each is simply styled and has white walls. A microwave and refrigerator are included room amenities. A 24-hour reception greets guests of this hotel. Coffee and tea are provided in the lobby 24 hours. Ghirardelli Square is 7 minutes’ walk from Van Ness Inn. Home of the San Francisco Giants professional baseball team, AT&T Park is 3 mi away. San Francisco’s Union Square shopping district is 2 mi away.

name: Stanford Court San Francisco
neighborhood: Union Square East - South of Market
description: Located adjacent to the Powell and California cable car stop, Stanford Court San Francisco is a technology-friendly boutique hotel that features a lobby and business center equipped with 7 MacBooks, iPads and iPad minis all running high-speed WiFi. Bar and Lounge serves craft brews and whiskey. San Francisco’s Union Square,Chinatown, and North Beach are is just 10 minutes’ walk away. Select rooms feature a view of the San Francisco skyline at Stanford Court San Francisco. All guest rooms offer a pillow top mattress, speedy WiFi, a 49-inch high-definition television with HDMI and USB Ports, USB outlets, Staycast that enables guests stream content from their own devices, and a mini-refrigerator. Breakfast is available on-site at Mixing Room. Serves dinner and craft cocktails, beer, and whiskey in the evening. Guests can workout in the state-of-the-art fitness center at Stanford Court San Francisco. AT&T Park is 10 minutes’ drive away from Stanford Court San Francisco. Overlooking Grace Cathedral, Huntington Park, atop Nob Hill, is less than 5 minutes’ walk away. Fisherman's Wharf is just 15 minutes’ cable car ride away. Chinatown is 7 minutes’ walk away. The premium early arrival is $50 plus tax before 09:00 to 14:00. Arriving before 09:00 is the rate of the day plus tax.

name: Hotel Bijou
description: This unique hotel is 8 minutes’ walk from San Francisco’s vibrant Union Square. The hotel offers guest rooms with free WiFi that are inspired by the cinema. Every room at Hotel Bijou - Union Square are completely nonsmoking and features a cable TV. A work desk is offered in each guest rooms. The hotel offers full concierge services. Hotel Bijou - Union Square is steps from the Powell Street Bart Public Transportation Station. Westfield Mall shopping mall is 5 minutes’ walk away.

name: City Center Inn And Suites
neighborhood: Civic Center South - South of Market
description: Discover affordable comfort at City Center Inn & Suites, a budget-friendly downtown motel in San Francisco’s vibrant SOMA district. Just a 15-minute stroll from Moscone Center, 1 Mile from Union Square and 1.6 miles to Oracle Park, our motel is your gateway to the city's best from Golden Gate views to tech hubs. Relax in spacious rooms with modern amenities, Enjoy FREE Parking (rare in SF), and Complimentary Lite Breakfast. Our Non-Smoking Guest Rooms includes Free High-Speed Wi-Fi, Flat Screen LED TV with Premium HD Channels, Mini Fridge & Microwaves, in-room Coffee Maker, Iron & Iron Board, Hair Dryer, Private Bathroom with complimentary toiletries. City Center Inn and Suites offers FREE Private Indoor Limited Secure Parking (first-come, first-served). We have 24 hours front desk, luggage storage, vending machines. Start your day with our complimentary lite breakfast, featuring pastries, bread, cereals, oatmeal, milk, coffee, assorted teas and juices. It's the perfect fuel for your San Francisco adventure. Our central location is ideal for business travelers, families, and leisure guests seeking value without compromise. City Center Inn and Suites places guests in close proximity to many popular sites. Oracle Park (Home of the San Francisco Giants Baseball team) is 1.6 Miles away, Chase Center (Home Venue for Golden State Warriors Basketball Team) is 1.9 Miles away. Entertainment venue Bill Graham Civic Auditorium & City Hall is 13 minutes’ walk away. San Francisco Airport is 12 Miles Away.

name: The Andrews Hotel
description: Located in San Francisco’s Theater District, this European-style hotel is 6 minutes’ walk from Union Square. The Andrews Hotel offers an on-site restaurant and guest rooms with free WiFi. Offering service to San Francisco International Airport, Powell Street BART station is 10 minutes’ walk away. The warm colored rooms at The Andrews Hotel feature a flat-screen satellite TV. A leather armchair and a work desk are also provided. Guests can dine at Fino Ristorante & Bar, which offers Italian cuisine, daily specials and a fireplace. Hotel Andrews Hotel is less than 0.6 mi away from Chinatown, Nob Hill and the San Francisco Museum of Modern Art. Fisherman’s Wharf is 1.2 mi away.

name: Hotel Triton Union Square San Francisco
neighborhood: Union Square East - South of Market
description: Hotel Triton Union Square San Francisco is an artistic vision brought to life. Created from the imaginations of San Francisco artists, the Hotel Triton Union Square San Francisco is a colorful and ever-current showcase of Bay Area pop culture. Conveniently located adjacent to the Chinatown gates and walking-distance to Union Square, Hotel Triton Union Square San Francisco is the perfect home base for San Francisco's top activites and attractions. Location meets value at this boutique hotel. Amenities include WiFi, welcome sweet treats, freshly brewed coffee & tea with gourmet biscotti, wine receptions, fruit infused water, fitness center, and a selection of on-site dining options (amenities based on availability and subject to change).

name: Timbri Hotel San Francisco, Curio Collection by Hilton
neighborhood: Union Square East - South of Market
description: Located conveniently in the center of San Francisco, Timbri Hotel San Francisco, Curio Collection by Hilton has air-conditioned rooms, a fitness center, free WiFi and a terrace. This 4-star hotel offers luggage storage space. Private parking can be arranged at an extra charge. All rooms at the hotel come with a flat-screen TV with cable channels and a safety deposit box. The rooms are equipped with a coffee machine and a private bathroom with free toiletries, while certain rooms also offer a kitchenette equipped with a fridge. The breakfast offers à la carte, American or vegetarian options. At Timbri Hotel San Francisco, Curio Collection by Hilton you'll find a restaurant serving American and Mediterranean cuisine. Vegetarian, dairy-free and vegan options can also be requested. Speaking English and Spanish at the reception, staff are always on hand to help. Popular points of interest near the accommodation include Union Square, San Francisco City Hall and Moscone Center. San Francisco International Airport is 12 miles from the property.

name: The Cartwright Hotel - Union Square, BW Premier Collection
description: Located just 3 minutes’ walk from San Francisco’s vibrant Union Square, the historic Cartwright Hotel Union Square - BW Premier Collection with no Resort Fee features guest rooms with free WiFi. Each guest room at this hotel is equipped with a flat-screen cable TV and a CD player. All rooms are warmly decorated with dark wood furniture and include a coffee machine with local organic coffee. Guests of Cartwright Hotel Union Square - BW Premier Collection with no Resort Fee have free access to the business center, which has 2 computers and a printer. The relaxing lobby features a fireplace and a flat-screen TV. The hotel is within 5 minutes' walk of the 4th and Market Street Cable Car Stop and 1.9 mi from Fisherman’s Wharf. The Golden Gate Bridge is 4.3 mi away.

name: The Clancy, Autograph Collection
neighborhood: Union Square East - South of Market
description: One of the newest hotels in downtown San Francisco, CA, The Clancy, Autograph Collection is a destination for new discoveries. Located in SoMa, Surrounded by museums and tech titans, our hotel is located in where San Francisco’s beautiful views meet its adventurous intellect. Our pet-friendly, family-friendly and business-friendly hotel welcomes urban nomads of every stripe with a delightful blend of swagger and domesticity. Hotel guests enjoy easy access to notable downtown San Francisco attractions such as Oracle Park and the Chase Center. Prepare for the day ahead in our fitness center and unwind in the evening at Seven Square Taproom.

name: Hotel Amari
description: This centrally located hotel is just 2 minutes’ walk from restaurants, theaters and shopping in San Francisco’s Union Square. Hotel Amari features a traditional British pub and restaurant on-site and offers Victorian-style guest rooms complete with a cable TV. Offering free WiFi, a work desk and a clock radio are offered in each guest room at this hotel. Guests of Hotel Amari have access to a business center and a workout area. A tour desk with local area information is also available. Fisherman’s Wharf and Alcatraz Cruises are each 8 minutes’ drive from the hotel. Chinatown is less than 1 mi away.

name: SoMa House
neighborhood: Civic Center South - South of Market
description: Located in San Francisco’s vibrant SoMa district, renowned for its museums, shops, and gourmet restaurants, SoMa House seamlessly blends retro-style furnishings with state-of-the-art amenities and services. Civic Center Plaza is just a 9-minute walk away. Guests can enjoy complimentary coffee and tea each morning in the hotel’s trendy lobby. Guests can unwind at the outdoor swimming pool or stay active in the fitness center. Each room includes complimentary Wi-Fi, a smart TV, and an iPod docking station. Guest robes, a coffee machine, and an in-room safe are also provided for your convenience. Valet Parking is available on site with a surcharge, based on availability on a first-come, first-served basis. Please note that an additional fee applies for oversize vehicles. For more information, kindly contact the Front Desk. Explore nearby attractions with ease—visit the War Memorial Opera House, just a 9-minute drive away, or enjoy a show at the SHN Orpheum Theater, only a 6-minute walk away. The Civic Center/UN Plaza BART Station, offering service to Union Square and San Francisco International Airport, is a mere 4-minute walk from the hotel.

name: Grand Hyatt San Francisco
neighborhood: Union Square East - South of Market
description: This San Francisco hotel in Union Square is just steps from Chinatown. On-site dining and a 24-hour gym are available for guest convenience. The spacious, modern rooms at Grand Hyatt San Francisco Union Square provide a flat-screen cable TV and an Uno-Bitell Media phone with MP3/iPod docking capabilities along with a small refrigerator and a coffee machine. The bathrooms feature designer bath amenities. Guests at Grand Hyatt San Francisco Union Square can enjoy American cuisine and cocktails at OneUP Restaurant and Lounge. San Francisco Grand Hyatt Union Square is within 11 minutes' walk from Montgomery Street BART Station and San Francisco Museum of Modern Art. Fisherman's Wharf and Alcatraz Island are 1 mi away.

name: Nob Hill Hotel
description: Originally established in 1906, the elegant Nob Hill Hotel features marble flooring, ornate ceilings and an extensive collection of period paintings in the hotel interior. Guests can enjoy wine tasting every evening. San Francisco’s Union Square is 5 minutes’ walk away. Offering free WiFi, each guest room is beautifully appointed in Victorian antiques, exquisite velvet and satin bedding. Rooms include a cable satellite TV and a coffee machine. There is an Italian bistro - Colombini in the building that's opens for dinner. Guests of Nob Hill Hotel can relax at Colombini Italian Café Bistro. The restaurant features fresh seafood, steak, pizza and signature risotto dishes and offers fine wines from Italy, Spain, France and California's Napa Valley region. The hotel is 3 minutes’ walk from the California and Hyde Street Cable Car Station. Fisherman's Wharf is 12 minutes’ drive away. San Francisco’s Little Italy is 1.1 mi away.

name: Tilden Hotel
description: This boutique hotel is 6 minutes’ walk from San Francisco's vibrant Union Square. It offers an on-site gym and contemporary rooms. A flat-screen cable TV and a safe are included all of the warm colored rooms at Tilden Hotel. A coffee maker is available in all guest rooms. Rooms with an iPod docking station and bathrobes are available. This conveniently located hotel is 3 minutes’ walk away from Curran Theater. Powell Street BART Station and Great American Music Hall are within 8 minutes’ walk away from Tilden Hotel.

name: Hotel Julian
description: Located in San Francisco's Nob Hill neighborhood, this urban boutique hotel is 5 minutes' walk from Union Square. The hotel offers nonsmoking guest rooms with free WiFi. Guest rooms at the Hotel Julian feature cable TV. Select rooms include flat-screen TVs, iPod docking stations and a refrigerator. The San Francisco Vertigo Hotel offers daily newspapers in the lobby. Fisherman's Wharf is 1.1 mi away from this hotel. Grace Cathedral is 9 minutes' walk away. San Francisco International Airport is 30 minutes' drive away from Hotel Vertigo.

name: Grant Plaza Hotel
neighborhood: Union Square East - South of Market
description: Located at the gateway to San Francisco’s Chinatown, Grant Plaza Hotel features guest rooms with free WiFi and a 24-hour desk service. Offering service to San Francisco International Airport, Montgomery Street BART station is 9 minutes’ walk away. The Grant Plaza Hotel offers traditional rooms with wood furniture and spacious windows. A flat-screen cable TV and a work desk are included in each guest room. Air conditioning is not available in rooms. Irons, sewing kits and toothbrushes are available by request from the Grant Plaza staff. Fax service and an internet station are also available. Shops and cafes in vibrant Union Square are 7 minutes’ walk away from this hotel. Offering live entertainment and special events, Masonic Auditorium is 10 minutes’ walk from Grant Plaza Hotel.

name: W San Francisco
neighborhood: Union Square East - South of Market
description: The W is a fixture of San Francisco’s hip SOMA district, amid art exhibitions, film screenings, fashion shows, clubs and concerts. A restaurant and gym are located on-site at the property. Styled in modern decor and urban finishes, each room features a flat-screen TV, WiFi, and a Bluetooth Speaker alarm clock with USB charging ports. California wines and local snack delights are available in the mini-bar. Each room is equipped with a Nespresso machine and complimentary coffee capsules are replenished daily. Trace serves locally-sourced sustainable cuisine nightly at this environmentally friendly hotel. Guests can mix and mingle in the Living Room Bar while enjoying hand-crafted cocktails. The fully-equipped FIT sky-lit gym offers a mix of cardio and weight equipment. The Golden Gate Bridge is 5 mi away. Union Square is 8 minutes' walk away from the W San Francisco.

name: Bay Hotel
description: In a prime location in the Tenderloin district of San Francisco, Bay Hotel is located a 12-minute walk from Union Square, 0.9 miles from Moscone Center and 1.8 miles from Oracle Park. This 2-star hotel offers free WiFi. The property is a 9-minute walk from San Francisco City Hall, and within 600 yards of the city center. At the hotel, all rooms are equipped with a desk. All guest rooms in Bay Hotel are equipped with a flat-screen TV and free toiletries. Ghirardelli Square is 2.3 miles from the accommodation, while Coit Tower is 2.4 miles away. San Francisco International Airport is 12 miles from the property.

name: InterContinental San Francisco By IHG
neighborhood: Union Square East - South of Market
description: Overlooking San Francisco's SoMa area and moments from top city center sites, InterContinental San Francisco provides guests with modern in-room amenities. Shopping and dining opportunities in Union Square are 10 minutes’ walk away. Spacious accommodations at the InterContinental San Francisco are furnished with all the latest technologies, including flat-screen TVs and iPod clock radios. Guests will also appreciate in-room mini-bars and coffee machines. While staying at InterContinental San Francisco guests can enjoy 24-hour fitness facilities, complete with an indoor lap pool. A gift shop, Bistro 888 restaurant and Bar 888 are also located on-site. The completely nonsmoking InterContinental San Francisco is placed near the Moscone Convention Center and Chinatown. The nearby Powell Street Cable Car also offers instant access to other popular areas of the city, including Fisherman's Wharf.

Reception services such as express check-in or check-out, luggage storage and safety deposit boxes are available to accommodate your requirements.Should you desire access to the top entertainment in the city, assistance can be provided by the hotel's tours.
