name: Hilton Toronto
neighborhood: Downtown Toronto Southwest - Entertainment & Financial Districts
description: Located within 5 minutes' walk of Osgoode Station, this downtown Toronto hotel features 3 restaurants, an indoor and outdoor pool and state-of-the-art gym. The modern rooms and suites at Hilton Toronto provide a flat-screen cable TV with pay-per-view channels. There is a coffee maker and a safe along with a desk and arm chair. Fine dining can be found on site at Frenchy Bar et Brasserie and Ruth’s Chris Steak House. The hotel provides room service during limited hours from 6:30 AM to 10:30 AM and from 5:00 PM to 11:00 PM. Toronto Hilton is opposite the Four Seasons Center for Performing Arts. City Hall and Nathan Phillips Square are less than 10 minutes' walk away. Frenchy is conveniently located in the downtown core inside Hilton Toronto. Join us every day for breakfast, lunch, dinner, or weekday happy hour.

name: Doubletree by Hilton Toronto Downtown
neighborhood: Downtown Toronto Southwest - Entertainment & Financial Districts
description: Located in the city center, DoubleTree by Hilton Toronto Downtown features an indoor heated pool, an on-site restaurant, and a fitness center. Toronto Eaton Center and St. Patrick Subway Station are within 1148 feet. Each of the tastefully decorated rooms has a flat-screen cable HDTV with pay-per-view channels. Air conditioning, safe and a coffee maker are also included. A hairdryer can be found in the bathroom. The suites offer a kitchen with a fridge/freezer, a microwave, a stovetop and utensils. Upon arrival, guests of DoubleTree by Hilton Downtown Toronto are greeted with warm chocolate chip cookies. DoubleTree by Hilton Toronto Downtown provides underground parking upon request with surcharge. Guests who pay for on-site parking can enjoy in-and-out privileges during their stay. This hotel is 1.1 mi from both the popular CN Tower and Air Canada Center. Toronto Pearson International Airport is at a distance of 19 mi.

name: Holiday Inn Toronto Airport East By IHG
description: Located just off Highway 401, this hotel provides a free shuttle service from Toronto Pearson International Airport, which is a 10-minute drive away. Free Wi-Fi, wired internet access and an indoor pool are also provided. Floor-to-ceiling windows that open and a 37-inch LCD TV are found in each modern room at the Holiday Inn Toronto Airport East. Coffee-making facilities and a work desk are also included. Guests at the Toronto Airport Holiday Inn can enjoy the on-site fitness center. A business center and a gift shop are also open. Perkins Family Restaurant is on site and serves a menu of American items for dining in, take-out and room service. Downtown Toronto is less than 16 miles from the Holiday Inn Airport East. Toronto Congress Centre is just over a quarter mile away. The International Centre is 5.5 miles from the Holiday Inn.

name: Hyatt Regency Toronto
neighborhood: Downtown Toronto Southwest - Entertainment & Financial Districts
description: Located in the entertainment district on King Street West in the Toronto city center, this modern hotel offers rooms with 47-inch LED TVs with STAYCAST. Guests can relax in the on-site sauna or enjoy a swim in the seasonal outdoor pool. Every room features a city view of Toronto.. They all features ergonomic workstations with complimentary Wi-Fi. Ironing facilities and free toiletries are included in all rooms at the Hyatt Regency Toronto. A 24-hour fitness center is available to all guests of Toronto Hyatt Regency. A business center and dry cleaning services are also provided. The hotel's King Street Social Kitchen and Lounge serves regional cuisine for breakfast, lunch and dinner; and guests can enjoy a light meal at the Mix Bistro Bar. Second City Comedy Club, Princess of Wales Theater and Roy Thompson Hall are within 5 minutes' walk of this hotel. The Rogers Center and the CN Tower are less than 1640 feet away.

name: Monte Carlo Inns Oakville Suites
description: Located less than 10 minutes' drive from Lake Ontario, this hotel features an on-site restaurant, fitness center and hot tub. Every room offers free Wi-Fi and a flat-screen cable TV. Modern furniture, a microwave, fridge and coffee-making facilities are provided in the contemporary decorated rooms at Monte Carlo Inn Oakville Road East. They also have a desk and seating area. Guests can dine at Pomodoro Ristorante Bar & Grill. Oakville Monte Carlo Inn serves a daily breakfast buffet. Glen Abbey Golf Course and Oakville Place mall are less than 10 minutes' drive from this hotel. Toronto City Center is 30 minutes' drive away.

name: Super 8 by Wyndham Toronto East ON
description: Super 8 Toronto East features a free daily breakfast and free WiFi. Toronto Zoo is just 8.1 mi away. A 27" TV with cable channels, a mini-fridge and a microwave are featured in all rooms. A work desk and a coffee maker are also included. Scarborough Town Center is 13 minutes’ drive away. Downtown Toronto is 11 mi from Super 8 Toronto East.

name: Sheraton Gateway Hotel in Toronto International Airport
description: Conveniently located inside Pearson International Airport, this Mississauga hotel is directly connected to Terminal 3 and just a short ride on the Airport Link Train to Terminal 1. Direct access to the UP Express to downtown Toronto in under 30 minutes Guests at the Sheraton Gateway Hotel in Toronto International Airport can check-in for their flight and print boarding passes from on of the workstations in the hotel lobby. The hotel has an indoor swimming pool. WiFi is available in all rooms for an additional cost. Located on-site, the &More Restaurant serves international cuisine for breakfast, lunch and dinner. After dinner, guests can relax with a drink in the bar.

name: Delta Hotels by Marriott Toronto
neighborhood: Downtown Toronto Southwest - Entertainment & Financial Districts
description: Located in the heart of downtown Toronto, the Delta Toronto hotel features spacious rooms, an indoor heated pool and hot tub, and free WiFi. The Delta Toronto is just steps away from the city's top attractions and sites including the CN Tower, Scotiabank Arena, Rogers Center, and Ripley's Aquarium of Canada. A SMART TV with cable channels is standard in each room. Select rooms have a glass-enclosed walk-in shower, and all of them provide free toiletries and a hairdryer. The rooms are also equipped with a coffee machine. Guests can enjoy premium casual dining for breakfast, lunch, dinner and brunch at SOCO Kitchen + Bar, or order in-room dining. Char No.5 Whiskey & Cocktail Lounge is open to the public for craft cocktails and a premium whiskey experience. At the Delta Toronto, guests can conveniently access a free fitness and recreation center, meetings and events spaces, luggage storage and dry cleaning. PATH, Toronto’s underground pedestrian walkway, is directly accessible from the hotel. Toronto Union Station, UP Express and Metro Toronto Convention Center are directly connected to the hotel via PATH, and Billy Bishop Toronto City Airport is a short 10-minute drive away.

name: Delta Hotels by Marriott Toronto Airport & Conference Centre
description: Located opposite the Toronto Congress Center, this hotel features a Starbucks, another restaurant that we featured in the lobby and free WiFi throughout the property. Guests can enjoy free transfers to Pearson International Airport located 4.3 mi away. A flat-screen TV with cable channels, desk and seating area are featured in each room at Delta Hotels By Marriott Toronto Airport & Conference Center. Every room is fitted with a private bathroom equipped with toiletries and a hair dryer. Tea and coffee-making facilities are also provided in each room, along with ironing facilities. Guests can take advantage of a variety of on-site restaurants. Ginko's is famous for its Japanese cuisine and Lot 41 Social Bar & Table is open daily. Breakfast is served at Orchid Cafe. The hotel has an indoor pool and a large hot tub. A fitness center is also offered at Delta Hotels By Marriott Toronto Airport. Toronto city center is 16 mi away. Golf Dome Mississauga is 10 minutes’ drive from this hotel.

name: Holiday Inn Express Toronto Downtown By IHG
neighborhood: Downtown Toronto Southeast - Union Station & St Lawrence Market
description: This downtown Toronto hotel is 6 minutes' drive from the CN Tower and Rogers Center. Free WiFi and a hot continental breakfast are provided. The spacious, contemporary rooms at Holiday Inn Express Toronto Downtown provide cable TV with pay-per-view movies, an arm chair and desk. They also have a coffee maker. Fresh fruit, eggs, bacon and a pancake machine are featured in the daily breakfast. A fountain and garden are featured in the courtyard. The hotel offers free newspapers and a business center with a printer and fax machine. Union Station is 10 minutes' drive from the Toronto Holiday Inn Express. The Hockey Hall of Fame is 10 minutes' walk away.

name: Best Western Premier Toronto Airport Carlingview Hotel
description: Within 2.5 mi from Toronto Pearson International Airport, this boutique hotel offers a free airport shuttle service and complimentary WiFi. It also features an indoor pool and 24-hour fitness center. All guest rooms at the Best Western Premier Toronto Airport Carlingview Hotel feature a flat-screen TV and hardwood floors. Guests will enjoy the mini-refrigerator and work desk with ergonomic seating. In-room facilities also includes a coffee maker. Guests can enjoy casual dining at Flight Path Restaurant, which is open daily for breakfast and dinner. Best Western Premier Toronto Airport Carlingview Hotel is a completely nonsmoking hotel with a sauna and a hot tub. This hotel is 3.5 mi from Woodbine Racetrack and 15 mi from Canada's Wonderland theme park. shuttle timings are 4 am to 2 am.

name: Monte Carlo Inn Markham
description: Providing easy access to major area highways and within driving distance of downtown Toronto, this Markham, Ontario hotel features comfortable accommodations along with modern amenities and an on-site restaurant. The Monte Carlo Inn Markham is situated only a short distance from a number of golf courses, scenic parks and shopping centers. The sites of downtown Toronto, including the CN Tower are also a short drive away and are ideal for a day trip. The Markham Monte Carlo Inn provides guests with a free daily buffet breakfast as well as in-room coffeemakers. Guests can also enjoy on-site dining at La Piazzetta restaurant, serving Italian, French and Mediterranean cuisine.

name: Sandman Signature Toronto Airport Hotel
description: Only 2.9 mi from Pearson International Airport, this hotel features a free airport shuttle services. comfortable guestrooms and an on-site restaurant. The city center of Toronto is at a distance of 16 mi. Sandman Signature Toronto Airport Hotel features an indoor pool and state-of-the-art fitness center. After a busy day, guests can enjoy a meal at Moxies. The guestrooms at the Toronto Airport Sandman Signature boast amenities such as flat-screen TVs. Guests will also enjoy high-speed internet access as well as designer bath products. Various restaurants can be found within 1640 feet from the property.

name: Best Western Plus Travel Hotel Toronto Airport
description: This hotel is located 3.1 mi from the Toronto Pearson International Airport. The hotel features a free airport shuttle and also provides a microwave and refrigerator in every room. Best Western Plus Travel Hotel Toronto Airport rooms feature free WiFi and a 50-inch flat-screen cable TV. The rooms also include a coffee maker. The Toronto Airport Best Western Plus Travel Hotel offers guests a continental breakfast. The Airport Best Western Plus has laundry facilities available to guests. Guests can also work out in the gym or work in the business center. The Best Western Plus Hotel Toronto is within a 10-minute drive of Centennial Park. The hotel is 16 mi from downtown Toronto.

name: Executive Hotel Cosmopolitan
neighborhood: Downtown Toronto Southeast - Union Station & St Lawrence Market
description: Executive Hotel Cosmopolitan Toronto is located in the heart of downtown Toronto and only steps from Yonge Street. The light installation in the lobby is by the famous glass artist Rob Synder, who is renowned as an early pioneer in the glass fusing movement. This hotel features spacious suites with kitchenettes and living rooms. For complete relaxation, guests can visit the full service on-site SpaZen. Executive Hotel Cosmopolitan Toronto is 591 feet from the Hockey Hall of Fame. King Subway Station is just 2 minutes' walk away. Our lobby is currently being renovated until February 28th to create a better and more modern guest experience. We apologize for any inconvenience and appreciate your understanding

name: Hampton Inn & Suites by Hilton Toronto Downtown
neighborhood: Downtown Toronto Southeast - Union Station & St Lawrence Market
description: Located in downtown Toronto, the Hampton Inn & Suites by Hilton Toronto Downtown features a state-of-the-art fitness center. The shops and restaurants of Yonge Street are less than 10 minutes' walk away. All of the modernly furnished guest rooms are nonsmoking and include a flat-screen TV with cable channels. Free WiFi is included at no extra cost. Hampton Inn & Suites by Hilton Toronto Downtown has a 24-hour business center. Secure underground parking is available with surcharge. This hotel is less than 0.6 mi from the Eaton Center and Yonge-Dundas Square. Toronto's historic Allan Gardens is only 820 feet away.

name: SoHo Hotel Toronto
neighborhood: Downtown Toronto Southwest - Entertainment & Financial Districts
description: Sophistication, luxury and personalized services await guests at this exceptional boutique hotel, offering spacious accommodations in the heart of Toronto city center, only moments from area attractions. Featuring state-of-the-art in-room technologies like heated bathroom floors, SoHo Hotel Toronto offers everything needed for an unforgettable stay. Guests can also take advantage of the hotel's first-class fitness center, complete with a lap pool and personal fitness coaches. Many of Toronto's most popular points of interest, including Rogers Center, can be found only a short distance from SoHo Hotel Toronto. The Metro Toronto Convention Center, as well as the CN Tower and the scenic waterfront are also within walking distance.

name: Radisson Blu Toronto Downtown
neighborhood: Downtown Toronto Southwest - Entertainment & Financial Districts
description: This harbourfront hotel in Toronto city center features on-site dining as well as a rooftop patio with a seasonal pool. A mini-fridge and coffee maker are included in each guest room. A large work desk and flat-screen TV are common to all rooms at Radisson Blu Downtown Toronto. A pool, harbor or city view may be featured in these rooms. Showcasing regional ingredients, Watermark Restaurant specializes in Canadian cuisine. Light snacks are served at Cafe Locale in the lobby, along with local beers and wines. A fitness center is among recreational facilities available at Radisson Blu Downtown Toronto. Union Station is about 15 minutes’ walk from this hotel. Several attractions, including the CN Tower, Hockey Hall of Fame and lively Chinatown, are also within 15 minutes’ walk. Billy Bishop Toronto City Airport is 1.2 mi away. Located on the fifth floor, The View Restaurant offers a stunning view of Lake Ontario, making it the perfect setting to begin your day. Enjoy a delicious breakfast selection while taking in panoramic views that elevate your dining experience to new heights.

name: Toor Hotel Toronto, Part Of Jdv By Hyatt
neighborhood: Downtown Toronto Southeast - Union Station & St Lawrence Market
description: Located in Toronto, a 17-minute walk from Sugar Beach, Toor Hotel Toronto, Part Of Jdv By Hyatt has accommodations with a fitness center, private parking, a restaurant and a bar. With free WiFi, this 4-star hotel offers room service and a 24-hour front desk. The property is a 10-minute walk from Ryerson University, and within 0.7 miles of the city center. The hotel will provide guests with air-conditioned rooms offering a desk, a coffee machine, a fridge, a minibar, a safety deposit box, a flat-screen TV and a private bathroom with a shower. The rooms have a closet. An à la carte, continental or American breakfast is available at the property. Popular points of interest near Toor Hotel Toronto, Part Of Jdv By Hyatt include Yonge-Dundas Square, Hockey Hall of Fame and Toronto Eaton Center. Billy Bishop Toronto City Airport is 3.1 miles from the property.

name: Gladstone House
description: Toronto’s historic Gladstone House is at the heart of the city’s art and design district. Set in a Victorian-style building, this trendy and lively hotel offers 55 artist-designed guest rooms, all of which are unique in décor reflecting the feel and style of the property. Guests can enjoy free coffee each morning. The on-site Melody Bar features karaoke every Fridays and Saturdays. Preparing bistro-style dishes, Gladstone House Bistro & Bar serves breakfast, lunch and dinner daily. Perfectly located for exploring the vibrant neighborhood and the surrounding stores, restaurants and cafes, the hotel also offers its own social and cultural scene with 3 art galleries on site. A truly unique, boutique hotel full of individuality and charm.

name: Best Western Plus Executive Inn
description: Best Western Plus Executive Inn offers top-notch services and amenities, ensuring guests experience utmost comfort. For visitors traveling by automobile, complimentary parking is available.Reception assistance is offered at the hotel featuring concierge service. For extended visits or whenever required, the laundromat ensures your preferred travel garments remain fresh and accessible. Kindly note that smoking is prohibited in the hotel to ensure fresher air for all visitors.At Best Western Plus Executive Inn, every guestroom is provided with convenient amenities and fittings to ensure a comfortable stay.Certain rooms offer in-room amusement features such as the cable TV for your enjoyment.In select rooms within the hotel, a refrigerator, a coffee or tea maker and instant tea is available to cater to your requirements when desired. In the hotel, certain guest bathrooms come equipped with essential bathroom amenities, such as a hair dryer and toiletries, ensuring a comfortable stay for guests. Best Western Plus Executive Inn provides a superb assortment of leisure amenities for guests to enjoy. Be sure to drop by the pool at hotel at least once during your stay. Discover the fitness amenities at hotel to maintain your health and strength during your getaway.

name: Homewood Suites By Hilton Toronto Airport Corporate Centre
description: Just 5 mi from Toronto Pearson International Airport, this hotel offers a free airport shuttle services upon request. It features an indoor pool and free WiFi. The studios and suites at the Homewood Suites by Hilton Toronto Airport Corporate Center are equipped with a full kitchen. They are furnished with coffee facilities and include satellite TV. A complimentary breakfast is served every morning. A Managers Evening Reception is served every Wednesdays at no extra cost. Guests can use the barbecue facilities and the gym at the hotel. Homewood Suites Toronto Airport Corporate Center also includes a business center and laundry facilities. Toronto Homewood Suites Corporate Center is 18 mi from Canada’s Wonderland. The Royal Ontario Museum is 27.7-miles away.

name: The Yorkville Royal Sonesta Hotel Toronto
description: Surrounded by art galleries, fine restaurants and stylish boutiques in Toronto's Yorkville district, this hotel offers enjoyable facilities and unique dining options, including a seasonal patio lounge. The hotel is located across the street from the Royal Ontario Museum, a 2 minutes' walk from the University of Toronto. Modernly decorated, all the rooms feature a flat-screen TV with cable channels and an Universal phone charging station. Air conditioning and a safety deposit box are included. A hairdryer and free toiletries can be found in the bathroom. The Yorkville Royal Sonesta Hotel Toronto features an indoor pool and on-site fitness center. After an intense workout, guests can order a meal from room service and relax in a lounge chair on the outdoor terrace. Signatures restaurant at the Royal Sonesta Toronto Yorkville is open for breakfast, lunch and dinner. Guests can also enjoy the Proof Bar and Patio, which serves a seasonal tapas and drink menu. In the evening, visitors choose from an extensive selection of vodkas from around the world in the hotel's Proof Bar.

name: Revery Toronto Downtown, Curio Collection by Hilton
neighborhood: Downtown Toronto Southwest - Entertainment & Financial Districts
description: Toronto's exciting entertainment district is home to this hotel, ideally placed only steps from top area attractions and offering spacious guestrooms furnished with mini-refrigerators. Only 2625 feet from the Reverie Toronto Downtown, Curio Collection by Hilton, guests can discover attractions including the CN Tower, the Metro Toronto Convention Center and Chinatown. The city's shopping mall, Toronto Eaton Center can be found 1 mi from the hotel. Flat-screen TVs and free wireless internet are only some of the thoughtful amenities that are standard at the Reverie Toronto Downtown. Guests at the hotel can also enjoy 24-hour fitness facilities and an on-site convenience store.

name: Hotel X Toronto, a Destination by Hyatt Hotel
description: Hotel X Toronto, a Destination by Hyatt Hotel features waterfront and city skyline views. Located on the historic Exhibition grounds and 100% smoke free, Hotel X Toronto redefines the luxury hotel experience with exceptional rooftop hospitality, exquisite dining, flexible meeting spaces, extraordinary events and expansive tennis, fitness and wellness facilities. Amenities include exclusive theaters and a one-of-a-kind photographic art gallery. The Guerlain Spa, offers 10 unique treatment rooms, a beauty boutique with manicure and pedicure stations, and a post-treatment relaxation lounge overlooking the lake. Each elegantly designed guest room features free WiFi, free bottled water, a mini refrigerator and L'Occitane bath amenities. Hotel X Toronto's on-site restaurant, Roses Social is open for breakfast, lunch, and dinner. Our rooftop restaurant and bar Valerie is open for dinner. Within 0.9 mi from Hotel X Toronto at Exhibition Place, is the Enercare Center, Beanfield Center, Budweiser Stage, BMO Field, Ontario Place, Coca-Cola Coliseum, Queen Elizabeth Theater, Liberty Grand, and Medieval Times. The nearest airport is Billy Bishop Toronto City Airport, 1.4 mi away. Toronto's Liberty Village neighborhood is located 0.9 mi North of the Hotel, offering a variety of restaurants, bars, cafes, shops, and salons. King Street West is only 0.7 mi away and is another popular area for dining and shopping. Hotel X Toronto is 1.4 mi away from the iconic CN Tower, 1.6 mi from Toronto Symphony Orchestra, 1.7 mi from Ripley's Aquarium and 2.4 mi from the renowned Art Gallery of Ontario.

name: Hampton Inn By Hilton Toronto Arprt Corporate Center
description: This hotel is 5 mi from the Toronto Pearson International Airport and adjacent to Centennial Park. It offers an indoor pool, free airport shuttle and rooms with flat-screen TVs. Hampton Inn by Hilton Toronto Airport Corporate Center rooms include a microwave and refrigerator. The rooms are equipped with free WiFi. The Toronto Airport Hampton Inn provides guests with a daily breakfast or guest can grab a snack at the snack shop. The hotel offers an on-site gym. Hampton Inn by Hilton Toronto Airport Corporate Center is 17 mi from downtown Toronto and within a 10-minute drive of Mississauga.

name: Courtyard by Marriott Toronto Airport
description: Located in Toronto, 8.6 miles from Mississauga Convention Center, Courtyard by Marriott Toronto Airport provides accommodations with a fitness center, private parking, a restaurant and a bar. The property is around 10 miles from Aviva Centre, 10 miles from York University and 13 miles from Casa Loma. The property has a 24-hour front desk, airport transportation, an ATM and free WiFi throughout the property. At the hotel, every room has a closet and a flat-screen TV. The private bathroom is equipped with a bath, free toiletries and a hairdryer. All guest rooms will provide guests with a desk and a coffee machine. An à la carte, continental or American breakfast is served at the property. Courtyard by Marriott Toronto Airport offers 3-star accommodations with an indoor pool and sun terrace. The accommodation offers a business center for guest use. Vaughan Mills Shopping Centre is 13 miles from Courtyard by Marriott Toronto Airport, while BMO Field is 13 miles away. Toronto Pearson International Airport is 1.2 miles from the property.

name: The Westin Toronto Airport
description: A few minutes drive from Pearson International Airport via a free airport transfer and close to Toronto city center, this hotel provides spacious rooms, furnished with plush bedding and modern conveniences. The Westin Toronto Airport provides everything needed for a relaxing stay, including an on-site fitness center and indoor swimming pool. Guests at the hotel can also enjoy 2 different on-site dining options. Contemporary accommodations at the The Westin Toronto Airport are furnished with signature Heavenly beds, soft down comforters and coffeemakers featuring Starbucks coffee. In the area surrounding the The Westin Toronto Airport, guests can discover the Pearson Convention Center, Royal Woodbine Golf Club and the Woodbine Racetrack and Casino. Toronto city center attractions are also only a short 20-minute drive or train ride away. Both valet and self-parking are available with surcharge.

name: Town Inn Suites
description: This downtown Toronto hotel, located within a 5-minute walk of the Bloor-Yonge Subway Station. These spacious suites offer a fully equipped kitchen. Accommodations at Town Inn Furnished Suites provide cable TV. There is a dining area and a separate seating area with a sofa. The contemporary suites also have a desk. Town Inn Furnished Suites has a 24-hour front desk. Town Inn Suites Hotel is 1.9 mi from Eaton Center, which features shopping and dining. The University of Toronto is within a 12-minute walk of the hotel. At Town Inn Suites, we love to kickstart your morning with a tasty breakfast, but here's the scoop: our full breakfast package is served at the amazing Church Street Espresso, not right here in the hotel. It’s just across the street (a quick stroll, we promise!)—but if you'd rather skip the walk and stay in bed, we totally understand! However, if you're in the mood for a cozy spot with fantastic coffee and delicious breakfast options, Church Street Espresso is the place to be. It's a local favorite, and the perfect way to fuel up for your day.

name: InterContinental Toronto Centre By IHG
neighborhood: Downtown Toronto Southwest - Entertainment & Financial Districts
description: Just 361 feet from the Metro Toronto Convention Center, steps from the CN Tower, this hotel in downtown Toronto offers relaxing spa services, an indoor pool and an on-site restaurant. The Harbourfront Center is within 2133 feet. Modernly furnished, all the rooms come with a flat-screen TV, a safety deposit box, a mini-bar and ironing facilities. A hairdryer, free toiletries and bathrobes can be found in the bathroom. Some offer a city or lake view, while others have a separate seating area. This hotel is accredited as "China Ready": An in-room kettle, green tea and slippers are available upon request. InterContinental Toronto Center features a 24-hour fitness center and staffed business center. After a busy day, guests can relax with a massage in the hotel's full-service spa. Azure restaurant at the Toronto Center InterContinental serves local produce and seasonal menus for breakfast, lunch and dinner. Guests can enjoy a meal anytime from the hotel's 24-hour room service. The bustling Toronto Eaton Center, filled with numerous shops, is at a distance of 1 mi.

name: Courtyard by Marriott Toronto Downtown
description: Centrally located in the city of Toronto, this hotel is 10 minutes' walk from the bustling Eaton Center shopping mall and 2 minutes’ walk from College subway station. It features spacious rooms with free WiFi. A flat-screen cable TV and tea/coffee-making facilities are standard in every modern room at the Courtyard by Marriott Toronto Downtown. All rooms include a seating area and a work desk. The Bistro at the Downtown Toronto Courtyard features snacks, a la carte items, a full cocktail bar and proudly serves Starbucks® coffee. Free access to the 24-hour gym is provided to all guests of the Courtyard Toronto. The business center and lobby library are also available. The CN Tower and Art Gallery of Ontario are both 1.9 mi from the hotel. The University of Toronto is 10 minutes' walk from this hotel.

name: The St. Regis Toronto
neighborhood: Downtown Toronto Southwest - Entertainment & Financial Districts
description: Recently awarded with Double Five Stars by Forbes, The St. Regis Toronto is redefining the standard for five-star luxury in downtown Toronto, Canada. Soaring 65-stories above Canada’s international enclave for business and culture, The St. Regis Toronto offers a remarkably central location, steps from Toronto’s most preeminent landmarks including the CN Tower, Scotiabank Arena, Rogers Center, Toronto International Film Festival and the city’s premier shopping, theater and entertainment. Modern elegance and bespoke butler service unite among 258 of the city's largest guest rooms including 124 suites. Escape from the illustrious cityscape at the 31st-floor LOUIX LOUIS grand bar and restaurant, boutique luxurious Spa, or witness St. Regis' iconic champagne sabering ritual each evening at Astor Lounge.

name: The Broadview Hotel
neighborhood: Downtown Toronto Southeast - Union Station & St Lawrence Market
description: Located in Toronto, 1.5 mi from Ryerson University, The Broadview Hotel has a bar and rooms with free WiFi access. The property is located 1.6 mi from Yonge-Dundas Square and 1.6 mi from Toronto Eaton Center. Hockey Hall of Fame is 1.6 mi from the property. At the hotel, rooms are equipped with a desk and a flat-screen TV. Rooms come complete with a private bathroom equipped with a bath or shower and free toiletries, while some units at The Broadview Hotel also feature a seating area. All units feature a wardrobe. Guests have access to the on-site business center and can check the newspapers. The reception can provide advice on the area in order to help guests plan their day. Four Seasons Center for the Performing Arts is 1.9 mi from the property. The nearest airport is Billy Bishop Toronto City Airport, 3.1 mi from The Broadview Hotel.

name: Kimpton Saint George Hotel By IHG
description: Located in the Yorkville , in downtown Toronto, this hotel offers convenient amenities and services. Kimpton Saint George Hotel is within walking distance to University of Toronto and Gardiner Museum. This nonsmoking hotel provides free WiFi in all guestrooms. Complimentary tea and coffee service is available in the morning, along with evening wine hour. The University of Toronto, Royal Ontario Museum, St. George Subway Station, Bata Shoe Museum and Yorkville's renowned high-end shops and restaurants are just minutes away from the hotel.

name: The Westin Harbour Castle
neighborhood: Downtown Toronto Southeast - Union Station & St Lawrence Market
description: This large, 4-star hotel offers well-appointed, luxurious accommodations with select rooms boasting views of Lake Ontario and Toronto’s spectacular city skyline. It features an indoor pool, roof-top tennis courts and fitness center. Each of the spacious, comfortable rooms at the Westin Harbor Castle Toronto features the exclusive Westin Heavenly Bed and a host of sleek modern comforts and facilities providing the pinnacle of luxury. Whether you are visiting Toronto on business or exploring the city as a tourist, the hotel’s superb accommodations, impressive facilities, striking building and spectacular views make it an excellent choice. The pet-friendly and waterfront Westin Harbor Castle Toronto offers complimentary Wi-Fi in public areas of the property. The Westin Harbor Castle Toronto is within a 7-minute walk from the Harbourfront Center and Scotiabank Arena. The bustling Toronto Eaton Center, filled with shops, is at a distance of 1 mi.

name: The Omni King Edward Hotel
neighborhood: Downtown Toronto Southeast - Union Station & St Lawrence Market
description: Featuring a fitness center and a bar, The Omni King Edward Hotel is attractively set in the center of Toronto, a 14-minute walk from Sugar Beach. This property is located a short distance from attractions such as Four Seasons Center for the Performing Arts, Ryerson University, and Toronto Symphony Orchestra. The property has room service, a 24-hour front desk and currency exchange for guests. At the hotel rooms include air conditioning, a seating area, a flat-screen TV with cable channels, a safety deposit box and a private bathroom with a shower, free toiletries and a hairdryer. The rooms will provide guests with a fridge. An à la carte, continental or gluten-free breakfast is available at the property. At The Omni King Edward Hotel you'll find a restaurant serving American and International cuisine. Vegetarian, dairy-free and vegan options can also be requested. At the accommodation guests are welcome to use a sauna. Popular points of interest near The Omni King Edward Hotel include Hockey Hall of Fame, Yonge-Dundas Square and Toronto Eaton Center. Billy Bishop Toronto City Airport is 2.5 miles from the property.

name: Sheraton Centre Toronto Hotel
neighborhood: Downtown Toronto Southwest - Entertainment & Financial Districts
description: Located in the center of downtown Toronto, this 4-star Sheraton is located across the street from Nathan Phillips Square, a 5-minute walk from CF Toronto Eaton Center. Upscale amenities include an indoor/outdoor heated pool, modern gym, and renovated 43rd floor Club Lounge." The guest rooms at the Sheraton Center Toronto Hotel are spacious and furnished with a mahogany work desk and marble bathrooms. A flat-screen TV with in-room movies and a coffee maker are provided. The Sheraton Center Toronto Hotel features landscaped gardens surrounding a 2-story waterfall. A full-service business center and ticket and tour assistance are available in the lobby. Guests can enjoy our dining venues of Dual Citizen and 43 Down. The Sheraton Center Toronto Hotel is within a 15-minute walk of the Metro Toronto Convention Center, Scotiabank Arena, Rogers Center and the Hockey Hall of Fame. The hotel is connected to PATH, an underground network of shops and services.

name: Novotel Toronto Centre
neighborhood: Downtown Toronto Southeast - Union Station & St Lawrence Market
description: Featuring an indoor pool, hot tub and spa, Novotel Toronto Center is located within a 10-minute walk of Toronto Union Station and Air Canada Center. Guests can enjoy the on-site restaurant and free WiFi available throughout the property. Large windows, flat-screen TV with cable channels and a mini-bar are provided in all rooms of The Novotel Toronto Center. A coffee maker, work desk and ironing facilities are also included. Select rooms provide a sofa bed and living room. Café Nicole serves international meals in an intimate setting. Cocktails can be enjoyed at the Stage Door Lounge and room service is available at all times. A fitness center is open to all guests of the Toronto Novotel. Vending machines and laundry facilities are also available. The Toronto Center Novotel is a 4-minute walk from the Hockey Hall of Fame. The CN Tower is less than 0.9 mi away.

name: Marriott Downtown at CF Toronto Eaton Centre
neighborhood: Downtown Toronto Southwest - Entertainment & Financial Districts
description: This hotel is located beside the Toronto Eaton Center. Trios Bistro is on site and a 32-inch flat-screen TV is featured in rooms. Dundas Subway Station is 1148 ft away. Guest rooms at the Marriott Toronto Downtown Eaton Center Hotel include cable channels with pay-per-view movies. A coffee maker and an in-room safe are provided in the rooms. A roof top pool and a 24-hour fitness center are on-site at this nonsmoking hotel. The hotel includes foreign exchange services. The Rogers Center, an entertainment venue, is a 5 minutes’ drive from the Toronto Marriott Eaton Center Hotel. Dundas Square is located 1640 ft away, just across the street.

name: Canopy by Hilton Toronto Yorkville
description: Well set in the center of Toronto, Canopy By Hilton Toronto Yorkville provides air-conditioned rooms, free bikes, free WiFi and a fitness center. Featuring a bar, the hotel is close to several noted attractions, around a 18-minute walk from Royal Ontario Museum, 1.1 miles from Queens Park and 1.2 miles from Ryerson University. The property has room service, a 24-hour front desk and currency exchange for guests. All guest rooms at the hotel are equipped with a flat-screen TV with cable channels and a safety deposit box. All rooms will provide guests with a fridge. An à la carte, continental or American breakfast is available at the property. At Canopy By Hilton Toronto Yorkville you'll find a restaurant serving American and International cuisine. Vegetarian, dairy-free and vegan options can also be requested. The accommodation offers 4-star accommodations with an indoor pool and terrace. University of Toronto is 1.5 miles from Canopy By Hilton Toronto Yorkville, while Yonge-Dundas Square is 1.6 miles away. Billy Bishop Toronto City Airport is 4.3 miles from the property.

name: Pullman Paris Tour Eiffel
description: Ideally located at the foot of the Eiffel Tower and just steps from the Trocadéro,the Pullman Paris Tour Eiffel invites you to enjoy an unforgettable stay in the heart of the capital. The hotel features 430 modern, light-filled rooms and suites, some offering spectacular views of the Eiffel Tower or the gardens. FRAME Brasserie embodies the meeting of an iconic Parisian setting and a vibrant indoor atmosphere. More than just a contemporary brasserie, it is a lively space where the city, the open kitchen, and natural light come together to create a warm and organic ambiance. With its 24 flexible event spaces—several boasting panoramic views—the hotel is also an ideal venue for hosting both professional and private events. Finally, discover the seasonal rooftop “10e Ciel,” offering breathtaking views of the Eiffel Tower and an elegant atmosphere, perfect for unforgettable evenings overlooking Paris’s most iconic monument. Located on the Left Bank, the hotel is just a 5-minute walk from the Eiffel Tower and 1969 feet from the metro, providing easy access to the Arc de Triomphe and the Champs-Élysées.

name: Novotel Paris Centre Tour Eiffel
description: The Novotel Paris Center Tour Eiffel is within walking distance of the Eiffel Tower in the heart of Paris and is a 10-minute drive to the Parc des Princes Stadium. The hotel features a fitness center and 2 restaurants serving French and Japanese cuisine. The spacious rooms have private bathrooms and are contemporary in style. Free WiFi access is provided throughout. The Novotel Paris Center Tour Eiffel has 2 restaurants, Greem and Benkay. Overlooking the Seine, Greem serves local, organic and homemade produce. The Benkay serves Japanese dishes. Fitness Center Paris Eiffel has an indoor heated swimming pool and a fitness room. The Novotel Paris Center Tour Eiffel offers easy access to the entire city via the nearby public transport network. The Novotel Paris Center Tour Eiffel is committed to zero plastic by eliminating plastic bottles.

name: Hotel Peyris Opera
neighborhood: Opera - Saint-Lazare Station - Galeries Lafayette - 9th Arr.
description: Hotel Peyris Opera is centrally located between Opéra Garnier and the Gare du Nord and Gare de l’Est Train Stations. Free Wi-Fi is available in public areas and the Folies Bergères Music Hall is a 2-minute walk away. The Peyris Opera rooms are air-conditioned and soundproofed. Each one is equipped with an private bathroom, telephone and plasma-screen TV with satellite channels. Guests can have a drink in the hotel’s bar, which is open 24 hours a day. Parking is available nearby with preferential rates for guests of Hotel Peyris Opera. Hotel Peyris Opera is 1640 feet from the Bonne Nouvelle (lines 8 and 9) and Cadet (line 7) metro stations, making it easy to explore Paris.

name: voco Paris  Porte de Clichy By IHG
description: The voco Paris - Porte de Clichy is just 1640 feet from Porte de Clichy, in the northern area of Paris. It features soundproofed accommodations with air conditioning and guests have access to the fitness room. Each guest room at the voco Paris - Porte de Clichy, an IHG Hotel features a flat-screen TV with satellite channels including beIN Sports. They also have an electric kettle and a laptop safe box. WiFi access up to 100Mb is available for free. The voco Paris - Porte de Clichy, an IHG Hotel’s Romcoco restaurant serves international cuisine from Monday to Friday. Guests can enjoy an American breakfast buffet each morning and there is also a lounge bar that serves snacks every day. The voco Paris - Porte de Clichy, an IHG Hotel’s multilingual staff can offer local tourist information. The Porte de Clichy Metro station provides direct access to Saint-Lazare and the Champs Elysees.

name: Le 12 Hôtel
description: Located in Paris's 8th district, the brand-new Hotel Le 12 is just a 15-minute walk from Opéra Garnier and the department stores Galeries Lafayettes and Printemps in the Grands Boulevards area. It offers rooms with attached bathroom with high speed free wifi in a restored Haussmann building. The soundproofed guest rooms are decorated in warm and colorful tones. A flat-screen TV with satellite channels and facilities for making tea and coffee are provided in each room. Each room has a private bathroom with RITUALS toiletries and a towel dryer. Every morning, Le 12 Hôtel serves a continental buffet breakfast. Afterwards, guests can rent a bicycle from the hotel. Staff are available 24 hours a day to provide advice for visiting Paris. Gare St Lazare Train Station is 328 feet from Hôtel and provides connections for 5 Metro lines.

name: Le Jardin de Verre by Locke
description: Attractively set in Paris, Le Jardin de Verre by Locke has air-conditioned rooms, a fitness center, free WiFi and a terrace. The property has a bar, as well as a restaurant serving French cuisine. The property is allergy-free throughout and is located a 14-minute walk from Luxembourg Gardens. At the hotel, all rooms are equipped with a closet. Rooms include an electric tea pot and a private bathroom with a shower and free toiletries, while certain rooms contain a kitchen equipped with a fridge. At Le Jardin de Verre by Locke every room is equipped with a desk and a flat-screen TV. The breakfast offers buffet, à la carte or continental options. Speaking Arabic, English, Spanish and French, staff are ready to help around the clock at the reception. Popular points of interest near the accommodation include Sainte Chapelle, Notre Dame and Gare de Lyon. Paris - Orly Airport is 8.1 miles from the property.

name: Grand Hotel Lafayette
neighborhood: Opera - Saint-Lazare Station - Galeries Lafayette - 9th Arr.
description: Located a 10-minute walk from Opéra Garnier and 2953 feet from Galeries Lafayette, Grand Hotel Lafayette is a design-style hotel, decorated in silver tones. The rooms at Grand Hotel Lafayette have an LCD TV with satellite channels and an IPod Docking Station. The bathroom has a professional hairdryer, and room service is available until midnight. A buffet breakfast is available and a continental breakfast can be brought to the comfort of your room. Additional facilities are available on site such as concierge service, laundry facilities and a safe. You can read the newspapers and use free Wi-Fi access throughout. The hotel is located a 2-minute walk from Le Peletier and Cadet Metro Stations which provides direct access to Ile Saint Louis and Porte d’Italie.

name: The Originals Boutique, Hotel Maison Montmartre, Paris
neighborhood: Montmartre - Moulin Rouge - Sacre Coeur - 18th Arr.
description: Located within 1.3 mi of Sacré-Coeur, The Originals Boutique, Hôtel Maison Montmartre Paris Les Puces has a number of amenities including a terrace, a bar and on-site dining. The property is located 1.6 mi from La Cigale Concert Hall, 2.2 mi from Mathurins Theater and 2.2 mi from Opéra Garnier. The accommodations features a 24-hour front desk . At the hotel, the rooms are fitted with a desk. Each room has a private bathroom. All units in Hotel Maison Montmartre are fitted with a flat-screen TV and free toiletries. In the morning, breakfast is served in the restaurant located on the top floor, where guests can enjoy views of the city. The bar is also set on the top floor of the building. Gare du Nord is located 2.4 mi away from Hotel Maison Montmartre The nearest airport is Paris Charles de Gaulles, 15 mi from Hotel Maison Montmartre and Paris Orly aiport is 17 mi away .

name: Villa Beaumarchais Hotel
neighborhood: Le Marais - the Centre Pompidou - Hotel de Ville - 3rd Arr.
description: Located on a quiet street in the Marais district, Villa Beaumarchais is just 1476 feet from the Carnavalet Museum. All rooms overlook the winter garden. Free high-speed Wi-Fi is available throughout the hotel. Each air-conditioned room includes a mini-bar and a flat-screen satellite TV. Decorated in a classic and refined style, some have a seating area. The private bathroom includes a hairdryer. Enjoy a buffet breakfast served in the dining room, which features a glass roof, fountains, and a green space. The buffet includes freshly squeezed fruit juices, homemade cakes, and organic products. Guests can relax with a drink in the Villa Beaumarchais bar. An airport shuttle service is available upon request for a surcharge, and the reception is open 24/7. Parking is available by advance reservation for an additional fee. We are also happy to welcome your pets for an extra charge. Chemin Vert metro station, a 3-minute walk away, offers direct access to the Opéra Garnier and La Madeleine. Place des Vosges is just a 6-minute walk from the hotel.

name: Holiday Inn Paris Montmartre Hotel By IHG
neighborhood: Montmartre - Moulin Rouge - Sacre Coeur - 18th Arr.
description: Located in the heart of Montmartre, a 10-minute walk from Place du Tertre and the Sacré-Coeur Basilica, Holiday Inn Paris Montmartre offers free Wi-Fi access in the entire property. Set in a residential area, the hotel offers air-conditioned room with 26-inch, flat screen TVs with satellite and foreign channels. They also have double-glazed windows, tea and coffee making facilities, 2 kinds of pillows (either soft or hard) and private bathrooms with a bathtub. All rooms are accessible by a elevator. A buffet breakfast is served daily in the spacious dining area. Guests can enjoy a drink, while reading the free daily newspapers or relax out in the furnished courtyard. This hotel is set near Place Clichy and the Pigalle district, an area that offers a wide choice of brasseries, restaurants as well as characteristic Parisian entertainment, such as the well known cabaret Moulin Rouge. Buses 80 and 95 give direct access to the Opéra, Champs-Elysées, Concorde and Saint-Germain des Prés.

name: ibis Paris Eiffel Tower Cambronne 15th Hotel
description: Located in the 15th district of Paris, just a 15-minute walk from the Eiffel Tower, ibis Paris Tour Eiffel offers a 24-hour reception, free Wi-Fi access throughout and luggage storage. Cambronne Metro Station is just 492 feet away. All rooms feature a flat-screen TV with satellite channels, a wardrobe, desk and telephone. The private bathroom includes a hairdryer. A buffet breakfast composed of sweet and savory dishes such as eggs, fruit salad, yogurts and juices is served every day. Pastries baked on site and fresh French Madeleine cakes are also on offer, as well as a hot beverage and a piece of fruit to take away. Outside of regular breakfast hours guests can also enjoy a lighter option, available from 04:00. The banks of the River Seine and Hotel des Invalides are a 15-minute walk away. Champs de Mars RER Station is 0.6 mi from the hotel and offers direct access to the Château de Versailles.

name: Pullman Paris Montparnasse
description: Located in Montparnasse district on the Left Bank of the river Seine, the 4-star Pullman Paris Montparnasse provides free WiFi. Montparnasse Train Station is just 1214 feet away. Each room is fitted with air conditioning, a flat-screen TV, a mini-bar as well as a private bathroom with a hairdryer. Guests can enjoy the views over Montparnasse district. Room service is available 24/7. Fi’lia restaurant serves traditional Italian dishes, while Umami Burger Paris restaurant serves international cuisine. Guests can relax and have a drink at 2 different bars. A cafe is also available, serving focaccias and cocktails. Guests can enjoy the fitness room. Saint Germain des Pres and the Eiffel Tower can be reached within a 20-minute metro ride each. The Luxembourg Garden is a 15-minute walk from the hotel.

name: Maison Albar Hotels Le Diamond
description: Maison Albar - Le Diamond is located close to the Opera Garnier and the Grands Boulevards and Champs Elysées shopping areas. It offers modern and stylish rooms with free WiFi. Guestrooms at the Maison Albar - Le Diamond are equipped with air conditioning, flat-screen TVs and private bathrooms with either a bath or shower. The executive rooms feature Nespresso coffee machines and iPod docking stations. All rooms are serviced by an elevator. The breakfast Collection is served every morning and includes a selection of juices and eggs upon request. The hotel has its own cocktail lounge with live entertainment and guests can also enjoy a drink in the hotel’s terrace and garden area. The hotel is located 1476 feet from Saint Lazare train and metro station. Department stores Printemps and Galéries Lafayette are 2625 ft away. The Louver Museum and the district of Montmartre are within walking distance of the hotel.

name: Pullman Paris La Defense
description: Pullman Paris La Défense is a 5* hotel located in La Défense business district, opposite the CNIT and Grande Arche. Provided with private parking, it is just a 2-minute from the Quatre Temps Shopping Center, which is open 7/7. The U Arena is located 0.6 mi away from the hotel. The contemporary guest rooms include fiber-optic internet access free of charge and a flat-screen TV with international channel. Several types of breakfast can be enjoyed every morning before work or sightseeing, including a full buffet breakfast, as well as an Asian and gluten free options. Breakfast is served from 06:30 to 10:00 from Monday to Friday and until 11:00 on weekends. Authentic cuisine adapted to your taste are also available in the restaurant. The Quinte & Sens Restaurant serves international cuisine and drinks are proposed in the bar. Additional facilities at Pullman Paris La Défense include a fitness center (open 24 hours a day) with a hammam. Room service is available 24 hours a day. The Champs-Elysées is 10 minutes away by metro. Only one bottle left in some rooms - There is no longer a mini-bar - There are no more individual toiletries in the bathrooms. They are dispensers

name: Holiday Inn Paris Gare de Lyon Bastille By IHG
neighborhood: Gare de Lyon - Bastille South - Bercy - 12th Arr.
description: Holiday Inn Paris - Gare de Lyon Bastille, an IHG Hotel Bastille is ideally located in the center, 853 feet from Gare de Lyon Train Station. It features stylish air-conditioned accommodations with flat-screen satellite TV. The rooms and suite at the Holiday Inn Paris - Gare de Lyon Bastille, an IHG Hotel Bastille are all equipped with a mini-bar, desk and telephone. The private bathrooms feature a hairdryer and a bathtub. A buffet breakfast is provided daily at the Holiday Inn Paris - Gare de Lyon Bastille, an IHG Hotel Bastille and either served in the lovely dining area or in the comfort of your own room. There is also a lounge bar which combines modern furniture and Belle-Epoque décor. Front desk is open 24 hours, and free WiFi access is available in the entire Holiday Inn Paris - Gare de Lyon Bastille, an IHG Hotel Bastille. Gare de Lyon Metro and RER Station provide direct access to Disneyland, the Champs Elysées, the Louver Museum and La Defense business district. This hotel is 2297 feet from the trendy district of Bastille and a 15-minute walk from AccorHotels Arena, and with the extension of Metro Line 14, Paris Orly airport is now 22 minutes away from Paris Gare de lyon.

name: Crowne Plaza Paris République By IHG
neighborhood: Le Marais  - Republique - Hotel de Ville - 3rd Arr.- 11th Arr.
description: This 19th-century building with its striking façade is the home of the Crowne Plaza Paris République, a 4-star hotel located at Place de la République. Fully refurbished in 2019, it offers a large area on ground floor with a flexible workspace. Guestrooms are spacious and contemporary in style. All rooms and suites are equipped with modern bathrooms and include a flat-screen TV. The Crowne Plaza Paris République also features a restaurant and a bar. The restaurant serves traditional French cuisine while the bar offers a variety of drinks, signature cocktails and savory homemade meals in an open space flexible to all needs. Centrally located in one of Paris’ most lively districts, the Crowne Plaza is an ideal base to discover the city of lights. It is just a few steps from a Metro stop and within walking distance of Canal Saint-Martin. There are a number of restaurants, cafés and bars nearby.

name: Hôtel Lebron
neighborhood: Opera - Saint-Lazare Station - Galeries Lafayette - 9th Arr.
description: Set in the center of the city, Lebron is ideally located to explore Paris. It offers rooms with flat-screen cable TV in the 9th district, one minute from Cadet Metro Station. The accommodations feature hardwood floors and tea and coffee facilities. There is also a working area with desk and telephone, and each private bathroom is equipped with a hairdryer. A minibar is available upon request. Hotel Lebron invites you to discover its’ bar and its restaurant with fixed-price meals and a menu. A full breakfast is provided every morning and can be served in the comfort of your room. Additional services include a 24-hour front desk, free Wi-Fi in public areas, dry cleaning and laundry. The Hotel Lebron also features meeting facilities for up to 80 people. Cadet and Notre-Dame-de-Lorette Metro Stations provide direct access to the Opera Garnier, The Galeries Lafayette department store, Montmartre district and Saint-Lazare and Montparnasse Stations.

name: Hotel De Castiglione
description: Our hotel is ideally located Rue du Faubourg Saint Honoré, in a quiet and secure area. You are in the heart of luxury stores and the residences of ambassadors, 820 feet from the Madeleine, 984 feet from Place de La Concorde and close to the legendary Avenue des Champs-Elysées. Our 4-star establishment offers 98 renovated rooms in a contemporary style. Our reception service welcomes you 24/7. Close to all amenities, you can access the Concorde and Madeleine metro stations a 5-minute walk away and the emblematic Gare Saint Lazare station a 12-minute walk away. Welcome to one of the most luxurious streets in Paris!

name: Hotel Tourisme Avenue
description: The Tourisme Avenue Hotel is ideally located in the center of Paris. Renovated in modern style and continually renewed, the Tourisme Avenue Hotel has 56 rooms including 7 privilege suites and 3 junior suites. It is ideally located so you can enjoy your stay in Paris to the full! At the heart of the 15th arrondissement, the Hotel welcomes guests in one of the city’s quietest districts. This central location is just a 5-minute walk from the Champ de Mars and 10 minutes away from the Eiffel Tower.

name: Hotel De L'Exposition - Tour Eiffel
description: Located on the Left Bank in central Paris, this hotel exhibits photos, antiques and paintings celebrating the city’s important historic events. It provides an airport shuttle and a 24-hour front desk. The air conditioned guest rooms are equipped with a flat-screen TV with cable channels. Guest rooms feature a contemporary private bathroom including a hairdryer. Free Wi-Fi is available throughout Hôtel de l'Exposition. A continental breakfast is served every morning in the breakfast room, featuring stone walls and a parquet floor. Guests can enjoy a cocktail in the bar at Hôtel de l'Exposition - Tour Eiffel after a day of sightseeing. Champ de Mars Park, leading to the Eiffel Tower, is a 15-minute walk away. Charles Michels Metro Station is 1200 ft away, providing access to Saint Germain des Près.

name: Hotel Richmond Gare du Nord
neighborhood: Gare du Nord - Canal Saint Martin - 10th Arr.
description: Richmond Hotel is just in front of Gare du Nord Train Station, which leads directly to the shops and cafés of Canal Saint-Martin. This air-conditioned hotel offers rooms with private bathrooms, an elevator and free Wi-Fi access. All rooms feature a flat-screen TV with satellite channels. They also include a desk, a wardrobe and a private bathroom with a shower and a hairdryer. Every morning, breakfast is served as a buffet. Guests can buy drinks 24 hours a day from a vending machine. A large range of restaurants can be found within 100 yards of Richmond Hotel. The property is 1.5 miles from the Seine River and Île de la Cité, and Place de la République is one mile away. Private parking is available nearby.

name: Dandy Hotel
neighborhood: Louvre - Vendome - Concorde - Les Halles - 1st Arr. - 2nd Arr.
description: Attractively located in the center of Paris, Dandy Hotel has air-conditioned rooms, a terrace, free WiFi and a bar. The property is close to Gare de l'Est, Opéra Garnier and Tuileries Garden. The property is non-smoking throughout and is located a 5-minute walk from Pompidou Center. At the hotel, the rooms are equipped with a closet. Rooms contain a private bathroom and coffee machine, while certain rooms come with a balcony and others also feature city views. The rooms in Dandy Hotel are equipped with a flat-screen TV and free toiletries. The accommodation offers a buffet or continental breakfast. Dandy Hotel offers 4-star accommodations with a sauna. Speaking Arabic, English, French and Italian at the 24-hour front desk, staff are always at hand to help. Popular points of interest near the hotel include Louvre Museum, Notre Dame and Sainte Chapelle. Paris - Orly Airport is 11 miles from the property.

name: Hotel Vaneau Saint Germain
description: This hotel is located a 15-minute walk from Saint-Germain-des-Près and 20 minutes from the Musée d’Orsay. Some of the rooms are equipped with stained-glass windows and marble fireplaces. All of the rooms at Hôtel Vaneau Saint Germain are ensuite and air-conditioned and have flat-screen TV. Breakfast is served daily and can be enjoyed in the dining area or in the comfort of your guestroom. The reception is open 24 hours a day. Vaneau Metro Station is just 361 feet from the hotel. An airport shuttle service can be requested at an extra cost.

name: citizenM Paris Gare de Lyon
neighborhood: Gare de Lyon - Bastille South - Bercy - 12th Arr.
description: The citizenM Paris Gare de Lyon is set in the 12th district of Paris. It offers views of the Seine and is located near to Gare de Lyon train station. Each room is fitted with large beds, a power rain shower and iPads that control the entire room. Rooms are also equipped with a mini fridge, hairdryers and custom-made amenities. Free high speed WiFi is available throughout the property. Buffet breakfast is served daily. There is a 24-hour desk and food and beverage area, canteenM, that offers draft beers, barista-made coffees and the best cocktails in town. There is also a rooftop bar offering views over the city. Within walking distance guests can find Opera Bastille is 2953 feet away, while Noter Dame Cathedral is 0.8 mi from the property. The nearest airport is Paris - Orly Airport, 8.1 mi away and Charles de Gaulle is a 30-minute train ride away with the direct RER B train from Chatelet.

name: Victoria Palace Hotel
description: The Victoria Palace Hotel is located 820 feet from the 18th century Rue du Cherche-Midi and 2461 feet from both Montparnasse Train Station and Le Bon Marché Department Store. This hotel also provides free WiFi throughout the property. Victoria Palace Hotel offers spacious soundproofed rooms with a desk and a flat-screen TV and some room feature a seating area. Each air-conditioned room or suite has a laptop safe. Bathrobes, slippers and free toiletries are provided. A breakfast is served every morning in the breakfast room at Victoria Palace Hotel but guests can also have a continental breakfast in the privacy of their room. Guests can enjoy a drink while reading the "newspapers in their room. A meeting room is available on site and both concierge and business center services can be provided. You will be able to use our table to have information about local markets, craftsmen and a plethora of independent shops and artisans which visitors might discover in the area. The Victoria Palace also provides a tour desk and ticket service at the 24-hour reception. The Luxembourg Gardens are 2789 feet away. The Saint-Germain-des-Prés neighborhood can be found 0.6 mi from the property while Musée d’Orsay is 1.2 mi away. Orly Aiport can be reached within 9 mi.

name: Holiday Inn Express Paris-Canal De La Villette By IHG
neighborhood: Buttes Chaumont - La Villette - Bagnolet - 19th Arr. - 20th Arr.
description: The Holiday Inn Express Paris-Canal De La Villette is located on the banks of the Canal de l'Ourcq and the Bassin de la Villette in Paris. Located a 50-minute metro ride from Stade de France Stadium, this design hotel features wooden terraces and a private garden that overlooks the canal. The Canal de la Villette Holiday Inn offers soundproofed rooms equipped with air conditioning and a TV with 100 TV channels. They each have a private bathroom, and are serviced by a elevator. Free high-speed WiFi is provided in all areas. Guests can enjoy traditional French cuisine and fish specialties at the restaurant located in the same building as the hotel. There is also a bar, a 24-hour reception and a safety deposit box available at the reception. The Holiday Inn Express Paris is just a 5-minute walk from the Riquet Metro Station, which provides direct access to the Opera Garnier and Le Louver. Les Docks de Paris Event Venue are 1.6 mi away.

name: Normandy Le Chantier
neighborhood: Louvre - Vendome - Concorde - Les Halles - 1st Arr. - 2nd Arr.
description: Located a 5-minute walk from the Louver Museum and the Jardin des Tuileries, Normandy Le Chantier offers guests the opportunity to experience the transformation of its 19th century building during a two-year renovation project. The renovation is still during so it's not finished. Guests will enjoy their stay in newly renovated rooms which boast high-speed WiFi, a flat-screen TV and double-glazed windows. The renovated rooms also feature modern bathrooms with a walk-in shower and a hairdryer. Breakfast is available each morning, with room service being an option. The hotel has two restaurants, El Vecino inspired with authentic Mexican taqueria and Buckwheat, a traditional French crêperie. In the evening, guests can enjoy a drink in the hotel's speakeasy-style bar, Rehab. The hotel has several meeting rooms, including an elegant reception room with Napoleon III-style ceilings, Il Palazzo, towering nearly 23 feet above your head. Other services include an ironing room, and use of a microwave. Normandy Le Chantier is 787 feet from Palais Royal - Musée du Louver Metro Station, which provides direct access to Arc de Triomphe, Opéra Garnier and the Champs-Elysées Avenue.

name: Novotel Paris Les Halles
neighborhood: Louvre - Vendome - Concorde - Les Halles - 1st Arr. - 2nd Arr.
description: Our hotel is renovating and developing to improve your experience! Every change is carefully thought out to ensure you have a pleasant stay in comfortable, welcoming surroundings. The Novotel Paris Les Halles is located in the heart of Paris. From this hotel, you can go shopping in the nearby districts of Rue de Rivoli, Boulevard Haussmann or Rue du Faubourg Saint-Honore. There are 5 metro lines and 3 RER lines located within a short walk of the hotel. The Louver Museum, the Noter Dame Cathedral, the Marais district and the Georges Pompidou Museum are all a 10-minute walk away. Guest rooms are spacious and equipped with private bathrooms, flat-screen TV with satellite channels, internet connection and air conditioning. Rooms are nonsmoking. Guests can enjoy meals or cocktails on the patio of the hotel. It serves traditional French cuisine at the hotel's restaurant or in the lounge bar. Breakfast is free for up to 2 children under 16 years old. The hotel offers numerous services to satisfy its guests such as free WiFi and a fitness center. Public parking can be accessed nearby at a reduced rate.

name: Diese Hotel Bastille
neighborhood: Le Marais  - Republique - Hotel de Ville - 3rd Arr.- 11th Arr.
description: The Dièse Hôtel Bastille features on-site parking, free Wi-Fi and a small interior garden. Charonne Metro Station is just 170 yards away Guest rooms at the Dièse Hôtel Bastille come with facilities for making hot drinks, flat-screen TVs and satellite channels. They include a private bathroom, a safe and a work desk. A generous buffet breakfast is served every morning. This can be enjoyed on the terrace when the weather is nice. The Dièse Hôtel Bastille is just over half a mile from the famous Père Lachaise cemetery, where the graves of Jim Morrison and Edith Piaf are found. Place de la Bastille is one mile away.

name: Hotel Cambon
neighborhood: Louvre - Vendome - Concorde - Les Halles - 1st Arr. - 2nd Arr.
description: Set in the 1st district in central Paris, this 4-star hotel is 164 feet from the Tuileries Garden and a 10-minute walk from the Louver Museum. The Hotel Cambon features an extensive collection of artistic objects and paintings. Each air-conditioned room includes satellite TV and a mini-bar. Some rooms offer a private terrace or balcony with views of the Tuileries Garden. All rooms are individually decorated with bright colors. A buffet breakfast is served every morning at the Hotel Cambon. Guests can enjoy drinks in the hotel bar, which features a glass roof. Hotel Cambon is a 5-minute walk from the Place Vendôme and Rue Saint Honoré. Concorde Metro Station is 164 feet away, providing access to the Champs Elysées. Free WiFi is provided throughout the hotel.

name: ibis Paris 17 Clichy-Batignolles Hotel
description: Located in the Batignolles district of Paris, ibis Paris 17 Clichy-Batignolles offers 3 on-site restaurants and rooms with free Wi-Fi access. You will be just 984 feet from the Brochant (line 13) and Porte de Clichy (line 13, 14 & RER C) metro stations. All of the accommodations at the ibis Paris 17 Clichy-Batignolles hotel has a desk, satellite TV and a private bathroom with a bath or shower. The hotel serves a full breakfast every morning in the form of an all-you-can-eat hot buffet. You will find everything you need to treat yourself and more particularly our pastries, madeleines and various breads straight out of the oven! A Food & Drinks offer is also available 24 hours a day. This ibis hotel is 1.9 mi from Montmartre and 2.5 mi from Gare du Nord. You can reach Galeries Lafayette and the Palais des Congrès in 20 minutes by metro. Private and secure parking is available on site at an additional cost of EUR 20/24 hours, subject to availability without guarantee.

name: Quinzerie hôtel
description: Quinzerie hôtel features a fitness center, garden, a shared lounge and terrace in Paris. With free WiFi, this 4-star hotel offers room service and a 24-hour front desk. The hotel provides a sauna and an ATM. All guest rooms at the hotel come with air conditioning, a seating area, a flat-screen TV with satellite channels, a safety deposit box and a private bathroom with free toiletries and a hairdryer. Every room has a coffee machine, while certain rooms here will provide you with a patio and others also provide guests with city views. All rooms will provide guests with a desk and an electric tea pot. Breakfast is available, and includes buffet, continental and vegetarian options. Guests can use the business center or relax in the bar. Paris Expo – Porte de Versailles is 1.1 miles from Quinzerie hôtel, while Eiffel Tower is 1.4 miles away. Paris - Orly Airport is 14 miles from the property.

name: Bloom House Hotel & SPA
neighborhood: Gare du Nord - Canal Saint Martin - 10th Arr.
description: Bloom House Hôtel & SPA has a garden, shared lounge, a terrace and bar in Paris. Providing a restaurant, the property also features a fitness center, as well as an indoor pool and a sauna. The property provides a hot tub, room service and free WiFi throughout the property. A buffet, continental or vegetarian breakfast is served at the property. Speaking Arabic, German, English and Spanish at the reception, staff are always at hand to help. Popular points of interest near the hotel include Gare de l'Est, Gare du Nord and La Cigale Concert Hall. Paris - Charles De Gaulle Airport is 12 miles away.

name: Hôtel Mayflower Opera
description: Located in the 8th district of Paris, just 18 minutes' walk from Opéra Garnier, Hôtel Mayflower Opéra offers accommodations with free WiFi. The air-conditioned rooms feature a flat-screen TV, desk or seating area and wardrobe. A coffee machine is also featured in the room. Each room has a private bathroom with free toiletries and a hair dryer. Breakfast is served daily in the dining room. A number of restaurants can be reached within walking distance. Additional facilities include a 24-hour front desk at the property and the on-site bar. Sacré-Coeur is 1 mi from Hôtel Mayflower Opéra, while Avenue des Champs-Elysées is 1.1 mi from the property. The nearest airport is Orly Airport, 11 mi from the property. The nearest station is Rome Metro Station, a 2-minute walk away from the hotel.

name: Hotel Mercure Paris Centre Tour Eiffel
description: This Paris hotel is located just a 2-minute walk from the Eiffel Tower, near Trocadéro and the River Seine. The hotel offers a fitness center, a bar and is only 2.8 mi from the Parc des Princes Stadium. The air-conditioned guest rooms at the Mercure Paris Center Tour Eiffel are equipped with satellite TV and private bathrooms. An American or buffet breakfast is offered daily and can be enjoyed on the terrace. Le Jardin restaurant serves a traditional French dinner and carefully selected wines. The Mercure Paris Center Tour Eiffel is 2 minutes from Bir Hakeim Metro station. Avenue Champs-Elysées, the Arc de Triomphe and the Branly Museum are also nearby.

name: Hôtel Marais Bastille
neighborhood: Le Marais  - Republique - Hotel de Ville - 3rd Arr.- 11th Arr.
description: Located in central Paris, Hôtel Marais Bastille is just a short walk from the Place des Vosges. It offers soundproofed accommodations equipped with air conditioning and free WiFi. Each guest room at Hôtel Marais Bastille is serviced by a elevator. They have a private bathroom, TV and room service. The hotel also has a lounge and a library. The hotel is just 656 feet from Breguet Sabin Metro Station, which provides direct access to the Canal Saint Martin, and Gare du Nord. Place de la Bastille is a 5-minute walk away.

name: Hotel Ares Eiffel
description: Hotel Arès Tour Eiffel is a 4-star boutique hotel located a 10-minute walk from the Eiffel Tower. It offers air-conditioned rooms with free Wi-Fi and free access to a fitness and well-being center 164 feet from the hotel. Rooms at Arès Tour Eiffel are a mix of Baroque and contemporary decor. Each room is equipped with a flat-screen TV with satellite channels, a mini-bar and a desk. The modern bathrooms feature Versace tiles and Hermès toiletries. Guests have the option of enjoying a buffet breakfast in the hotel’s breakfast room or in their guest room. For snacks and other meals, room service is offered. The reception desk at the Arès is open 24 hours a day and offers a reservation service for shows, restaurants and excursions. The hotel also offers a dry-cleaning service and luggage storage. La Motte-Picquet-Grenelle Metro Station is located 853 feet from the hotel and offers direct access to Opera Garnier and Galéries Lafayette department store. The Village Suisse antique market is 1 minute away and The Rodin Museum is a 20-minute walk from the hotel.

name: Le Marquis Eiffel
description: Just a 5-minute walk to the Eiffel Tower, this boutique hotel offers elegant rooms and is a 10-minute walk from the Trocadero Gardens. Guest rooms at Le Marquis Eiffel are equipped with a flat-screen TV with satellite channels. Room service is available. Free toiletries and a hairdryer are included in the bathrooms, while some rooms also provide bathrobes. In the morning, guests can choose from a buffet or a continental breakfast served on the outdoor terrace. Hotel Le Marquis Eiffel also features a lounge bar and a library. Free Wi-Fi access is available in the entire hotel. Reception is open 24 hours at Le Marquis Eiffel, and there is a concierge service that can make reservations for restaurants and theater shows upon request. The nearest Metro stop is Dupleix which provides direct access to the Arc de Triomphe, Effel Tower and Trocadero.

name: Grand Hotel Magenta
neighborhood: Gare du Nord - Canal Saint Martin - 10th Arr.
description: Just 55 yards from Gare du Nord Train Station, this hotel offers soundproof guest rooms with satellite TV. An airport shuttle can be organized upon request at the 24-hour front desk. Wi-Fi access and a telephone are provided in each room. Guest rooms have a private bathroom and a simple decor. All of the rooms are serviced by an elevator. Poissonnière Metro Station is just over a quarter mile away, with direct services to the Opéra Garnier and the Louvre Museum. The Montmartre district is a 10 minute walk away.

name: Les Jardins Du Marais
neighborhood: Le Marais  - Republique - Hotel de Ville - 3rd Arr.- 11th Arr.
description: Located in the Marais district in Paris, this 4-star hotel offers rooms and suites set around a 4921 ft² courtyard. It features a bar. The air-conditioned rooms at Les Jardins du Marais decorated in a contemporary style. They feature a flat-screen TV with satellite channels and a mini-bar. Each room has a marble bathroom. An American buffet breakfast is served every morning. Guests can also relax in the garden with a drink from the bar. The hotel is located within a 10-minute walk of both Place de la République and Place de la Bastille. Saint-Sébastien-Froissart Metro Station is 328 feet from Les Jardins Du Marais and provides direct access to the Opera Garnier and Place de la Concorde.

name: Grand Hotel Saint Michel
description: Grand Hotel Saint Michel is in the heart of Paris, just over a quarter mile from the Luxembourg Gardens and 270 yards from the Pantheon. It has modern rooms with free Wi-Fi. Guest rooms at the Grand Hotel Saint Michel are air-conditioned and individually decorated. They include flat-screen TV and a stylish private bathroom. Some have a view of the Parisian rooftops. Additional services include buffet breakfast, room service, and afternoon tea served in the lobby area. Relaxation activities available include a fitness center and a hammam where massages can be arranged for a fee. The Grand Hotel is in the Latin Quarter and is close to several Metro stops. Luxembourg RER Train station is a 5-minute walk away and provides direct access to Charles de Gaulle Airport.

name: Grand Hotel Du Havre
description: Located in the chic 9th district in Paris, this hotel is located beside Saint-Lazare Train Station. It has a 24-hour reception and guest rooms feature satellite TV and free Wi-Fi access. Each room has a classic décor and the private bathrooms include a hairdryer. All of the rooms are serviced by a elevator. A buffet breakfast is served every morning in the dining at Grand Hôtel du Havre. Relax with a drink in a leather armchair at the hotel bar-lounge. Hôtel du Havre has a 24-hour reception, and staff can reserve taxis and shows. Galeries Lafayette department store is a 10-minute walk from the hotel and the Madeleine Church is 2133 feet away.

name: Drawing House
description: Located in Paris and with Luxembourg Gardens reachable within 1.6 miles, Drawing House has concierge services, allergy-free rooms, a restaurant, free WiFi throughout the property and a bar. This 4-star hotel offers room service and a 24-hour front desk. Guests can use the spa and wellness center with an indoor pool, fitness center, and sauna, as well as a terrace. All rooms at the hotel come with a seating area and a flat-screen TV with satellite channels. The rooms come with a coffee machine and a private bathroom with a shower and free toiletries, while selected rooms also feature a kitchen equipped with a fridge. Guest rooms will provide guests with a closet and an electric tea pot. Drawing House offers a buffet or continental breakfast. Rodin Museum is 1.6 miles from the accommodation, while Orsay Museum is 2 miles from the property. Paris - Orly Airport is 8.1 miles away.

name: Novotel Paris Gare Montparnasse
description: The Novotel Paris Center Gare Montparnasse is located in the city center of Paris. It is 1312 feet from both Pasteur and Montparnasse-Bienvenüe Metro Stations, which give direct access to the Eiffel Tower, the Marais, the Champs-Elysées, Montmartre and Saint-Germain-des-Près. The rooms are air-conditioned and feature a flat-screen HD TV with satellite channels. There is also an electric kettle and mini-bar. The Executive rooms come with free drinks, a Nespresso coffee machine, a bathrobe and slippers. All private bathrooms have a bath or shower. Halle 4 is a restaurant and there is a bar with a shaded terrace. The bar offers a variety of drinks and entertainment is provided. Guests can also enjoy sports events on the large TV screen. The 24-hour reception also sells a selection of snacks. The buffet breakfast can be served in the restaurant or on the sun terrace and includes pastries, fruits, eggs, cold meats and hot items. An express breakfast option is also available at the bar. There is also private and covered parking, a ticket service, free digital newspapers and an iMac computer in the lobby. Free fiber optic WiFi is available throughout.

name: Acropole
description: In Paris, Hotel Acropole is close to the Porte de Versailles exhibition center. It offers accommodations with free Wi-Fi and flat-screen TVs with satellite channels. All of the rooms have air conditioning. A buffet breakfast is served each morning. With a 24-hour front desk, the hotel is next to the Porte d'Orleans Metro and Tram stations, which provide direct access to Montparnasse and Saint-Germain-des-Prés.
