name: Libertel Gare Du Nord Suede
neighborhood: Gare du Nord - Canal Saint Martin - 10th Arr.
description: Located in central Paris, this hotel is 656 feet from Gare du Nord and 2133 feet from Gare de l’Est. It features a 24-hour reception and free Wi-Fi internet access. The air-conditioned guest rooms are equipped with a flat-screen TV and tea and coffee making facilities. Each room has a private bathroom with a hairdryer and all rooms are serviced by a elevator. A buffet breakfast is served every morning in the breakfast room. Libertel Gare Du Nord Suede is just 5 minutes by train to Stade de France football stadium. Grévin Museum is a 20-minute walk away. Public parking is available nearby.

name: Hôtel du Jardin des Plantes
description: Hôtel du Jardin des Plantes is opposite the Jardin des Plantes and 1969 feet from the Natural History Museum in Paris’ 5th district. It offers air-conditioned guest rooms with private bathrooms. Cable TV is provided in each of the soundproofed rooms at the Hôtel du Jardin des Plantes. Private bathrooms are equipped with a hairdryer and amenities. Most rooms have free Wi-Fi access. A buffet breakfast is served every morning before exploring the city. Hôtel du Jardin des Plantes staff are available 24-hours and the hotel runs a ticket desk for Paris shows and excursions. Noter Dame Cathedral is a 15-minute walk along the River Seine. Gare d’Austerlitz Metro and Train Station is just 820 feet from the hotel. The hotel is provided with a system of smart legs able to capture the bed bugs and avoid infestations.

name: Hotel Elysees Regencia
neighborhood: Trocadero Gardens - Eiffel Tower West - Champs-Elysees West
description: Located in central Paris, this 4-star hotel is 1969 feet from the Arc de Triomphe. It offers a wellness center with a steam room and a fitness center. The soundproofed guest rooms at Hôtel Elysées Régencia feature a TV with satellite channels. All rooms include a coffee machine, private bathroom and free WiFi access. Some rooms have a seating area. A buffet breakfast including organic products is served every morning in the dining room. Guests can enjoy drinks in the bar at Hôtel Elysées Régencia. Room service is also available. The hotel offers a 24-hour reception. An airport shuttle and nearby private parking are also available upon request. The property is a 5-minute walk from the Champs-Élysées Avenue. George V Metro Station is 1476 feet away and provides direct access to the Tuileries Garden and the Louver Museum. Private parking is available nearby, upon request.

name: 1k Hotel
neighborhood: Le Marais - the Centre Pompidou - Hotel de Ville - 3rd Arr.
description: Located in the fashionable Marais district, 1K Hotel is designed to reflect the Inca culture of Peru with its restaurant and its 2 bars. Peruvian masks as well as colorful and vibrant raw materials decorate this 4-star hotel, which is 0.6 mi from Place des Vosges. A flat-screen TV is provided in each room and suite at 1K Hotel. Each of the modern, air-conditioned rooms has a mini-bar, a coffee machine and a courtesy tray with a complementary bottle of water. A buffet breakfast is served each morning at the hotel and brunch is available on Sundays, featuring classic brunch dishes and traditional Peruvian's recipes. The hotel's restaurant, the INKA, is designed in a contemporary style with mood lighting and music. It serves contemporary South-American fusion cuisine. Guests are also invited to enjoy a cocktail in one of the hotel's bar. The Mezcaleria has mezcal drinks on offer, while 1K Pisco bar serves cocktails which can be enjoyed in the hotel's patio or on the terrace. A fitness room with Technogym equipment is available at 1K Hotel. The nearest Metro Station is Filles du Calvaire, which is located 492 feet from the hotel. From here, guests have direct access to Opéra Garnier and Galeries Lafayette thanks to the metro line 8.

name: Hotel Whistler
neighborhood: Gare du Nord - Canal Saint Martin - 10th Arr.
description: Hotel Whistler - Gare du Nord is located in the 10th arrondissement of Paris, 0.7 mi from La Cigale Concert Hall and in between Gare du Nord and Gare de l'Est train stations. Hotel Whistler - Gare du Nord features free WiFi throughout the property. Every room at this hotel is air conditioned and is fitted with a flat-screen TV with satellite channels. Some private bathrooms are fitted with a bath. For your comfort, you will find bathrobes and slippers. A continental breakfast is served every morning for an extra fee. You will find a 24-hour front desk at the property. For a supplement and subject to availability, guests can privatize the hammam between 08:00 and 20:00. Sacré-Coeur is 0.8 mi from Hotel Whistler - Gare du Nord, while Place de la République is 1 mi away. The nearest airport is Paris - Orly Airport, 12 mi from the property.

name: Etoile Trocadero
neighborhood: Trocadero Gardens - Eiffel Tower West - Champs-Elysees West
description: This hotel is in the 16th district of Paris, within walking distance of the Champs Elysées and the Eiffel Tower. It offers air-conditioned rooms with satellite TV and private bathroom. Each room at the Hôtel Etoile Trocadéro also features a mini-bar, a hairdryer and dry-cleaning service is available. A continental breakfast is provided every morning and can be served in the guest rooms. Guests arriving late can benefit from 24-hour reception and they can also leave their bags during the day. Daily newspapers are provided, along with Wi-Fi access. The hotel Hôtel Etoile Trocadéro is a few minutes’ walk from Trocadero and Boissière Metro Stations, leading directly to Montparnasse and Saint-Lazare Stations, the Opéra Garnier and Republique Square. A computer and a printer are at guests' disposal at the reception. In order to improve the living environment during the current constructions work, constructions are currently underway outside the hotel. We are doing everything we can to minimize any inconvenience.

name: Hôtel Des Grands Voyageurs
description: The Hôtel Des Grands Voyageurs has 134 rooms spread over 7 floors. The hotel offers an infrared sauna, a gym, concierge service, and two bar areas, as well as meeting rooms, just a 7-minute walk from Le Bon Marché, a 10-minute walk from the Luxembourg Gardens, a 12-minute walk from the Montparnasse Tower, and 1.2 mi from the Louver Museum and Noter Dame Cathedral. The rooms are soundproofed and air-conditioned and include a desk, a coffee machine, a complimentary mini-bar, a safe, a flat-screen TV connected to Chromecast, and a private bathroom with a bathtub or shower. A buffets breakfast withpastries, fruit, and savory and sweet, hot, and cold options is served on site. You can enjoy the wellness area, which includes a gym with cardio and weight training equipment, as well as an infrared sauna and shower. The reception staff speaks English, Spanish, Italian, Portuguese, and French and can help you plan your stay.

name: Hotel Hiro, New Hotel 2024
neighborhood: Arc de Triomphe West - Etoile - 17th Arr.
description: Hiro is a rare name that means "generous" and "great" in the land of the rising sun, and "navigation" and "travel" at the other end of the globe. It's in this unusual place, with its cozy, chic atmosphere, that he invites you to set down your luggage and suspend time. Because at 7 rue Brey, a stone's throw from the Champs-Elysées, the magic of this 4-star boutique hotel works, to make you feel at home, in a great Parisian house. Nestling in a lively district of Paris's 17th arrondissement, the Hotel Hiro invites you to discover the latest fashionable addresses and characteristic markets that make the French capital so vibrant. At the birth of the motor car, this district of western Paris was frequented by saddlers and coachbuilders; in the second half of the 20th century, by gallant ladies. This design hotel in Paris-Elysées is inspired by the history of the area, with its chic caravan and saddlery. From the entrance draped in velvet and lit by a stained-glass signature window, through the intimate lounges to the 30 bedrooms, you will be transported to an enchanted world. You don't need a crystal ball to know that as a family, as a couple or with friends, you'll feel right at home in this relaxed lifestyle setting.

name: Hotel La Comtesse
description: Featuring rooms with Eiffel Tower views and set in a 19th-century Hausmannian building in the 7th district of Paris, Hôtel La Comtesse is steps away from the Champs de Mars. The guest rooms also have a contemporary décor that is inspired by the literary salons from the 18th century. Just 591 feet from École Militaire Metro Station, it offers a fitness room and a hammam. Each room offers a TV with international channels, WiFi access and a mini-bar. Some of the rooms feature a private balcony and certain rooms are accessible to people with reduced mobility. All of the rooms are serviced by a elevator. Guests can enjoy a drink or French cuisine in the hotel's café located on the ground floor and featuring a library. Buffet breakfast including cereals, pastries, dairy products, eggs and fruits is served daily. An express breakfast with a hot drink, fresh fruit juice and 3 mini pastries is also available. Guests can enjoy a meal made with local French produce at the hotel's restaurant. The Rodin Museum is a 12-minute walk from Hôtel La Comtesse and the Eiffel Tower is a 15-minute walk away. An airport shuttle is available.

name: NH Paris Gare de l'Est
neighborhood: Gare du Nord - Canal Saint Martin - 10th Arr.
description: NH Paris Gare de l'Est hotel is located opposite Gare de l’Est Train and Metro Station, which provides direct access to attractions such as Saint-Michel and the Latin Quarter. It offers a lobby bar with lead glass windows. Guest rooms at NH Paris Gare de l'Est hotel have a contemporary décor. They are equipped with an LCD satellite TV and a coffee machine. An American-style buffet is served each morning in the breakfast room or in guest rooms. The NH Paris Gare de l'Est hotel also provides a 24-hour reception. Free WiFi access is available throughout, while cable internet is available in the guest rooms. Gare du Nord is also very close, only a 5-minute walk from the hotel. Some guests may choose to walk 20 minutes to Arts et Métiers Museum.

name: Hyatt Regency Paris Etoile
neighborhood: Arc de Triomphe West - Etoile - 17th Arr.
description: Hyatt Regency Paris Etoile, formerly the Hotel Concorde La Fayette, is 0.9 mi from both the Arc de Triomphe and the famous Champs Elysées. The guest rooms each include a desk, cable TV, air conditioning and a safe. All rooms at the Hyatt Regency Paris Etoile offers views over Paris. Deluxe bath products are provided in the private bathrooms. MAYO restaurant in the lobby of the hotel offers guests a seasonal cuisine and local products. This hotel is connected to the Palais des Congrès and La Defense business district is only 5 minutes away by Metro. A concierge and a business center are among the additional services. Porte Maillot Metro Station is an 8-minute walk away.

name: Mercure Vaugirard Paris Porte De Versailles
description: Mercure Vaugirard Paris Porte De Versailles is located opposite the main entrance to the Porte de Versailles Exhibition Center. It is just 328 feet from Porte de Versailles Metro Station offering direct access into the capital. Guest rooms at Mercure Vaugirard Paris Porte De Versailles are air-conditioned and offer a flat-screen TV with satellite channels and a mini-bar. Each has a private bathroom with a bathtub or shower and access to the free Wi-Fi. All rooms are serviced by a elevator. The hotel offers a buffet breakfast every morning which can also be served to guest rooms. Le Sorcier bar offers a range of cocktails and a list of fine wines. Guests may also order light meals and snacks. Mercure is ideally located for exploring Paris with direct transport to sights such as Place de la Concorde and Sacré Coeur. The hotel also offers 17 meeting rooms and underground parking at an extra cost.

name: Le Mireille
description: Le Mireille offers hotel accommodations in the 17th district of Paris, just 656 feet from Guy Môquet Metro Station. Designed by the architect Pascale Douillard, the contemporary rooms are decorated in black and white colors. Each includes a flat-screen TV with satellite channels and a shower. The hotel features a 24-hour front desk. Room service is available and the area offers several bars and restaurant located within walking distance of the hotel. The Sacré-Coeur Basilica is 0.9 mi from Le Mireille, while Opéra Garnier is 1.4 mi away. Orly Airport is 11 mi from the property.

name: Hotel De La Bourdonnais
description: Hôtel de la Bourdonnais is located in central Paris, just a 5-minute walk from the Eiffel Tower. Free WiFi access is available and a cocktail bar, the Gloster, is available on site. Each room features a TV, air conditioning as well as tea and coffee making facilities. Featuring a bath or shower, private bathroom also comes with a hairdryer and free toiletries. At Hôtel de la Bourdonnais you will find a 24-hour front desk. Other facilities offered at the property include meeting facilities and luggage storage. The hotel is 656 feet from Ecole Militaire Metro Station (Line 8), which gives direct access to the Palais Garnier. The hotel is 1 mi from the Orsay Museum and 1.1 mi from Place de la Concorde. Paris - Charles de Gaulle Airport is 16 mi away.

name: ibis Paris Bastille Opera
neighborhood: Le Marais  - Republique - Hotel de Ville - 3rd Arr.- 11th Arr.
description: Located in the city center, 1804 feet from Place de la Bastille, ibis Paris Bastille Opera is a 24-hour reception hotel with a French restaurant, a bar and air-conditioned rooms with a flat-screen, satellite TV. The heated rooms at ibis Paris Bastille Opera feature parquet flooring and a private bathroom with free toiletries and a hairdryer. Free Wi-Fi access is provided. A buffet breakfast composed of sweet and savory dishes such as eggs, fruit salad, yogurts and juices is served every day. Pastries baked on site and fresh French Madeleine cakes are also on offer, as well as a hot beverage and a piece of fruit to take away. Outside of regular breakfast hours guests can also enjoy a lighter option, available from 04:00. All types of restaurants and bars can be found within a walking distance. The accommodations also provides luggage storage, newspapers and a safety deposit box is available at reception. A private car park is available at a surcharge. Place des Vosges is located a 10-minute walk away. The hotel is located 1640 feet from Bastille Metro Station which provides direct access to Palais Royal-Musée du Louver and Champs-Elysées-Clemenceau.

name: Best Western Plus La Demeure
description: Set in a characteristic Haussmanian building within a stone’s throw of the lively Rue Mouffetard, Best Western Plus La Demeure is 1476 feet from Jardins des Plantes and the Natural History Museum. The property offers free WiFi. A wellness and fitness center is available and includes a multi-sensory shower. Massages can be arranged at an extra cost. Built in 1903, La Demeure offers soundproofed rooms and suites with air conditioning, a flat-screen TV and an electric kettle. They also have a private bathroom with a hairdryer and free toiletries. A Nespresso coffee machine is available in every room and a bottle of water is provided upon arrival. A buffet breakfast is served every morning at Best Western Plus La Demeure. An express breakfast can also be provided at a reduced rate. With warm colors, furniture made out of dark wood and pictures of Paris hanging on the walls, the ground-floor lounge welcomes you for a drink.

name: Hotel Marais Grands Boulevards
neighborhood: Louvre - Vendome - Concorde - Les Halles - 1st Arr. - 2nd Arr.
description: Hotel Marais Grands Boulevards is ideally located in central Paris, 2133 feet from Place de Republique. It offers soundproofed rooms and some of them have a balcony with views over Grands Boulevards. Each air-conditioned room has simple décor and is equipped with free Wi-Fi, satellite TV and mini-bar. They all have a private bathroom with a hairdryer, while some rooms also offer tea and coffee making facilities. All rooms are accessible by a elevator. A full buffet breakfast is served every morning in the dining area. Hotel Marais Grands Boulevards has a 24-hour front desk with concierge service. Hotel Marais Grands Boulevards is a 20 minute walk to the Marais district, Opera Garnier and Chatelet. It is 197 feet from Strasbourg-Saint-Denis Metro Station, which is gives direct access to Saint-Michel, Trocadero and Bastille. Gare de l’Est RER and Metro Station is a 5-minute walk away.

name: La Dépendance
neighborhood: Louvre - Vendome - Concorde - Les Halles - 1st Arr. - 2nd Arr.
description: La Dépendance features an intimate ambiance and comfortable accommodations and is located just a few steps away from the famous Louver Museum and the historic Grand Palais. Free WiFi is available throughout the hotel. This small yet distinctive hotel provides you with a cozy and simple atmosphere. Guestrooms are air-conditioned and equipped with modern private bathrooms, such as a mini-bar and a TV. While staying at La Dépendance, venture out to one of the busiest shopping districts in the city as you will be near the Grands Magasins and the Faubourg Saint-Honoré shopping areas. Also, in the immediate vicinity of the hotel you will find a wide variety of restaurants and typically Parisian cafés.

name: Timhotel Odessa Montparnasse
description: Timhotel Odessa Montparnasse is located in the heart of the Montparnasse district, 656 feet from the SNCF and Metro Station. It offers air-conditioned accommodations with free WiFi access. Guest rooms at the Timhotel Odessa Montparnasse overlook the courtyard or the street. They each have a private bathroom and satellite TV. Timhotel Odessa Montparnasse's staff can offer local tourist information at the 24-hour reception. Guests can have access to a sports club located nearby at a reduced rate.

name: Hotel Atlantis
description: Hôtel Atlantis is across from the Gothic-style Saint Sulpice Church. Decorated in rich colors, the hotel’s lounge bar sits under a glass ceiling and is furnished with armchairs. A minibar, free Wi-Fi and satellite TV are provided in each room. Guest rooms have a classical French-style. Each has a private bathroom and some rooms have views of the church. Enjoy a continental breakfast in the breakfast room, while reading the newspapers provided. The Atlantis hotel has a 24-hour front desk and provides baggage storage. Saint Sulpice Metro Station is just 300 ft away, providing direct access to the Montparnasse district. The Luxembourg Gardens are 1000 ft away.

name: 25hours Hotel Terminus Nord
neighborhood: Gare du Nord - Canal Saint Martin - 10th Arr.
description: Set in Paris and overlooking Gare du Nord Train Station, 25hours Hotel Terminus Nord offers express check-in and check-out, nonsmoking rooms, a restaurant, free WiFi throughout the property and a bar. All rooms boast a flat-screen TV with cable channels and a private bathroom. The property is located in the 10th arr. District, 1.9 mi from Sacré-Coeur. All guest rooms at the hotel feature air conditioning and a wardrobe. 25hours Hotel Terminus Nord offers a buffet or American breakfast. The area is popular for cycling, and bike hire is available at the accommodations. Speaking Arabic, German, English and Spanish, staff at the 24-hour front desk can help you plan your stay. Pompidou Center is 1.6 mi from 25hours Hotel Terminus Nord, while Opéra Garnier is 1.6 mi from the property. The nearest airport is Paris - Orly Airport, 12 mi from the hotel.

name: Villa Marquis member of Meliá Collection
description: Hotel Villa Marquis a Member of Melia Collection Tour Eiffel Collection is located right by the River Seine, between the Champs Elysées and the Eiffel Tower. It offers peaceful, luxury accommodations in the heart of Paris. The spacious guest rooms feature air conditioning, satellite TV and free Wi-Fi access. Free toiletries and a hairdryer are provided in the bathrooms. The hotel serves a daily breakfast and has a bar where guests can enjoy a pre-dinner drink. The hotel is fully refurbished Hotel Villa Marquis a Member of Melia Collection Tour Eiffel Collection provides a laundry and dry cleaning service. An airport shuttle is also available on request. The Alma Marceau metro station is just 656 feet from the hotel providing access to the capital’s many sites and attractions. Charles de Gaulle Airport is 22 mi away.

name: Best Western Plus Bretagne Montparnasse
description: This Best Western hotel is located 10 minutes from Montparnasse Train Station and the Montparnasse Tower. Free Wi-Fi access and satellite TV feature in the air-conditioned guest rooms. A mini-fridge and tea and coffee making facilities are included in each room. All of the rooms have a classic décor and include a hairdryer in the private bathroom. Enjoy a buffet breakfast every morning in the breakfast room at Bretagne Montparnasse hotel. Pernety Metro station is 984 feet away, providing direct access to the Champs Elysées. Orly Airport is just a 13-minute drive from the hotel.

name: Hotel Le Colisee
description: Hôtel Le Colisée is located in central Paris, just a short walk from the Arc de Triomphe and the Champs-Elysées. It offers stylish guest rooms, some with a small balcony. The guest rooms at Hôtel Le Colisée have been styled by the interior designer Sylvain Proyart. Each room is air-conditioned and equipped with a mini-bar, a flat-screen TV with satellite channels and a coffee maker. A buffet breakfast is served every morning in the breakfast room opening out onto a tree-lined courtyard. Guests can also choose to have breakfast in the privacy of their room. Hôtel Le Colisée is within close proximity to the Grand Palais and the Louver Museum. The rest of the French capital is accessible by the many public transport links located near the hotel. There is private parking nearby, and free WiFi access is available throughout the hotel.

name: Amiral Hotel
neighborhood: Place d'Italie - Gare d'Austerlitz - Gobelins - 13th Arr.
description: Amiral Hôtel is located just a 1-minute walk from Tolbiac Metro Station, providing direct access to the Louver Museum. It offers an indoor heated swimming pool. The guest rooms at Amiral Hôtel have a mini-bar and Wi-Fi access. All have an private bathroom with free toiletries. The hotel offers a continental breakfast daily in the breakfast room. You can enjoy a drink in the hotel’s wood-paneled lounge bar. The bars and restaurants of the lively Buttes aux Cailles area are only a 10-minute walk away. Place d’Italie is 2297 feet from the hotel and a parking is available nearby, at an extra cost. AccorHotels Arena is located 1.5 mi from the property.

name: Villa Alessandra
neighborhood: Arc de Triomphe West - Etoile - 17th Arr.
description: Located in a Mediterranean courtyard close to the famous avenue of the Champs Elysees and the Arc de Triomphe, Villa Alessandra is a charming hotel decorated in an elegant style. A high speed WiFi is provided for your comfort. A parking for small cars is available upon request and at an extra cost. The en suite guestrooms at Villa Alessandra are bright, decorated in pastel shades with oak-wood flooring. Modern facilities include a flat-screen TV, telephone and a mini-bar. Every morning a breakfast buffet is served. Guests can enjoy this in the breakfast lounge or in the comfort of their room. There is a lively open-air market near the square where the Villa is located, and from here you have access to the Palais des Congrès and la Defense by metro.

name: HÃ´tel Beauquartier Montmartre
neighborhood: Opera - Saint-Lazare Station - Galeries Lafayette - 9th Arr.
description: Hotel completely renovated in 2023. Hotel Hôtel Beauquartier Montmartre is located in the Montmartre area of Paris, near the Sacré Coeur Basilica. This modern hotel offers soundproofed, rooms with attached bathroom with a bathtub and satellite TV. A buffet breakfast is served daily in the hotel’s dining area, which also has a glass-enclosed sun room and an outdoor patio. Breakfast can be served to your room upon request. The front desk is open 24 hours a day and the hotel is serviced by a elevator. Metro Blanche sits just a 1-minute walk away from the Hôtel Beauquartier Montmartre, while the Moulin Rouge Cabaret is located opposite the hotel, 131 feet away.

name: Novotel Paris 17
neighborhood: Arc de Triomphe West - Etoile - 17th Arr.
description: Located in the west of Paris, the 4-star Novotel Paris 17 is a 10-minute drive from the Arc de Triomphe, Palais des Congrès and the Champs-Elysées. Hot and cold options are prepared for breakfast every day and private parking is possible at an extra cost. Free WiFi access is available throughout and there is a 24-hour fitness center. The modern guest rooms are air-conditioned and feature an LCD TV with satellite channels, a free mini-bar and tea and coffee making facilities. All rooms have a private bathroom with a bathtub or shower. Some rooms can also accommodate guests with reduced mobility. Bistro Carvi serves healthy choices and French cuisine in the à la carte restaurant for lunch and dinner, and the bar offers snacks throughout the day. In the evening, guests can relax in one of the lounge bar’s armchairs and enjoy a house cocktail. Set next to the Paris Ring Road, the hotel is ideally located for guests visiting Paris by car. Pereire and Wagram Metro Stations are a 15-minute walk away, providing direct access to the Grands Magasins Department Stores at Opéra. Tram T3B is 984 feet away. Private parking is possible on site with an extra charge.

name: HÃ´tel Piapia
neighborhood: Buttes Chaumont - La Villette - Bagnolet - 19th Arr. - 20th Arr.
description: Opened in December 2021, Hôtel Piapia is located in the east of Paris just 2953 feet from Place de la Nation and its many transport links. The famous Père Lachaise Cemetery is a 15-minute walk away. The hotel’s contemporary décor is inspired by space, the planets and the stars. Decorated in warm blue, gray and brown tones, the rooms feature a flat-screen TV, mini-bar and safety deposit box. The private bathroom includes free toiletries and a hairdryer. A buffet breakfast is available each morning and guests can choose to enjoy it directly in their guest room. Room service is also available throughout the day and the property has a bar. Additional features include meeting room facilities and a lounge with a library. Porte de Vincennes Metro Station is only 427 feet from Hôtel Piapia, which offers direct access to the Louver, La Défense and the Champs Elysées.

name: Hotel Elysa-Luxembourg
description: A 19th-century building a 2-minute walk from the Garden of Luxembourg, in the heart of the Latin Quarter, Elysa-Luxembourg has soundproof rooms decorated in a contemporary style. All rooms at the Hotel Elysa-Luxembourg are air-conditioned and some overlook the Luxembourg Gardens. They all feature satellite TV, free Wi-Fi access, tea and coffee-making facilities and a private marble bathroom. A full buffet breakfast is available every morning in the dining room with exposed stone walls. The area has many bars and restaurants serving different kinds of cuisine. Hotel Elysa-Luxembourg is a 15-minute walk from Notre-Dame Cathedral and Luxembourg RER station, which can take guests to Roissy and Orly Airports in 35 minutes. There are also many buses in the area going directly to the Eiffel Tower, Montmartre, the Opéra, the Louvre Museum and the Marais district.

name: Hotel Dame des Arts
description: The Hotel Hôtel Dame des Arts is located 1969 feet from Noter Dame Cathedral and Luxembourg Garden and 0.6 mi from the Panthéon. Hotel Hôtel Dame des Arts offers standard and executive guestrooms with a flat-screen TV, free WiFi access and air conditioning. The rooftop bar and some rooms balconies feature views of the city’s rooftops or monument including Eiffel Tower. The hotel serves a breakfast buffet in the morning with the option of room service. Guests can relax on the garden terrace with a drink and something to eat from the hotel bar and snack bar. The hotel offers a shuttle service and major transport links can be accessed via the Ile-de-France transport system. Metro Stations Odéon and Saint-Michel are 525 feet away.

name: Hotel L'Horset Opera, BW Premier Collection
neighborhood: Louvre - Vendome - Concorde - Les Halles - 1st Arr. - 2nd Arr.
description: Hotel Horset Opera, Best Western Premier Collection is located on a quiet street 1640 feet from the Galeries Lafayette department store. It features soundproofed guest rooms with an antique décor and provides free Wi-Fi access. The elegant guest rooms are equipped with a mini-bar and a TV with international and RMC Sports channels. Each room features dark wooden furnishings and floor to ceiling windows. The private marble bathrooms include bathrobes. A cold buffet breakfast is served every morning at Hotel Horset Opera, Best Western Premier Collection and can be taken in the guest room. Cocktails and snacks are served until midnight at Le Diapason bar. Opéra Metro Station is just 853 feet away, providing access to the Louver Museum and Disneyland Paris. A shuttle service to Roissy Charles de Gaulle Airport departs 492 feet from the hotel.

name: Hotel Duquesne Eiffel
description: In Paris, just a 5-minute walk from the Parc du Champs de Mars, Duquesne Eiffel offers soundproofed rooms with free Wi-Fi access and some rooms have views of the Eiffel Tower. Each air conditioned room at the Duquesne Hotel has a flat-screen TV and a private bathroom. All rooms are accessible with an elevator. A full breakfast buffet is served daily at the Duquesne Eiffel. The hotel also provides a bar and a 24-hour front desk where staff can offer local tourist information. Hotel Duquesne Eiffel is just a 2-minute walk from Ecole Militaire Metro station, which provides direct access to the Champs-Elysees, Opera Garnier and Place de la Bastille.

name: Hotel Jacques De Molay
neighborhood: Le Marais - the Centre Pompidou - Hotel de Ville - 3rd Arr.
description: This hotel is located in the Marais, 0.6 mi from Place des Vosges and 1.1 mi from Noter-Dame Cathedral. It offers free access to the fitness center and the sauna. Free WiFi is available. The air-conditioned rooms at Hotel Jacques De Molay are equipped with satellite TV, a telephone, and private bathroom. A continental breakfast is served daily at the hotel. Guests can relax with a drink in Hotel Jacques De Molay’s bar. Jacques De Molay Hotel is 1476 feet from Arts et Métiers Metro (lines 3 and 11). The Pompidou Center and Canal Saint-Martin are within walking distance.

name: Maxim Folies
neighborhood: Opera - Saint-Lazare Station - Galeries Lafayette - 9th Arr.
description: The design hotel Hôtel Maxim Folies is ideally located in central Paris, just 656 feet from the Folies Bergeres. It offers rooms and suites with flat-screen TV and contemporary décor. A full buffet breakfast is prepared every morning. There are also on-site vending machines with snacks and drinks. Front desk is open 24 hours and free Wi-Fi access is available in the entire hotel. Guests of the Hôtel Maxim Folies can walk just 0.6 mi to the Opera Garnier and Galeries Lafayette luxury department store.

name: Hotel Pax Opera
neighborhood: Opera - Saint-Lazare Station - Galeries Lafayette - 9th Arr.
description: Pax Opera is in the 9th district of Paris, between Opera Garnier and Gare du Nord. It offers modern rooms in the heart of the capital with free Wi-Fi. The soundproof rooms feature air conditioning and a flat-screen TV with satellite and cable channels. A breakfast buffet is available in the hotel breakfast room. Pax Opera also serves a continental breakfast in the guest room upon request. The hotel features a 24-hour bar and can arrange an airport shuttle service upon request. Pax Opera is a 2 minute walk from the Folies Bergères music hall, theaters and shops. Cadet Metro Station is 220 yards from the hotel, providing access to the city’s numerous sites.

name: Princesse Caroline
description: The Princesse Caroline is 220 yards from the Arc de Triomphe and the Champs-Elysees in Paris. It features soundproof rooms with air conditioning, satellite TV, free Wi-Fi and a private bathroom. A buffet breakfast is served daily in the dining area. Hotel Princesse Caroline also has a 24-hour front desk and a lounge bar with free Wi-Fi access. Princesse Caroline is a 2-minute walk from Charles de Gaulle-Etoile Metro and RER station. The hotel is close to the Louvre museum and the Montmartre district.

name: Mercure Paris Bercy Bibliotheque
neighborhood: Place d'Italie - Gare d'Austerlitz - Gobelins - 13th Arr.
description: The Mercure Paris Bercy Bibliothèque is located in Paris, 1148 feet from Bibliothèque Nationale de France and 984 feet from AccorHotels Arena. It offers views over the River Seine. Each air-conditioned and soundproofed room has a modern and colorful décor. They are equipped with free Wi-Fi, a flat-screen TV with satellite channels, free tea and coffee making facilities and a private bathroom. The hotel's bar is open throughout the day. A breakfast is served daily at the dining area or in the guest room. Metro Quai de la Gare is directly in front of The Mercure Paris Bercy Bibliothèque, which allows access to all of Paris’s famous sites. Gare d'Austerlitz and Gare de Lyon Train Stations are also nearby for guests wishing to explore other parts of France.

name: ibis Paris Montmartre Sacre-Coeur
neighborhood: Montmartre - Moulin Rouge - Sacre Coeur - 18th Arr.
description: Located 984 feet from Moulin Rouge and a 15-minute walk from Sacré-Cœur Basilica, ibis Paris Montmartre offers a snack bar and air-conditioned, rooms with attached bathroom with a TV. Free Wi-Fi access is provided. The rooms at ibis Paris Montmartre have private bathroom with a hairdryer. A telephone is also provided in each of them. A buffet breakfast composed of sweet and savory dishes such as eggs, fruit salad, yogurts and juices is served every day from 06:30 to 10:00, and can be available from 04:30 to 06:30 upon request. Pastries baked on site and fresh French Madeleine cakes are also on offer, as well as a hot beverage and a piece of fruit to take away. The hotel is located close to the metro Place de Clichy, 1.2 mi from Gare du Nord Train Station and a 20-minute walk from Parc Monceau. There is a public car park on site, available at an additional cost.

name: Ibis Styles Paris 15 Lecourbe
description: Centrally located 2625 feet from Porte de Versailles Exhibition Center and 1.7 mi from the Eiffel Tower, this convenient hotel offers friendly and personalized service, and free WiFi access. The Parc des Princes is 2.3 mi away. The ibis Styles Paris 15 Lecourbe hotel has been entirely renovated and features comfortable, modern rooms, fully equipped with flat screen TV, work desk and air conditioning. Guests can start the morning with a delicious buffet breakfast and finish the day with a relaxing drink in the cozy atmosphere of the hotel lobby. The ibis Styles Paris 15 Lecourbe is located near the lively Rue du Commerce and Rue de la Convention and is near several Metro stations. It is just a 6-minute walk from the exhibition center at Porte de Versailles.

name: HOTEL BEAUGRENELLE SAINT CHARLES TOUR EIFFEL
description: The Beaugrenelle Saint-Charles is in Paris’ 15th district, just over a quarter mile from the Seine River and a 2-minute walk from Beaugrenelle Shopping Center. It features air-conditioned rooms with private bathrooms. Each room at the Beaugrenelle Saint-Charles has satellite TV. All rooms are soundproof and accessible by an elevator. The hotel serves a breakfast buffet each morning, which guests can have in the breakfast room or their guest room. Additional facilities at Beaugrenelle Saint-Charles include Wi-Fi internet access and a 24-hour front desk desk. Private and secured parking is available 165 ft from the hotel for a fee and upon prior reservation. The Beaugrenelle Saint-Charles is located 165 ft from the Charles Michels Metro Station (line 10), which provides direct transportation to Saint-Germain-des-Prés and the Latin Quarter. The Eiffel Tower and the Champs de Mars are a 20-minute walk from the hotel.

name: Balmoral
neighborhood: Arc de Triomphe West - Etoile - 17th Arr.
description: Hotel Balmoral is located 328 feet from Avenue des Champs-Elysées and Charles de Gaulle Etoile Metro Station. You can borrow one of the free iPads, which feature free international press, music and videos. Rooms at Balmoral are decorated in a contemporary style. These air-conditioned rooms have an LCD TV and a mini-bar, while some of the private bathrooms include luxury bathrobes. Some rooms feature a private balcony and a coffee machine. You can enjoy produces from the buffet breakfast in your room or on the small garden terrace. The bar also serves a range of aperitifs, wine and soft drinks and provides a relaxing spot for reading one of the free newspapers. High-speed, fiber-optic internet access and WiFi access are available for free. Electric bicycles are available (charged) and concierge service is also provided at Balmoral. Air France bus terminal is 164 feet away. The airport shuttle service can be organized at the 24-hour reception, for a EUR 80 fee.

name: Hôtel Saint Pierre
description: Located 1640 feet from Luxembourg Gardens and a 10-minute walk from Saint-Germain-des-Prés, this hotel offers air-conditioned rooms and free Wi-Fi internet access. Cluny-la Sorbonne Metro Station is 919 feet from the hotel. A flat-screen TV with satellite channels and a work space are available in each of the rooms, which are serviced by a elevator. All rooms have private bathroom facilities with a hairdryer and some offer a balcony with a view over Paris. A continental breakfast can be enjoyed at the hotel each morning, and is served in guests’ rooms upon request. Staff are available 24 hours a day at the hotel and can assist guests with planning excursions during their stay.

name: Hôtel Paris Louvre Opéra
neighborhood: Louvre - Vendome - Concorde - Les Halles - 1st Arr. - 2nd Arr.
description: This charming hotel is housed in a magnificent 17th-century building, only a 5-minute walk from the famous Louver and the beautiful Opéra Garnier. All rooms are soundproofed and feature air conditioning. Free WiFi is offered. A Buffet breakfast is served every morning. The Hôtel Paris Louver Opera is located in an elegant district of Paris, and is surrounded by chic cafes and luxury boutiques. You can reach many of Paris’s main attractions on foot, and there are numerous Metro stations surrounding the hotel.

name: Best Western Premier Faubourg 88
neighborhood: Gare du Nord - Canal Saint Martin - 10th Arr.
description: In the 10th district of Paris, Best Western Premier Faubourg 88 is decorated in an urban, chic style and has an interior courtyard, bar and 24-hour front desk. Montmarte is just a 15-minute walk away. All rooms are air-conditioned and feature a flat-screen TV with cable channels, a safe and a wardrobe, and some have a Nespresso coffee machine. The private bathroom includes a bathrobe and slippers. Both a continental and buffet breakfast are available each morning and it can also be served in the comfort of the guest’s room. Restaurants are within walking distance of the property. Additional features include luggage storage, a laundry service, free Wi-Fi access and rooms for guests with reduced mobility. Poissonière Metro Station is 460 ft away and has direct access to the Opéra Garnier, Latin Quarter and the Louvre Museum.

name: Ascot Opera
neighborhood: Opera - Saint-Lazare Station - Galeries Lafayette - 9th Arr.
description: In the very center of Paris, just a 10-minute walk from The Louvre and 1500 ft from Opéra Garnier, this hotel offers air conditioned rooms and a bar. Guest rooms at Ascot Opera are decorated in a classic French style and some feature hardwood floors and exposed beams. They have satellite TV, a safe and a minibar. Each morning, guests can enjoy a continental breakfast in their room or in the hotel’s breakfast room. A lounge and bar is a nice place to relax in the evening. The hotel is serviced by an elevator and the front desk is open 24 hours a day. Metro Station Quatre-Septembre is 689 ft from the hotel and offers direct access to Père Lachaise. Galeries Lafayette is a 10-minute walk from the hotel.

name: Paris Marriott Rive Gauche Hotel & Conference Center
description: This hotel is located in Paris near the Latin Quarter and Saint-Germain-Des-Prés. The new Marriott Great Room lobby, a lively space greeting you with sophistication and comfort from the moment you walk through our doors. The hotel offers views over Paris, and a fitness center that is open 24/7. All air-conditioned rooms at the Paris Marriott Rive Gauche Hotel & Conference Center are elegantly designed. They have soundproof windows, a satellite flat-screen TV, tea and coffee making facilities and a private marble bathroom. The on-site restaurant and bar serving seasonal French fare, creative cocktails, and fine wines. In the nearby area, make the most of Parisian life with the local shops, cheese makers and wine bars. The elevated metro line 6 facing the hotel is an easy ride to visit Parisian landmarks, including the Eiffel Tower and the Champs Elysees.

name: Hôtel Juliana Paris
description: Offering a sauna and fitness center, The One Alma Paris is located in Paris, just a 14-minute walk from the Eiffel Tower. The hotel has a hammam and a gym. Guests can also enjoy a drink at the hotel bar. A flat-screen TV is provided. Each room is equipped with a private bathroom fitted with a bath or shower. For your comfort, you will find bath robes, slippers and free toiletries. The One Alma Paris features free WiFi throughout the property. There is a 24-hour front desk at the property. The Champs-Élysées Avenue is a 17-minute walk from The One Alma Paris, while Villepinte is 12 mi away. The nearest airport is Orly Airport, 9.3 mi from the property.

name: Villa Lutece Port Royal
neighborhood: Place d'Italie - Gare d'Austerlitz - Gobelins - 13th Arr.
description: Located in the heart of Paris 13th arrondissement, near the Jardin des Plantes and the National Library, is the very stylish Villa Lutèce Port Royal hotel. The Villa Lutèce features air-conditioned rooms that are stylishly decorated and equipped with a mini-bar. The private bathrooms feature a modern décor and a shower or a bath. Before venturing out to visit Paris, you can enjoy the breakfast buffet in the dining area. Room service is available all day and the hotel features a bar where guests can socialize over a drink. Staying at the Villa Lutèce Port Royal places you in the center of the world's most visited city. In the surrounding area you will find a variety of restaurants that offer traditional and international cuisine, lively night life and many of the city's most famous sights.

name: Le 20 Prieure Hotel
neighborhood: Le Marais  - Republique - Hotel de Ville - 3rd Arr.- 11th Arr.
description: The 20 Prieuré Hotel is located in the Republique district of Paris, just a 5-minute walk from the Canal Saint Martin. It offers air-conditioned rooms with a contemporary décor and free Wi-Fi access. The Paris-themed rooms offer an LCD TV and a mini-bar. Some rooms have a courtyard view and all have a private bathroom. A continental breakfast including fresh French pastries is served daily and breakfast room service is available. The hotel also provides a 24-hour reception. The Republique Metro station is located just 1640 feet from Le 20 Prieuré Hotel. It provides direct access to the Eiffel Tower, Place de la Bastille and the Eurostar terminal at Gare du Nord. Elevator will be under renovation and not available in february 2026.

name: New Hotel Gare Du Nord
neighborhood: Gare du Nord - Canal Saint Martin - 10th Arr.
description: In a Haussmannian building in central Paris, this fully air-conditioned hotel is across from Gare du Nord Train Station. It features guest rooms with free Wi-Fi access and has a 24-hour front desk. Satellite TV and a telephone are standard in each soundproof guest room. Most of the rooms are air-conditioned and some rooms feature a flat-screen TV. The private bathrooms include a hairdryer. A continental breakfast is served every morning in the arched stone cellar at New Hôtel Gare Du Nord. Gare de l’Est Metro Station is less than half a mile from the New Hôtel, providing direct access to the Louvre Museum and the Latin Quarter. The lively Montmartre district is a 15-minute walk away.

name: Maison AthÃ©nÃ©e
neighborhood: Opera - Saint-Lazare Station - Galeries Lafayette - 9th Arr.
description: Maison Athénée is a 4-star boutique hotel decorated by the famous, French interior designer Jacques Garcia and located in central Paris. Offering a bar and a lounge, it is a 5-minute walk from both Place Vendôme and the Opéra Garnier. The guest rooms at the Maison Athénée have furniture, air conditioning and soundproofing. Each features a flat-screen TV, a mini-bar and a laptop safe. Some of the rooms also offer a flowered terrace. You are invited to relax in the bar, Petit Salon, where you can try one of our light delicacies. The Maison Athénée is just 328 feet from Madeleine Metro Station, which provides direct access to the major tourist attractions in Paris. Place de la Concorde and the Champs-Elysees are both a 10-minute walk away.

name: Hotel Malte - Astotel
neighborhood: Louvre - Vendome - Concorde - Les Halles - 1st Arr. - 2nd Arr.
description: Located in the historic district in central Paris, the 4-star Hotel Malte - Astotel is only 2133 feet from the Louver Museum. It features an interior courtyard and a 24-hour front desk. The soundproofed guest rooms offer a flat-screen TV with satellite channels and free WiFi. Each room also offers a mini-bar, a courtesy tray and a private bathroom with a hairdryer. Guests can also enjoy the lounge with a fireplace. A buffet breakfast is served every morning in the breakfast room and can be enjoyed on the patio at the Hotel Malte - Astotel. Children can play in a dedicated area, where toys are available. Children can play in a dedicated area, where toys are available. Hotel Malte - Astotel is 1476 feet from Pyramides Metro Station, providing direct access to Saint-Lazare Train Station. The Opéra Garnier is a 10-minute walk away.

name: Doubletree By Hilton New York Times Square West
description: The DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel New York – Times Square West is within 0.9 mi of Times Square, The Empire State Building and Jacob Javits Convention Center. All rooms at the DoubleTree by Hilton Times Square West have a desk, 40-inch HDTV, coffee maker, in-room safe and black-out curtains. Guests can enjoy views of the river, Manhattan uptown/downtown skyline and/or Times Square from rooms on the higher floors. The rooftop lounge, High Bar & Lounge, at the DoubleTree Times Square West offers unobstructed views of Manhattan. The on-site restaurant, Tranzit Restaurant & Bar, serves American cuisine for breakfast, lunch and dinner. This hotel also has a 24-hour business center, a fitness center, 900 square feet of meeting space and offers room service. Rockefeller Center is 1.2 mi away while Broadway theater, Majestic Theater, and The Port Authority Bus Terminal are within 1148 feet of the DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel New York.

name: YOTEL New York Times Square
description: Located less than a mile from Times Square, YOTEL New York offers complimentary WiFi and meeting and event spaces. YOBOT, the onsite luggage-storing robot, helps to keep your luggage secured, and self-service kiosks speed up check-in process. All rooms are designed to maximize available space and feature a work desk and a laptop safe. Guests will have access to purified water and ice 24 hours a day. An iron with an ironing board and a hair dryer are also available. The tubs are out of order in any cabin until further notice. Guest services at the property include airport transfers, sightseeing tours and show tickets. The Green Fig Restaurant is a Mediterranean fusion eatery that offers breakfast, weekend brunches, dinner and pre-theater dining options. The outdoor roof terrace is available for guests looking to relax in the evenings with a drink while enjoying a view of the skyline. Madame Tussauds is 2113 feet away and Bryant Park is 0.7 mi from the property. Guests will find 3 subway stations within 2638 feet of the property.

name: Tempo By Hilton New York Times Square
description: Tempo By Hilton New York Times Square has a fitness center, shared lounge, a terrace and restaurant in New York. This 4-star hotel features free WiFi and a bar. The property is a 2-minute walk from Times Square, and within a few steps of the city center. Speaking Bengali, Mandarin, English and Spanish at the reception, staff are always on hand to help. Popular points of interest near the hotel include Broadway Theatre, Radio City Music Hall and Carnegie Hall. LaGuardia Airport is 7.5 miles from the property.

name: Holiday Inn New York City - Times Square By IHG
description: Featuring free WiFi, Holiday Inn New York - Times Square South offers accommodations in Midtown Manhattan, 1312 feet from the Theater District. Rooms include a flat-screen TV. All rooms are equipped with a private bathroom with a bath or shower and free toiletries. Times Square is 1640 feet from Holiday Inn New York - Times Square, while Madison Square Garden is 1640 feet away. The nearest airport is La Guardia Airport, 6.2 mi from Holiday Inn New York - Times Square South.

name: New York Hilton Midtown
description: Centrally located in midtown Manhattan, this New York hotel is within a 10 minutes' walk of both Central Park and Times Square. It features an 8,000-square-foot gym, gourmet dining, and elegant rooms with a flat-screen TV. The spacious rooms at the New York Hilton Midtown are styled with maple wood furniture and marble bathrooms. Each room includes a flat-screen cable TV with on-demand entertainment. Herb N’ Kitchen located on site offers seasonal salads, sandwiches and brick oven pizza. A coffee station offers on-the-go specialties. Offering free WiFi, Hilton Midtown provides modern strength and cardio equipment in its spacious fitness center. Guests can also use the 24-hour business center or the on-site concierge desk. The 7th Avenue Subway Station and luxury shopping along Fifth Avenue are a 4-minute walk from the hotel. Rockefeller Center and Times Square are 0.5 miles away.

name: Sheraton New York Times Square Hotel
description: Featuring an extensive health center and a ticket service for popular New York shows, Sheraton New York Times Square Hotel is 180 feet from the 7th Avenue subway station. A window and a large desk with ergonomic chair provide a comfortable work area. Hudson Market offers a breakfast buffet and Starbucks coffee each morning. Hudson Market Burger opens each evening, serving prime Angus burgers, sodas and milkshakes. Guests of the Sheraton New York Times Square Hotel have access to personalized dining and workout programs through the on-site fitness center. A computer center with free Wi-Fi is in the lobby and the 24-hour FedEx Office Print & Ship Center provides fax, copy and printing services. The Sheraton New York Times Square Hotel is 2297 feet from Rockefeller Center and 1476 feet from Times Square.

name: DoubleTree by Hilton Long Island City, NY
description: In a prime location in the Long Island City district of Long Island City, DoubleTree by Hilton Long Island City, NY is located 3.2 miles from Museum of Modern Art, 3.3 miles from Carnegie Hall and 3.3 miles from Chrysler Building. With a fitness center, the 3-star hotel has air-conditioned rooms with free WiFi, each with a private bathroom. The property is 0.8 miles from the city center and 3.1 miles from St Patrick's Cathedral. At the hotel, every room includes a desk. All guest rooms at DoubleTree by Hilton Long Island City, NY are equipped with a flat-screen TV with cable channels and a safety deposit box. The accommodation can conveniently provide information at the reception to help guests to get around the area. Rockefeller Center is 3.3 miles from DoubleTree by Hilton Long Island City, NY, while Top of the Rock is 3.4 miles away. LaGuardia Airport is 4.3 miles from the property.

name: New Yorker by Lotte Hotels
description: This Art-Deco inspired high-rise hotel offers a midtown location and 24-hour dining. Times Square is less than 0.6 mi from the property and Pen Station is 531 feet away. The rooms at New Yorker by Lotte Hotels are equipped with complimentary WiFi and flat-screen TVs. Some suites and rooms offer views of the Empire State Building or the Hudson River as well. Take advantage of the concierge services at New Yorker by Lotte Hotels for assistance with Broadway tickets, guided tours, restaurant reservations are more. A gift shop, business center and a fitness center are available too. Herald Square with Macy’s flagship store and other shopping destinations is 1056 feet away.

name: AMTD Idea Tribeca
description: Located in the Tribeca neighborhood of Manhattan, this hotel is just steps from the Canal Street Subway Station and offers free Wi-Fi in every room. It features an on-site restaurant, bar and fitness center. A 32-inch flat-screen cable TV with HBO and pay-per-view movies is offered in the contemporary, bright rooms at AMTD Idea Tribeca New York/Tribeca. There is a microwave, fridge and coffee maker along with a desk. Chinatown and Little Italy are within a 12-minute walk of the hotel. New York City Fire Museum and Flea Theater are within a 4-minute walk.

name: Holiday Inn Express Long Island City E New York By IHG
description: Well situated in the center of Queens, Holiday Inn Express Long Island City E - New York by IHG provides air-conditioned rooms, a fitness center, free WiFi and a terrace. This 3-star hotel offers a business center and free shuttle service. Private parking is available on site. At the hotel, all rooms have a desk. The private bathroom is equipped with a bath or shower, free toiletries and a hairdryer. All guest rooms at Holiday Inn Express Long Island City E - New York by IHG are equipped with a flat-screen TV with cable channels and a safety deposit box. Guests at the accommodation can enjoy a buffet or an American breakfast. Speaking Bengali, English, Spanish and Urdu, staff will be happy to provide guests with practical information on the area at the reception. Grand Central Station is 3.2 miles from Holiday Inn Express Long Island City E - New York by IHG, while United Nations New York is 3.3 miles away. LaGuardia Airport is 5.6 miles from the property.

name: INK 48 HOTEL
description: Located in New York, a 11-minute walk from Jacob K. Javits Convention Center, Ink 48 Hotel provides accommodations with free bikes, private parking, a fitness center and a shared lounge. This 4-star hotel offers a concierge service and luggage storage space. The hotel has city views, a terrace and a 24-hour front desk. At the hotel every room is equipped with air conditioning, a seating area, a TV with cable channels, a safety deposit box and a private bathroom with a shower, free toiletries and a hairdryer. Guest rooms include a desk. Popular points of interest near Ink 48 Hotel include Times Square, Broadway Theatre and Radio City Music Hall. LaGuardia Airport is 8.1 miles away.

name: Embassy Suites By Hilton New York Midtown Manhattan
description: Featuring free WiFi and a fitness center, Embassy Suites By Hilton New York Midtown Manhattan offers pet-friendly accommodations in New York. Guests can enjoy the on-site bar. Each room at this hotel is air conditioned and features a flat-screen TV. Some units have a seating area to relax in after a busy day. Each room comes with a private bathroom. For your comfort, you will find free toiletries and a hairdryer. There is a cash machine and gift shop at the property. Empire State Building is 984 feet from Embassy Suites By Hilton New York, while Macy's is 1312 feet away. The nearest airport is LaGuardia Airport, 6.2 mi from the property.

name: Park Central Hotel New York
description: Park Central Hotel New York Hotel offers the convenience of being steps from Central Park. For exercise enthusiasts, the property offers 24-hour onsite fitness center. Park Central Hotel New York Hotel offers rooms and suites that are equipped with 46-inch flat-screen TVs, desks and in-room safes. Guests can also request for a complimentary coffee maker. Meeting and event space, a concierge desk, business center and unlimited domestic calling are some of the other amenities offered for guests’ convenience. Guests at the Park Central Hotel New York can enjoy a meal at Twenty-Sevens that serves various cuisines or relax with a drink at the Park Lounge. Central Market, a fine foods “grab-and-go” market, offers guests bites from artisanal New York vendors. Carnegie Hall and the Museum of Modern Art are located within a 5 minute walk of Park Central Hotel New York. Guests can catch a Broadway show at one of the theaters located within 0.6 mi of the property.

name: Aliz Hotel Times Square
description: Offering free WiFi and a two-story rooftop bar and lounge with views of the Manhattan skyline. Aliz Hotel Times Square is located in New York, 1640 feet from Restaurant Row. The hotel is close to several noted attractions such as Times Square, Madison Square Garden and Macy's. At the hotel, the rooms include air conditioning, a desk and a flat-screen TV with cable channels. Every room has a private bathroom with bath amenities and a Keurig® coffee machine, while select rooms are equipped with a terrace and others feature river views. Guests at the accommodations can enjoy an American breakfast. The two floor food and beverage outlet, Dear Irving on Hudson, is located at the rooftop bar and lounge and is reservations only. It is open Tuesday through Saturday beginning at 4:00p.m. For guests' convenience, Aliz Hotel Times Square has a business center, fitness center, and cycling studio featuring Peloton bikes®. Staff at the 24-hour front desk can provide tips on the area. Jacob K. Javits Convention Center is 0.7 mi from the property and Empire State Building is 0.8 mi away. Hudson Yards is 0.9 mi away. The nearest airport is LaGuardia Airport, 8.2 mi from the property.

name: Westgate New York Grand Central
description: Located 853 feet from the United Nations Headquarters, this Manhattan hotel is within 1804 feet of Grand Central Station. It offers on-site dining. WiFi is provided. A 32-inch cable flat-screen TV, coffee making facilities and a laptop safe are provided in each room at Westgate New York Grand Central. The Westgate New York Grand Central features a fitness center with cardio machines and personal TVs. Valet parking is provided for a fee. The Chrysler Building is only 5 minutes walk from the hotel while Times Square is 0.9 mi (0.9 mi) from the hotel. Grand Central Station has many subway/train lines and is less than 10 minutes walk from the property.

name: Pod Times Square
description: Located 1312 feet from Restaurant Row in New York, Pod Times Square features a restaurant, bar and free WiFi throughout the property. Rooms are equipped with a flat-screen TV. Certain units include a seating area where you can relax. The rooms are equipped with a private bathroom fitted with a shower. For your comfort, you will find free toiletries and a hairdryer. You will find a 24-hour front desk at the property. Times Square is 1969 feet from Pod Times Square, while Jacob K. Javits Convention Center is 2625 feet away. The nearest airport is LaGuardia Airport, 6.2 mi from the property.

name: The Washington NYC
description: This 4-star The Washington Hotel NYC hotel is a 3-minute walk to Rector Street Subway Station. It features a modern gym, and offers city views from every room. Guest rooms at The Washington Hotel NYC are decorated in a contemporary style and furnished with a 37-inch flat-screen TV and an iPod docking station. Deluxe amenities include bathrobes, spa toiletries and a mini-bar. The Living Room, a modern cocktail lounge, offers an outdoor terrace and free WiFi access and beverage service. The Washington Hotel NYC also features a tour desk and wired business center. The New York City Stock Exchange is nearby this Manhattan luxury hotel. The Statue of Liberty is also nearby and Ellis Island Immigration Museum is 10 minutes from the hotel.

name: InterContinental New York Times Square By IHG
description: InterContinental New York Times Square is spread across 36 stories and offers accommodations with floor-to-ceiling windows offering views of the Manhattan skyline, Hudson River and Broadway Theater District. Each room includes flat-screen TV, spacious work station, spa-inspired bathroom with walk-in rain shower, coffeemaker, mini-bar and hairdryer. The Intercontinental provides a 24-hour gym. Located on the third floor with views of 44th Street, it features treadmills and free weights. The InterContinental is within 121 feet of a Subway Station and 1056 feet from Times Square. Theaters, shopping destinations and restaurants can be nearby as well. The Stinger Cocktail Bar & Kitchen welcomes patrons with a lively scene, craft cocktails, and an a la carte menu. The cozy atmosphere and tempting libations create a fabulous spot for pre- or post-event theater, late night gatherings, or a nightcap.

name: Hilton New York Times Square
description: Located in New York, a 8-minute walk from Bryant Park, Hilton New York Times Square provides accommodations with a fitness center, private parking, a shared lounge and a bar. This 4-star hotel offers room service and a 24-hour front desk. The property is 500 yards from the city center and a 8-minute walk from New York Public Library. All guest rooms will provide guests with a fridge. Guests at the hotel can enjoy an à la carte or an American breakfast. At Hilton New York Times Square you'll find a restaurant serving American cuisine. Vegetarian, vegan and gluten-free options can also be requested. Popular points of interest near the accommodation include Times Square, Macy's and Broadway Theatre. LaGuardia Airport is 7.5 miles away.

name: Kimpton Ashbel New York Park Avenue by IHG
description: Picture classic New York architecture and a one-of-a-kind neighborhood with tree-lined streets. Kimpton Ashbel Hotel is located in the heart of it all. While our neighborhood is enviable in its own right, the city's best attractions and energy are just blocks away. Grand Central Station, Rockefeller Center and Fifth Avenue shopping are just a quick walk from our Manhattan hotel's front door, giving you the best of both worlds. Welcome to Manhattan, we're glad you're here.

name: The Knickerbocker Hotel
description: Located on Times Square, The Knickerbocker Hotel features a rooftop terrace with over 370 square yards of indoor and outdoor space. WiFi access is available and free of charge for guests. Featuring a flat-screen cable TV, each room at the hotel comes with a laptop safe, a mini fridge and a desk. Many rooms feature views of the city, and the private bathroom comes with bathrobes, free toiletries and a hairdryer. A 24-hour front desk welcomes guests to The Knickerbocker Hotel, which features on-site dining at Charlie Palmer Steak IV. Cocktails are served on the rooftop at St.Cloud and guests can also dine in Charlie Palmer lounge seven days a week. Guests looking for a bit of green space can walk to Bryant Park, just 656 feet away. The New York Public Library is 3 minutes’ walk away, and the hotel is located directly above the Times Square-42nd Street Metro Station, offering easy access to the whole city.

name: DoubleTree by Hilton New York Downtown
description: Featuring paid WiFi throughout the property, DoubleTree by Hilton New York Downtown is located in lower Manhattan, 787 feet from Battery Park. Every room includes 49' flat-screen TV with premium channels and coffee and tea making facilities. Each room includes a private bathroom with a hairdryer. Extras include an in-room safe and ironing facilities. There is a 24-hour front desk and a complimentary fitness center and business center at the property. All meals are offered at Antica Ristorante the on-site restaurant and bar. The Statue of Liberty is 1804 feet from DoubleTree by Hilton New York Downtown, while the National September 11 Memorial & Museum is 0.6 mi away. The nearest underground station is Whitehall Street, 591 feet from DoubleTree by Hilton New York Downtown.

name: Night Hotel Broadway
description: On the Upper West Side of Manhattan and within walking distance of Central Park, this hotel features an on-site fitness room and accommodations with cable TV. Just a short walk away, the 96 St Metro Station provides convenient travel to Lincoln Center, MOMA, Penn Station and Madison Square Garden. The Night Hotel Broadway at 94th Street 2.7 mi from Times Square, the Broadway Theater District and Rockefeller Center. It is a 20-minute walk away from Columbia University and the American Museum of Natural History. Guests of the Night Hotel Broadway can enjoy free WiFi in public areas and a full-service business center. The 24/7 front desk can also help plan a tour of the city and arrange for dry cleaning and laundry services. Each charming accommodations includes a coffee maker and a safety deposit box. name: Gild Hall, A Thompson Hotel by Hyatt
description: Located on historic Gold Street in Manhattan’s Financial District, this hotel is 2 blocks from the Fulton Street Subway Station. It features on-site dining and access to Wi-Fi. A flat-screen TV and iPod docking station are included in each contemporary guest room at Gild Hall. The rooms offer high ceilings, custom-designed wooden furniture, and a stocked mini-bar. Concierge services and valet parking are available at the Thompson Gild Hall. Guests can work out in the 24-hour gym. Located discreetly on the second floor of Gild Hall, the upstairs wine lounge La Soffitta features wine-bottle lined walls, special cages filled with Italian wine, cocktail tables, and a communal table for large parties. The 2-level Tuscan-inspired Felice Ristorante and Wine Bar is open daily and serves Italian cuisine. The shops and entertainment at the South Street Seaport are within a 10-minute walk of the Thompson Gild Hall Hotel. Destination Fee: includes morning coffee/tea service 6 AM – 10 AM daily, wellness kit upon arrival, private access to in-hotel fitness studios, two bottles of water upon arrival, press-reader publication access, discounts to local attractions, use of in-house bicycles, and premium WiFi access.

name: The Carlyle, A Rosewood Hotel
description: Just 528 feet from Central Park, this historic Manhattan hotel is 2113 feet from the Metropolitan Museum of Art. It features the Carlyle Restaurant and a 24-hour gym. The classically decorated guest rooms at The Carlyle Rosewood Hotel include a flat-screen TV with DVD player and an iPod docking station. Guests can relax with a drink from the mini-bar or take advantage of the 24-hour room service. This Manhattan hotel hosts several art galleries and shopping stores. Massages are available at the Sense Spa. The hotel offers concierge and valet services. The elegant Carlyle Restaurant serves French-inspired cuisine for breakfast, lunch, and dinner. Since opening in 1955, Cafe Carlyle has featured musical performances by legendary entertainers. The Solomon R Guggenheim Museum is 0.8 mi from The Carlyle. Subway access is 1056 feet away.

name: Hotel Barrière Fouquet's New York
description: Fouquet's New York features a fitness center, terrace, a restaurant and bar in New York. The property is located a 16-minute walk from National September 11 Memorial & Museum, 1.8 miles from The Highline Park and 2.2 miles from Flatiron Building. The hotel has a sauna, room service and free WiFi throughout the property. The hotel will provide guests with air-conditioned rooms with a desk, a coffee machine, a minibar, a safety deposit box, a flat-screen TV and a private bathroom with a shower. The breakfast offers à la carte, continental or Full English/Irish options. Languages spoken at the 24-hour front desk include English, Spanish, French and Italian. Popular points of interest near Fouquet's New York include Bloomingdales, NYU – New York University and One World Trade Center. LaGuardia Airport is 10 miles away.

name: The Wallace Hotel
description: Located in New York and with Strawberry Fields reachable within a 11-minute walk, The Wallace Hotel has concierge services, non-smoking rooms, a fitness center, free WiFi and a bar. This 5-star hotel offers luggage storage space. Private parking can be arranged at an extra charge. Rooms are equipped with a flat-screen TV, and some accommodations at the hotel have a city view. Languages spoken at the 24-hour front desk include English and Spanish. Popular points of interest near The Wallace Hotel include Lincoln Center, Central Park and Metropolitan Museum of Art. LaGuardia Airport is 8.1 miles from the property.

name: The Manner in the Unbound Collection by Hyatt
description: Featuring a bar, The Manner, The Unbound Collection by Hyatt offers rooms in New York, a 5-minute walk from Bloomingdales and 0.6 miles from NYU – New York University. With a restaurant, the 5-star hotel has air-conditioned rooms with free WiFi, each with a private bathroom. The property provides room service, a 24-hour front desk and luggage storage for guests. At the hotel, every room is equipped with a desk. Guest rooms will provide guests with a fridge. Guests at The Manner, The Unbound Collection by Hyatt can enjoy an American breakfast. National September 11 Memorial & Museum is one mile from the accommodation, while One World Trade Center is 1.1 miles away.

name: Crosby Street Hotel
description: Located on a cobbled street in the SoHo neighborhood, this contemporary design hotel features a beautiful inner courtyard and an on-site terrace restaurant. Free Wi-Fi is available throughout the hotel. The Crosby Street Hotel offers bright, modern rooms with high ceilings and full-length windows. Each is equipped with flat-screen cable TV, DVD player and iPod docking station. Guests of Crosby Street are welcome to work out in the 24-hour gym or relax in front of the fireplace in the plush drawing room. Films are shown in the hotel’s private theater each Sunday. The Crosby Bar and Terrace serves gourmet items including breakfast and brunch. An afternoon tea with pastries and sandwiches is offered daily. The Crosby Street Hotel is adjacent to the Museum of Modern Art Design and 1 block from the Spring Street subway station.

name: Mint House at 70 Pine
description: Mint House at 70 Pine by Kasa offers accommodations in a historic landmark building in New York, 2297 feet from Battery Park. Free WiFi access is offered. Every apartment at this hotel offers a fully equipped kitchen and a flat-screen cable TV. Every residence also comes with a private bathroom with toiletries. There is a 24-hour front desk and fitness center at Mint House at 70 Pine by Kasa. The New York Stock Exchange is 1476 feet from the hotel, while the World Trade Center Memorial is 1640 feet away. LaGuardia Airport is 8.7 mi from the property.

name: The Sherry Netherland
description: Centrally located in Midtown Manhattan on Fifth Avenue, this hotel is across from the Grand Army Plaza and Central Park's main entrance. It features on-site dining and free Wi-Fi. A flat-screen TV and iPod docking station are included in each room at The Sherry Netherland. The rooms boast high ceilings and marble bathrooms. Belgian chocolates and a bouquet of flowers are provided upon arrival. All rooms offer complimentary soft drinks and water, as well as Keurig coffee machines. A gym with floor-to-ceiling mirrors is part of this Manhattan hotel. Concierge and ticket services are available. Rockefeller Center is a 10-minute walk from The Sherry-Netherland. The Museum of Modern Art is also just 10 minutes from the hotel on foot.

name: Broadway Plaza Hotel
description: Featuring modern art reproductions throughout the property, Broadway Plaza Hotel is located in the NoMad neighborhood in New York, 1312 feet from the Flatiron Building. Guests can enjoy proximity to Madison Square Park. Every room includes a flat-screen TV with pay-per-view channels. Each room comes with a private bathroom and hairdryer. There is a 24-hour front desk at the property. Broadway Plaza Hotel is 2113 feet away from The Empire State Building and Macy's. John F. Kennedy International Airport is 14 mi away from Broadway Plaza Hotel. We store luggage before check in and on the day of departure only. We cannot store overnight. Each guest is able to store up to two bags on a complimentary basis. Any additional will cost $5.00 per bag.

name: Four Seasons Hotel New York
description: Four Seasons Hotel New York, designed by I.M. Pei, offers guests a five-star New York hotel living experience with an Art Deco lobby and onyx ceiling. Located on “Billionaire’s Row”, between Park Avenue and Madison Avenue, guests will be within close proximity to Central Park and Madison Avenue shopping. All studios and suites at Four Seasons Hotel New York are infused with natural light and offer panoramic views of the city and/or the Central Park. Complimentary WiFi is provided in all the accommodations. Four Seasons Hotel New York offers an onsite spa with 10 treatment rooms, a full-service hair salon, two nails stations, saunas and a retail boutique. The gym is equipped with Artis Equipment by Technogym. Times Square is 1.1 mi from the Four Seasons Hotel New York and Rockefeller Center is 3169 feet away.

name: The Greenwich Hotel
description: This New York City hotel is located in the city’s Tribeca neighborhood. It features an underground pool and fitness center, as well as an on-site restaurant and spa. All 88 rooms at the Greenwich Hotel are individually decorated with luxurious goods from around the world. The rooms include free Wi-Fi access and a mini-bar stocked with free snacks. The Greenwich Hotel has a knowledgeable concierge staff to help guests plan their stay in New York. Other features include the on-site Shibui Spa, offering a variety of massages and treatments. Locanda Verde is the hotel’s on-site restaurant. It serves drinks and Italian cuisine in a relaxing and casual setting. The Tribeca Performing Arts Center and Washington Market Park are both within 1640 feet of the Greenwich Hotel. LaGuardia Airport is 15 mi away.

name: Nine Orchard
description: Nine Orchard has a fitness center, terrace, a restaurant and bar in New York. This 4-star hotel offers room service, a 24-hour front desk and free WiFi. The hotel features family rooms. Bloomingdales is a 16-minute walk from the hotel, while National September 11 Memorial & Museum is 1.2 miles from the property. LaGuardia Airport is 10 miles away.

name: The Hotel Chelsea
description: Located in New York and with Flatiron Building reachable within a 8-minute walk, The Hotel Chelsea provides concierge services, allergy-free rooms, a fitness center, free WiFi and a restaurant. This 4-star hotel offers room service and a 24-hour front desk. The hotel features a sauna and luggage storage space. The hotel will provide guests with air-conditioned rooms with a closet, a coffee machine, a fridge, a minibar, a safety deposit box, a flat-screen TV and a private bathroom with a shower. Each room includes an electric tea pot, while selected rooms contain a kitchen with a dishwasher, an oven and a microwave. Guest rooms in The Hotel Chelsea are equipped with free toiletries and an iPod docking station. Popular points of interest near the accommodation include Penn Station, Madison Square Garden and The Highline Park. LaGuardia Airport is 8.1 miles away.

name: The Mark New York
description: Located in Manhattan just 1 block from Central Park, this boutique hotel features The Mark Restaurant. With an artistic design, Mark Hotel includes a state-of-the-art gym and spacious guest rooms. Free Wi-Fi, an iPod docking station and 32-inch flat-screen TV are included in all modern rooms. The large marble bathrooms boast a large soaking tub and mini flat-screen TV. Each room is decorated in ebony and sycamore furnishings. The Mark Restaurant by Jean Georges serves European and globally seasoned dishes. Signature cocktails and classic drinks are featured at Mark’s Bar.Parisian cult-favorite Caviar Kaspia at The Mark offers an exceptional menu of caviar and non-caviar dishes, as well as a boutique with a selection of the finest caviar and gourmet accompaniments. The Mark features a concierge desk for guests’ convenience various activities can be arranged. Frederic Fekkai Salon is on site and offers hair and beauty treatments. The business facilities include a laptop computer rental and wireless printing services. The 77th Street – Lexington Subway Station is 2 blocks away. Times Square is 15 minutes away by subway.

name: The Surrey
description: Located 446 feet from the Central Park, this Upper East Side hotel features a seasonal private rooftop garden and an onsite restaurant. The rooms include an iPod docking station and a flat-screen TV. Private bathrooms with complimentary toiletries, a mini-bar and a DVD player are also featured int he rooms at The Surrey, A Corinthia Hotel. Surrey guests can request help from the 24-hour, 7-days a week concierge service. The hotel also features a gym with private yoga or Pilates classes. The Café Boulud is open for breakfast, lunch, and dinner. The menu includes French cuisine and seasonal meals. Cocktails are served in Bar Pleiades, which has Art Deco décor. The Metropolitan Museum of Art is 1585 feet away and Bernard Museum Temple Emanu-El is less than 0.6 mi from the property. Bethesda Terrace and Fountain are 2641 feet from the property.

name: The Langham, New York, Fifth Avenue
description: Located in Midtown Manhattan, between Bryant Park and the Empire State Building. The Langham, New York, Fifth Avenue rooms include an espresso maker and bottled water during turn-down. All the rooms are also equipped with WiFi access. Concierge services and a 24-hour front desk are provided for guests' convenience. Guests can dine at Ai Fiori, which is the onsite award-winning restaurant at The Langham, New York, Fifth Avenue. The restaurant serves modern Italian cuisine that is inspired by the French and Italian Riviera. Enjoy drinks and small plates at Bar Fiori. The Langham, New York, Fifth Avenue is 1056 feet from the Empire State Building. Grand Central Station is 2641 feet from the hotel. The Langham Club is complimentary with suite stays" and include "Huge, updated gym.

name: Conrad By Hilton New York Downtown
description: With 2000 pieces of artwork on display and an atrium, this all-suite property is located 1640 feet from the World Trade Center. Each room features a separate living room, 2 flat-screen TVs and an espresso machine. Guests can enjoy views of the Hudson River from some of the suites. The Atrio Restaurant offers Mediterranean cuisine, while the seasonal rooftop bar serves cocktails alongside a view of the Hudson River. Guests will also have access to the 24-hour fitness center. For those who enjoy shopping, Brookfield Place is across the street from Conrad New York and Westfield World Trade Center is 2133 feet from the property.

name: The Whitby Hotel
description: Located in upper midtown Manhattan, 1585 feet from the Central Park, the Whitby Hotel is a short distance away from stores such as Saks Fifth Avenue and Bergdorf Goodman. The Whitby Hotel offers complimentary WiFi to all guests. Each room at The Whitby Hotel is individually designed with floor to ceiling windows. Some rooms have a private terrace and offer views of the Manhattan skyline. Interiors have been designed by Kit Kemp. Guests will also have access to The Whitby Bar and Restaurant, an Orangery, a book-lined drawing room as well as a fully equipped gym. The Museum of Modern Art is 1585 feet from the property, while Rockefeller Center and St. Patrick’s Cathedral are 2641 feet from the property. Guests will find many restaurants in the vicinity as well.
